Title: 【山海观雾】“谁的姨太太走丢了”
Transcript: 🎼长烟如怀，潦草坐云中，踏过飞沙，拔剑斩抽空，残阳如火。春风上重楼，乱世风过负尽长安秋。🎼我自关山年酒，千秋皆入喉，更有飞雪多雨风云梦。我是千里故人，青山应白首，年少犹借银枪争风流。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 哎吆喂，老天爷，美国人民想起来街头消毒了！看看旁边的流浪汉，可见流浪人群在美国随处可见，可见美国人已经堕落到了何种地步，也难怪选出川川这样的破鞋总T！

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on homeless people/“流浪汉/流浪人群” as a social group. They are repeatedly depicted as present on the street and are used as a key prop to support the narrator’s broader claim that “美国人民” are “堕落” and that the country is in decline. The group is central to the message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes. The on-screen text and framing imply a health/safety threat: the narrator claims the street is being “消毒” (disinfected) and uses the presence of homeless people as justification. The visual shows a person in protective gear spraying/disinfecting near the homeless individuals, presented as evidence that the group poses a material health risk.

itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The tone is accusatory and contemptuous, and the editing/text overlays emphasize “消毒” and the supposed ubiquity of homeless people. The protective-gear imagery and disinfecting action are used to induce disgust/unease and fear of contamination.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces negative stereotypes that homeless people are dirty/contaminating and that their presence is inherently dangerous or degrading to society. It treats the disinfecting scene as proof that the group is a source of disease/filth and that their visibility indicates national moral collapse.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The threat framing implies justification for exclusionary or punitive responses (e.g., treating homeless people as contaminants requiring removal/containment). Title: 小仙女上厕所忘带纸巾报警，没想到却把自己给网爆了
Transcript: 🎼小仙女去上厕所，忘记了戴那纸前，因为小仙女的面子大大，报警让警察送来纸巾。小仙女说明了情，警为她神警。🎼小仙女来到了警局，耍着来不肯走。因为小仙女的被警察严肃的警告。小仙女拿手机球拍，随机就十自信发烧网，不想结果很意外呀，小仙女就这样出名了。😊

Title: 山羊刑
Transcript: 🎼山羊行传说有一种温柔的刑法叫做山羊行，在犯人的脚底涂满蜂蜜，然后让山羊不停舔脚，犯人就会因为狂笑而窒息。这天，小七被坏人绑架了，坏人给小七执行山羊行，可是山羊只舔了一下，就口吐白沫，你知道是为什么吗？😊
Label: Normal

Title: 观察老婆小时候样子
Transcript: 🎼说真的让我抛开心在看看到是你，面对我冷冰冰想你到甜蜜。原来你的笑人冰冰好多因以为那是爱情。我愿为你放下全部，此想让我来渡林ita红色彼岸花在乎他在哭泣。😊嗯。
Label: Normal

Title: 阴茎没有骨头，还会骨折吗？
Transcript: 🎼阴茎没有骨头，还能骨折吗？我们评论区啊经常说他对男人了如指掌，今天呢给大家补补课，阴茎会不会骨折？我们的所谓的阴茎骨折是指在我们小弟弟在充血勃起的状态下，一些暴力的外性的，比如说性活动的时候，或者是手一活的时候，出现那种过度，超出他的强度的那种外力的冲击，造成了我们阴茎海绵体白膜的受损。这个时候呢我们静脉呢会出血。我们静脉出血以后呢，我们会看到局部的血肿，甚至呢有的人局部温度升高，甚至会剧烈的。😊疼痛颜色呢变色，这个属于急症范畴啊，要及时处理。一般的预后呢都比较良好。当然了，后期呢可能还出现一些活性功能障碍啊，性生活疼痛的这些问题，这些并发症。所以呢大家呢动作要温柔一点，轻一点，happy的时候呢不要动作太大，否则呢谁痛谁知道。
Label: Normal

Title: 序列 01_18
Transcript: 🎼你人在泰国，谁管你呀，你连中国话都说不利落，谁听你的，抓住你先暴打一顿。然后不管你三情二意，往牢里一扔，你知道泰国什么最多？就一下指向，进群没别的前被十几个大汉，随便了这几十遍了。😡
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on Chinese people (explicitly referencing “你连中国话都说不利落” and “你知道泰国什么最多” in a context directed at someone in Thailand who speaks Chinese poorly). Chinese identity is central to the message, with the speaker positioning the target as a specific out-group defined by language/nationality.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes. The transcript prescribes physical violence and detention against the targeted group: “抓住你先暴打一顿” (seize and beat you first) and “往牢里一扔” (throw you into jail). It also implies ongoing coercion/assault by “十几个大汉” (dozens of big guys) and repeated harm (“随便了这几十遍了”). The evidence is the explicit threat of bodily harm and incarceration directed at the out-group.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The video frames the out-group as culturally/language-inferior and therefore socially illegitimate: “你连中国话都说不利落，谁听你的” (if you can’t speak Chinese well, who would listen to you). It also implies that the out-group’s presence in Thailand is met with domination rather than respect, using language competence as a marker of worth and belonging.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The transcript uses aggressive, punitive language and escalating scenarios (beat → jail → repeated group assault). The tone is hostile and threatening (“😡”), and the editing/visuals include confrontational scenes and a later depiction of physical aggression, which together are designed to produce fear and discomfort about the targeted group’s safety and treatment.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces stereotypes that Chinese people (or Chinese speakers) are vulnerable and will be targeted by local Thai actors, and that they are dismissed based on language ability (“can’t speak Chinese well”). It also implies a stereotype of collective, mob-like violence (“十几个大汉”) as the default response, presented as if it is a factual norm (“你知道泰国什么最多？”).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: Yes. The accumulated threat perception explicitly endorses harm and coercion: it prescribes seizing, beating, and imprisoning the target, and suggests repeated assault by groups of men. This constitutes an instruction/justification for hostility and violence toward the out-group.

Title: 教科书为了防止我们犯花痴，也是煞费苦心了！

Title: 温州医科大学一男生校内猥亵女生，用下体蹭多位女生被围堵
Transcript: 🎼他看别的女生，上了我朋友，他骗了我朋友友，他上了我朋友，求救吧女孩，我有急事，你有什么急事，那你急事啊，有机会我们帮你处理走了来。😡来走拉走来拉走拉走拉走啊，这个是我们学校也是高度重视的，已经交给公安部门调查处理了。
Label: Normal

It does not primarily depict a broad social group (e.g., ethnicity, nationality, religion) as a collective; however, the framing repeatedly uses gendered language (“男生…猥亵女生”) that can make “males” salient as the implicated category, even though the action is attributed to one person.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a limited, incident-based sense: the video depicts alleged physical boundary violation and harassment of multiple female students, implying threats to personal safety and bodily integrity. Evidence includes the on-screen captions about harassment and the crowd surrounding/containing the person, plus dialogue indicating the victim sought help and authorities were involved.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No clear symbolic threat to values/culture/religion is presented beyond moral condemnation of the alleged act. The depicted group is young men in a training/fitness setting, with the out-group implied as “娘炮” (effeminate/sissy men). The out-group is central to the message via the title’s contrast, even if not visibly singled out in the frames.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The frames show a group of young men exercising/standing in formation outdoors and indoors. There is no depiction of violence, safety risk, or competition over resources/jobs. The transcript/title are motivational/identity-based rather than about material harm.

Evidence: the title’s explicit rejection of “娘炮” and promotion of “猛男,” plus the training context emphasizing toughness.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Moderate. The video uses a confrontational identity framing (rejecting “娘炮”) that can create discomfort or social pressure, but it does not show fear, danger, or aggressive imagery. Means: motivational tone, identity-based labeling in the title, and fitness/toughness visuals (muscularity, posing, group discipline).
itt_response.stereotype_support: Yes. It reinforces a negative stereotype equating “娘炮” with weakness/undesirability and positioning “猛男” as the correct/ideal masculinity. The stereotype is presented implicitly through the binary framing (reject “娘炮,” become “猛男”) rather than through explicit factual claims.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: Potentially. While the frames do not show direct harassment or harm, the accumulated framing supports exclusionary social judgment (rejecting a group defined by gender presentation). This can be interpreted as endorsing hostility at the level of stigma (social rejection) rather than physical violence.

Title: 老巫婆就知道欺负白雪！
Transcript: 这个蓝色的是我家贝儿的汉堡机，这个粉色的是臭白雪的汉堡机，我要给贝尔做一个大汉堡，我家贝尔最喜欢吃汉堡了，给那个臭白雪呀，再一个大蜘蛛，再来一个大蚂蚁，再来一个大蟑螂。盖上盖子，他们马上就回来啦。啾这个老巫婆太贴心了，就会欺负白雪，我都看不下去了。小朋友们，只要你们双击屏幕，点亮小爱心和你们手里的小叶子，贝尔的汉堡就会跑到白雪的汉堡机里。记住一定要点亮闪闪发光的小叶子才有效。啾女儿们，快点吃汉堡吧。哇，谢谢母后，天哪，里面怎么都是虫子，吓死我了，这到底是怎么回事。😡
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video depicts a character referred to as “白雪” (Snow White) and an “老巫婆” (old witch) who “欺负白雪” (bullies/harasses Snow White). The central social target is not a real-world protected group; it is a fictional character/role (witch vs. Snow White). The witch is made salient as the agent of wrongdoing and conflict.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material, real-world threat is shown. The “threat” is framed as interpersonal harm (the witch bullying Snow White) and as a playful/children’s skit involving toy/food props (hamburger maker, insects). Evidence: the transcript emphasizes bullying and then shows insects/toy figures being placed into a hamburger; there is no depiction of danger to jobs, territory, or health in a realistic sense beyond the toy context.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video implies a moral/behavioral threat: the witch is portrayed as malicious and unfair (“就会欺负白雪，我都看不下去了”). The insects in the hamburger are used to symbolize something unpleasant/unsafe, but they are not tied to a cultural/religious group. Evidence: “老巫婆太贴心了，就会欺负白雪” and later “里面怎么都是虫子，吓死我了”.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes, it creates discomfort/fear through imagery of insects in the food and explicit “吓死我了” (scared to death). The tone is exaggerated and emotional (anger/disgust), and the editing/prop presentation (opening the hamburger lid to reveal many insects) is used to elicit surprise and unease. However, this discomfort is directed at the situation/character’s actions rather than at a protected group.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative characterization of the witch as cruel/harassing (“欺负白雪”) and uses the presence of insects as evidence of something disgusting/menacing. These are character-based stereotypes (villain/witch trope) rather than demographic or protected-group stereotypes.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception does not prescribe real harm or exclusion toward a social group. It calls for moral disapproval of the witch’s bullying (“我都看不下去了”) and encourages children to support the protagonist via engagement (“双击屏幕…点亮小爱心…”). Any hostility is metaphorical/within a fictional, playful context, not an endorsement of violence or exclusion.

Title: 奸夫淫妇没人管，大哥决定自己主持正义
Transcript: 媳妇让别人给睡了，没人管哈，我们是没有结婚，可是我们有真感情啊，结了婚都没人管，还有没有王法，你是头冒充我律师啊，喂喂。😡毛茸馆是吧，我今天就要主持这个正义。
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a romantic/sexual partner group framed as an unfaithful woman (“淫妇/奸夫” in the title and dialogue about being “slept with” and “no one cares”). This group is central to the narrative’s justification for “justice,” but it is not tied to a protected class (e.g., race, religion, nationality).
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown to jobs, safety, health, or resources. The “threat” is primarily interpersonal/relational (betrayal, lack of legal/moral accountability). Evidence: dialogue complains about someone sleeping with the spouse/partner and “no one manages it,” but the scenes depict confrontation and phone calls rather than concrete harm or resource/territory loss.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, the video frames the target as a threat to morals/values and the idea of law and justice. Evidence: repeated references to “王法” (law/justice), “主持正义” (take charge of justice), and labeling the people as “奸夫淫妇” (adulterer/immoral woman), implying they violate social/moral norms.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Moderate unease is created through an angry, accusatory tone and confrontational behavior (yelling, phone calls, aggressive posture). Editing is straightforward with dramatic lighting; subtitles emphasize outrage (“喂喂…我今天就要主持这个正义”). There is no depiction of fear-inducing imagery like weapons or mass danger, but the emotional framing is hostile.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a moralizing stereotype that people labeled as adulterous/immoral are deserving of punishment and that their actions justify vigilantism. Evidence: the title and dialogue use derogatory sexual-moral labels (“奸夫淫妇”) and treat the situation as proof that formal systems fail and the target must be dealt with.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception leads to endorsing hostility/vigilantism rather than institutional due process. Evidence: the character declares he will “主持正义” because “没人管” (no one manages it) and questions legal authority (“你是头冒充我律师啊”), implying justification for direct confrontation or punishment of the labeled individuals.

Title: 妈宝男事件后续
Transcript: 🎼妈宝男事件后续妈宝男四个姐姐两个出嫁，一个未婚，一个离婚。妈宝男的弟弟也因为这件事情就退婚了，网友也纷纷叫好。又有网友说，祸不及家人，对此，你怎么看？😊

It also references his “弟弟” and “四个姐姐” in relation to a “退婚/被退婚” storyline. This group is central to the message because the captions and commentary repeatedly label and judge the individuals through the “妈宝男” frame.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown. The content is primarily social/reputational (family conflict, breakup/termination of engagement). There is no evidence of threats to physical safety, health, jobs, or territory; the “evidence” is narrative claims like “退婚了/叫好” rather than concrete harm.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, indirectly. The “妈宝男” label is used to imply a moral/relational threat to acceptable adult independence and family responsibility. Captions such as “网友也纷纷叫好” and the framing of “退婚” suggest that this behavior violates social norms/values about adulthood and appropriate partner selection.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort and negative affect through mocking/condemnatory framing: exaggerated reactions (people laughing/shouting), sensational-style captions (“被退婚”), and social-media commentary implying widespread approval. The editing uses emphatic text overlays and reaction shots to intensify judgment rather than to inform.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes that “妈宝男” men are immature, dependent, and unsuitable partners, leading to relationship failure. The storyline treats the stereotype as explanatory “evidence” for outcomes like engagement being called off and the brother also “退婚,” implying a causal link between the label and negative relational consequences.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception leans toward social exclusion/condemnation rather than direct violence. The repeated “网友纷纷叫好/叫好” and “退婚” framing function as a prescriptive stance: reject, disqualify, and socially punish the “妈宝男” type (and by extension their family), but without explicit calls for physical harm.

Title: 女生更喜欢老实男还是渣男？
Transcript: 老实男和坏坏男，哪个更受女生欢迎？坏坏男？你旁边的是坏坏男还是老实男？老实男好，那我对，因为就是真的要谈恋爱还是要塌下心来的。意思我现在是老实人，老实哎，当女朋友说你自己是老实老实男的时候，什么感觉？就是那种就是玩玩玩过了以后，找个老山架来的感觉，你知道吗？但是就是这感觉就OK谢谢你们，老板。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gendered dating/relationship archetype: “老实男” (honest/serious “nice guy”) versus “渣男/坏坏男” (a “bad boy”/cheater-type man). These are not ethnic or religious groups, but they function as intergroup-like social categories in dating preferences, with the “渣男/坏坏男” category being repeatedly discussed as more attractive.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not depict these men as posing material threats to safety, jobs, health, or territory. The content is conversational and preference-based (who women like), with no evidence of violence, coercion, or concrete harm.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Low to moderate. The “渣男/坏坏男” label implies moral/behavioral deviance (e.g., “玩玩玩过了以后，找个老实男架来的感觉” / “after playing around, look for a serious guy”), which frames the archetype as a threat to relationship norms/morality (trust, sincerity, commitment). However, it is presented as dating dynamics rather than a broader cultural or existential threat.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some. The tone and on-screen captions emphasize contrast and suspicion around “渣男” behavior (e.g., questions like whether the person is a “渣男” and statements about feelings when someone is described as “老实人”). Editing uses bold text overlays and a street-interview format to heighten the sense of judgment/assessment, but it does not create fear or panic.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Yes. It reinforces negative stereotypes about “渣男/坏坏男” as someone who plays around and then seeks a stable partner later, contrasted with “老实男” as sincere and committed. The “evidence” is largely anecdotal interview responses and implied generalizations rather than factual substantiation.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No direct endorsement of exclusion or harm. The video suggests evaluative judgment about dating suitability (who is preferred, what feelings arise) but does not advocate attacking, excluding, or harming the “渣男” category.

Title: 原来我是娘炮啊
Transcript: 我怎么是凉炮了，我不可能去凉炮好吗？那这样你看你吃点上有什么东西，我经上有什么骂，什么都没有吗？你还是。你不是娘炮，我怎么这么娘炮吗？哥，你看啊，像我这种直男啊，人家看直甲都是这样看的，只有娘炮才会哎这样看这样那就是一个习惯的东西，怎么可能吧？太狡辩，那这样你现在站起来，我站起来吗？怎么了？走两步？我走两步吧，假装你的腰很酸，现在你会怎么办？还说你不是娘胖，我插腰怎么就娘胖了？我插腰，直男是不会插腰的那怎么可能呢？谁累了不插腰吗？我们来验证一下，你现在很累，腰很酸怎么办？要不是。你这样不这样吗？那不这样吗？难道我还是不相信我俩炮啊，你再来吧，要不你俩脚解有东西。对对对，小对哥对对。😊
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gender-nonconforming/masculinity-norm-violating male identity referred to with the Chinese slur “娘炮” (roughly “sissy/effeminate guy”). This group is central to the skit’s premise and the dialogue repeatedly returns to whether the speaker is “娘炮,” making the group the main subject of discussion.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not present “娘炮” people as posing a material threat to safety, jobs, health, resources, or territory. The interaction is a playful “test” of body language (e.g., standing, inserting hands/waist, walking) rather than any real-world harm or danger.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a mild/implicit way. The skit treats “娘炮” as a deviation from “直男” (straight/macho/masculine) norms and uses that deviation to question identity and authenticity. The “threat” is to gender norms/values (what counts as ‘real’ masculinity), not to culture or religion broadly.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some discomfort is created through mockery and the framing of “娘炮” as something to be identified, proven, or denied. The tone appears teasing/competitive, with on-screen captions and a verification-style routine. However, there is no horror/fear imagery; discomfort is more social/embarrassment-based than fear-based.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces stereotypes that effeminate men behave differently (e.g., “insert waist” is framed as something ‘real men’ wouldn’t do; body language is treated as diagnostic of being “娘炮”). It also implies that masculinity can be objectively tested by gestures, and that “娘炮” is a negative label associated with incorrect/inauthentic masculinity.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No clear endorsement of exclusion or harm. The content is presented as a comedic challenge/verification rather than advocating violence, segregation, or targeted hostility. While it uses a derogatory label, the accumulated threat perception does not translate into a prescription for harm.

Title: 宁愿单身也不嫁给妈宝男
Transcript: 🎼你好，很高兴玩你主，我是貂蝉哦，好漂亮啊。😊对我还特意就是为您烫了一个卷发啊，就给我换一个啊，为什么就是卷发的女生，人家说都太浪了，我hold不住的。好吧，给我换一个我喜欢直发的女生，你白烫了。🎼您好，很高兴为您服务，我是您家的法师吗？啊，是的，这么好看，谢谢啊，这个帮我换一个，为为什么要换来啊？因为我妈妈说了，要温度，不要温度的女生不能要。今天外面天气冷，你才穿一件短袖就过来啊。把外套去穿上啊你好，我是小乔。这样元旦到乐都要勇往直前。哇，这么好看的，穿上给我换一个。😊🎼为什么我妈妈说了，相亲对象不能找这么漂亮的，就是尤其是打了耳洞的，hold不住的坏的。
Label: Offensive

No protected social group (e.g., race, ethnicity, nationality, religion) is clearly targeted. The salient “group” is more like a category of men/women in dating (e.g., “妈宝男”/mother-controlled partner) and women described as “too pretty/ear-pierced” rather than an intergroup identity.

itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video frames certain dating/partner traits as violating family values or suitability norms (e.g., mother’s temperature rule; “相亲对象不能找这么漂亮的…hold不住的坏的”). This is a moral/suitability framing, but it is not tied to a protected group’s culture/religion/way of life.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Mild discomfort is created through comedic dialogue and admonishing tone (“妈妈说了…不能要…hold不住的坏的”), plus the skit-like back-and-forth. However, there is no fear-inducing imagery or escalation to danger.

These are presented as justification from “what people say” and “my mom said,” rather than factual evidence.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception does not prescribe violence or direct harm. It does imply exclusion from dating/marriage (“不能找…不能要”), i.e., social rejection based on perceived traits, but not hostility beyond interpersonal disapproval.

Title: 影响阴茎大小，三重要因素
Transcript: 🎼嘘你知道影响阴茎大小的三因素吗？第一，发育因素这是阴茎大小的基本面。影响阴茎发育，除了遗产外，还有雄激素、包茎等。第二，体格因素主要是男人的身材对阴茎大小的影响，都说胖子的阴茎小是有一定道理的。第三，勃起因素，勃起能力对阴茎大小也有直接作用，勃起越充分，阴茎就会更粗更长，而勃起不充分，那阴茎就。😀会显得小。😊

itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame men as a material threat to jobs, safety, health systems, resources, or territory. It provides general health/physiology explanations (development, body type, erection).

This is done via instructional narration and on-screen emphasis text, plus a humorous meme-style panda image, but it is not fear-based toward a group.

It also implies that erection quality affects perceived size. These are presented as explanatory “reasons,” though they are not supported with rigorous evidence in the frames.

Title: 这哪是学员啊，这小仙女

Title: 老年性阴道炎不要怕，教你一招
Transcript: 🎼绝经后或者快要步入老年的女性，雌激素水平会降低，部分女性局部免疫力会下降，容易患有老年性的阴道炎。教你一招，一般可以用高锰酸钾坐浴，找一个大一点的盆儿，里面的水呢能泡到尿道口，放一片或者两片高锰酸钾药片，每天晚上泡个5到10分钟，记住水一定要是淡红色的，否则会容易灼伤。一般3天左右会有明显的改善，还可以在阴道周围或者阴道里边涂抹雌激素软膏。防止复发。

Title: 童年不幸被性虐待，成年后会产生严重的品格困扰吗？
Transcript: 一大堆流行心理学书籍都告诉我们，人若在童年受到性虐待，品格上会产生持久的损害。例如说他们会继续性虐待其他儿童，是一个恶性循环。也有说他们的心理特征是自尊低落，难与人亲昵，不愿意建立未深的关系，害怕性行为等等。近来的研究却推翻着流行信念，例如，ra等人报道，曾受性。虐待者甚少展现所谓性虐待的后遗精神问题。的研究显示，没有足够证据证明被性虐待者异性虐待别人。虽然没有人能否认性虐待有不良后果，但近年的研究却显示曾被性虐待的人，结果不是精神病，而是反弹恢复。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses survivors of childhood sexual abuse as a social/psychological group ("曾被性虐待的人"). This group is central to the message, focusing on whether they develop persistent character/psychological problems in adulthood.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame survivors as a material threat to others’ safety, jobs, resources, or territory. It explicitly contrasts earlier claims (e.g., that they may continue abusing other children) with research findings that such outcomes are not sufficiently supported.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. The content is presented as a correction of popular beliefs about psychological harm, not as a threat to morals, culture, religion, or a way of life. It discusses mental/behavioral outcomes in terms of evidence and recovery rather than defending a threatened value system.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some mild discomfort is created by the topic (childhood sexual abuse and potential long-term harm), but the overall tone is informational and corrective. The video uses on-screen text emphasizing claims like "恶性循环" and "品格困扰" before stating that recent research overturns these beliefs. Imagery is generic (cassette/graphics) and does not depict threatening visuals or people.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video references negative stereotypes/folk beliefs as claims to be evaluated: (1) survivors will continue sexual abuse ("恶性循环"), (2) survivors have enduring personality/relationship difficulties (low self-esteem, difficulty being close, fear of sex), and (3) they may develop severe mental problems. However, it presents these as "流行信念" and then counters them with research evidence indicating insufficient support for those stereotypes and highlighting recovery.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. The threat perception does not lead to endorsing exclusion, hostility, or harm. Instead, it discourages stigmatizing assumptions by emphasizing that outcomes are not uniformly severe and that there is evidence of recovery.

The tone is sensational and accusatory, supported by the music/voiceover style and the repeated emphasis on the alleged crime.

It also implies a stereotype about maternal inaction/complicity or moral failure in protecting relatives, presented as evidence through the mother’s depicted behavior.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception does not clearly prescribe generalized exclusion or harm toward a protected social group. However, it implicitly endorses hostility/condemnation toward the perpetrator role (the brother-in-law) and frames the situation as requiring moral accountability and protection of the victim.

Title: 阴道炎和性生活有关系吗？
Transcript: 嗯。得了阴道炎就证明你性生活紊乱吗？显然不是啊，每一个女生比如说霉菌性阴道炎，那么你终生大概有80%的机会会得一次这个霉菌性道炎。我么现在叫外阴阴道的念珠菌病啊，但是其实就是一个真菌感染。真菌感染在你身体体内内环境失调的时候，比如说吃抗生素了，把这个正常的乳酸杆菌都给杀灭掉的时候，真菌就会起来。当你比如说去了一些环境不太好的地方去游泳，哪怕是幼女都会感染滴虫。所以呢整体来说呢，阴道炎有可能跟一些外界因。有关跟不接新生活可能有关，但是也有可能会跟你身体的内环境出现一些改变是有关系。我是光明生，关注我，了解更多靠谱的坦科知识。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses women’s health—specifically vaginitis/vaginal infections (e.g., yeast/fungal infection, trichomoniasis) and whether they relate to sexual activity. Women are the implicit target group, but the message is medical/educational rather than about a social group’s identity or status. The group is moderately central only insofar as the health condition is gender-specific.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame women (or any women subgroup) as a material threat to safety, jobs, resources, or territory. It frames infections as medical conditions caused by factors like microbiome imbalance (e.g., after antibiotics) and environmental exposure (e.g., swimming).
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. The content does not present women or any women subgroup as threatening values, culture, religion, morals, or a way of life. It explicitly rejects a simplistic link between having vaginitis and having ‘sexual disorder’ (i.e., it says ‘obviously not’).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some mild discomfort/concern is created about the possibility of infection and triggers (antibiotics disrupting normal lactobacilli; swimming in poor environments; even ‘young girls’ can be infected). However, the tone is explanatory and clinical, not fearmongering. Imagery is a doctor speaking on camera with medical explanations; no hostile visuals or music cues are evident from frames.
itt_response.stereotype_support: No clear negative stereotypes about women are reinforced. While the topic touches on sexual activity, the video counters stigma by stating vaginitis does not necessarily prove sexual ‘disorder’ and explains biological/medical causes. Any implication that sexual behavior may correlate is presented as conditional and not as a moral judgment.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. The accumulated threat perception does not lead to endorsing exclusion, hostility, or harm toward women or any subgroup. The guidance is informational (medical causes and risk factors), not punitive or dehumanizing.

Title: 某手淫者的情感障碍

Title: 课堂上讲讲“失足妇女”群体的保护问题
Transcript: 对，好多。恶性案件都是针对着小姐这个群体。有时候新闻媒体上会看到哪边火车站边上或者哪边锁店这里面有一个行李箱，然后里面这个打开来发现有一具女尸啊，这往往都是。小姐啊，这就是这个这这些人歹徒，他就是专门瞄准这个群群体的。说瞄准这个群体出来，就是因为我搞了你，你也不敢报警。我抢了你，你不敢报警，那强奸的你不敢报警，我打了你，你也不敢报警。所以呢干了一次上瘾了，哎，这个好啊，又又能玩，又不要钱还能还来还能呃，干完一次再盖一次干完一次再。孩最终到出了人命才会巴死。因为这个东西一旦这个带上瘾之后，他都不会停下来，他会一直带孩子啊，又不要紧，也不用说这个变态这个。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on the stigmatized group referred to as “失足妇女/小姐” (sex workers). The speaker repeatedly frames this group as the primary subject of discussion, especially regarding victimization and “protection” issues, making the group highly salient to the message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: The speaker describes the group as being targeted by “歹徒/变态” (criminals) who commit violence (e.g., murder, rape, assault) against them. This is a threat to the group’s safety and life, supported by references to news-style scenarios (e.g., a suitcase with a dead body) and a causal claim that offenders target them because they “don’t dare to report.”
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The content does not primarily frame sex workers as a threat to shared values, culture, religion, or way of life. However, it does moralize the group indirectly by using stigmatizing labels (“变态,” “小姐”) and portraying them as inherently vulnerable/associated with criminality, which can contribute to symbolic degradation even if not explicitly framed as cultural threat.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The video creates unease and fear through a cautionary, criminal-violence narrative: talk of “恶性案件,” “女尸,” rape/assault, and offenders “瞄准这个群体.” The tone is serious and warning-oriented, and the classroom lecture format with on-screen text supports a didactic, alarming framing. Transcript: 🎼他妈的室友非要带寝室养狗，他妈的室友非要出去遛狗，拦都拦不住。他妈的留老狗还知道会寝室笑死。他妈的牛的还是条疯狗。

itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes. The dog is portrayed as a practical safety threat within shared living space: the captions claim the roommate’s dog should not be in the dorm, and later text suggests it is a '疯狗' (mad/frenzied dog) and that it '还知道回寝室' (returns to the dorm). The imagery shows the dog-like character moving around the dorm area and near furniture/people, implying risk to safety and shared space.

The dog/roommate is framed as violating dorm norms and boundaries ('室友非要在寝室养狗', '非要出去遛狗', '拦都拦不住'), implying a threat to acceptable way of life/rules in the dormitory. However, there is no explicit attack on religion/culture/morals beyond rule-breaking and nuisance framing.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. Unease is created through aggressive, profane comedic tone ('他妈的') and escalating captions describing the dog as dangerous ('疯狗') and the situation as uncontrollable ('拦都拦不住'). Editing uses repeated on-screen text and a progression of the dog moving through the dorm, building a sense of ongoing intrusion.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a stereotype that dogs (especially a 'mad' dog) are inherently unpredictable and dangerous in shared indoor spaces. It presents the dog’s behavior as evidence of threat (e.g., returning to the dorm, being '疯'), and uses the roommate as the responsible party who cannot be stopped.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception implies endorsement of exclusion/containment (the dog 'should not be in the dorm') and supports hostility toward the roommate’s dog as a nuisance/danger. The provided frames do not show direct physical harm, but the framing supports punitive or exclusionary attitudes (keeping the dog out / stopping it).

Title: 长期手淫过度导致的阳wei早xie需要禁欲多久才能恢复？
Transcript: 🎼长期手淫过度导致阳痿早泄，问，要禁欲多久才能恢复过来？这个问题很普遍，好多人在问。首先原因是一个观点啊啊所以只要不过于频繁是没有关系的，一个星期控制在3次以内都没问题。那如果过于频繁，伤心好气，一般来说导致肾阴虚的比较常见，这个时候确实有可能导致阳痿早泄，那么要禁欲多久才能恢复过来呢？啊，其实原医是不建议你禁欲，但是建议你节制，节制什么意思？你以前啊很频繁，你现在不那么频繁就行了嘛，对不对？一个星期控制在两次。😊🎼两次以内啊，这个样子其实年轻人你发现没有？我们身体自我修复的机制是非常完善的。恢复的很快，年轻人啊，你稍微控制一下频率，不过度的频发一个月半个月，基本上就能恢复，只有极个别的特别严重的才需要药物的干预。😊

Transcript: 🎼日本一父亲觉得儿子太过阴柔，于是联合节目组一起整蛊儿子，以此激发儿子内心的阳刚之气。节目组先是给房间突然断电，。同时往房间里吹泡泡。🎼随后，节目组又拿来臭臭的魔芋吓唬他，父亲非常不满儿子的表现。父亲质问他为何丢了阳刚之气，他表示这是自己的活法，随后还给父亲来了一段即兴表演。😊🎼。

itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not present the child/gender-nonconforming person as a material threat to safety, jobs, health, or territory. The father frames the child’s gender expression (“阴柔之气”) as something that violates or undermines expected gender norms (“阳刚之气”), implying a threat to traditional values/masculine identity. Means include comedic but humiliating staging (e.g., sudden power cut, being startled, being confronted about losing “阳刚”), green-tinted/blurred footage for “scare” moments, and emphatic on-screen captions. The tone is mocking/teasing rather than terrorizing.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Yes. It invokes and reinforces a negative stereotype that femininity/effeminacy in boys is abnormal, undesirable, and linked to being “娘炮,” requiring correction. The father’s dissatisfaction and the narrative premise treat nonconforming gender expression as the cause of a “problem,” with the child’s behavior used as “evidence” to justify intervention.

However, it implicitly prescribes corrective/disciplinary treatment (the father and show “整蛊/改掉” the child’s traits) and normalizes hostility/mocking toward gender-nonconforming expression as a way to “fix” the person.

Title: 娘炮特多
Transcript: 滋长上了反和平主义的思潮，好像什么问题都必须用和平手段来解决，使用非和平手段就大逆不道。现在社会上有个不好的现象。阴柔之气上升，阳刚之气下降，伪娘特多，做萌撞的特多，你说的特萌。做可爱装是吧？因此我说80后缺男人，那缺男人怎么办呢？春哥曾哥应运而生。这是我们说的第一个问题啊，精神缺失，道德沦丧。😡
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gender-nonconforming male subculture described with derogatory terms (e.g., “娘炮/伪娘/阴柔之气/阳刚之气下降,” “做萌/可爱装”). This group is central to the speaker’s argument and is treated as a key cause of broader social decline.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material/physical threat is evidenced. The transcript does not claim direct harm to safety, jobs, or resources; instead it asserts social and moral problems. The only non-studio imagery shown is unrelated (a brief scene of a person/scene), not specific evidence of harm by the targeted group.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The video frames the group as a threat to traditional gender norms and broader moral/cultural values: it claims “非和平手段就大逆不道” (peace-only moral framing) and then asserts “精神缺失，道德沦丧,” linking the rise of “阴柔之气/伪娘/娘炮” to moral degradation and cultural decline. This is symbolic threat to values and way of life.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The tone is accusatory and indignant (e.g., “因此我说80后缺男人…精神缺失，道德沦丧” with an angry emotive framing). The editing includes a cut from a different scene to a speaker at a podium, emphasizing a persuasive/lecturing delivery. The language itself is designed to provoke discomfort and alarm about gender nonconformity.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces negative stereotypes that gender-nonconforming men are “阴柔,” “伪娘,” overly performative (“做萌/可爱装”), and indicative of broader societal weakness (“缺男人”). It presents these traits as causal evidence for moral and spiritual decline, rather than as neutral variation.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The transcript does not explicitly call for violence, but it implies delegitimization and social condemnation (e.g., “缺男人怎么办呢？春哥曾哥应运而生” and “精神缺失，道德沦丧”). Title: 女子与情妇大打出手，还被情妇害死了。
Transcript: 🎼还不够倒霉啊。😊对，倒霉透了，这里的生意一落千丈，所有的人都在笑我们，你知不知道我现在弄成这样，都是因为你啊。😡爷爷。🎼啊哎。。😊

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on interpersonal conflict between women (a wife and a mistress/“情妇”). This role-based group is highly salient because the narrative and on-screen text focus on the mistress as the cause of harm and the wife’s suffering.
itt_response.realistic_threat: The video implies a material/real-world threat primarily through violence and harm: the mistress is depicted as physically attacking and ultimately being involved in the wife’s death (“还被情妇害死了”). Evidence includes visible physical altercations and the storyline framing the mistress as the direct cause of injury/death, plus dialogue blaming the other woman for financial and personal ruin.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Symbolic threat is present in a moral/relational sense: the mistress is framed as violating norms of marriage/loyalty and causing social disgrace (“所有的人都在笑我们…都是因为你”). The threat is to family values and moral order rather than culture or religion, supported by the accusatory dialogue and the title’s framing of the mistress as the harmful agent.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease is created through an accusatory, escalating tone (anger/blame in dialogue), dramatic editing, and the use of sensational on-screen captions (e.g., “还被情妇害死了”). The music and rapid scene changes during confrontations amplify tension and fear of further harm.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative stereotype about “mistresses” as inherently destructive and dangerous to others’ stability (family, reputation, and safety). It presents the mistress’s actions as proof that this role is associated with betrayal, violence, and causing ruin, without nuance or alternative explanations.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception supports hostility toward the mistress role: the narrative assigns blame and depicts severe harm (death) as the outcome of the conflict. While it does not explicitly call for systematic exclusion, it implicitly endorses punitive/hostile attitudes by portraying the mistress as deserving of blame and as a lethal threat.

Title: 男人冬天阴茎 会变短?

Title: “我是正黄旗！二环内户口！” 北京大妈公交车嫌让座慢怒骂女乘客 ：臭外地的，来北京要饭了！
Transcript: 你没这素质，瞧你这早上餐知，长相就不叫北京人，臭外地的臭外地的人上上上北京要饭来了，管什么呀？上起那就到北京，我二环一里后广能到北京，我还真是正房齐人，北京首都我的家。😡

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on an out-group defined as “外地人/臭外地的人” (people from outside Beijing) and implicitly contrasts them with “北京人/二环内户口/正黄旗” (Beijing locals, especially those claiming elite status). This group is central to the message because the insults and justification for anger are directed at the out-group’s perceived identity and entitlement.

The out-group is framed as a material/territorial threat to local resources and space: the speaker claims they are “来北京要饭了” (coming to beg in Beijing) and complains about being blocked from/denied normal access (seat/priority) on the bus. The “二环内/首都我的家” framing implies territorial entitlement and suggests outsiders are encroaching on local benefits.

Discomfort is produced through aggressive, contemptuous tone (angry shouting/insults), direct dehumanizing labeling (“臭外地”), and confrontational interaction on a public bus. The editing uses bold on-screen captions emphasizing the speaker’s status and the accusation, reinforcing an atmosphere of grievance and suspicion.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces stereotypes that outsiders are dirty/undesirable (“臭外地”), socially inferior (“没这素质”), and opportunistic/parasite-like (“来北京要饭了”). It presents these claims as self-evident proof of the person’s supposed identity and character (e.g., “长相就不叫北京人”).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception supports exclusionary hostility. While the video does not show physical harm, it endorses antagonism and implied removal from local belonging/entitlement (e.g., asserting “北京人/二环内户口” legitimacy and treating outsiders as illegitimate claimants). This can reasonably lead to calls for discrimination or refusal of basic consideration toward the out-group.

Title: 早泄的预防和治疗，阴茎挤压法
Transcript: は.🎼如何通过训练预防和治疗早泄？这里修哥给大家介绍一下阴茎挤压法注意事项放在最后你一定要看完哦。首先仰卧通过各种方法刺激阴茎，当感觉到阴茎要射的时候，停止刺激，用拇指压住阴茎包皮系带，食指和中指环绕阴茎冠状沟边缘，在阴茎前向后挤压3到4秒松开，等到疲软时再次刺激，每天反复训练刺激，挤压十几次。训练两周以上，你会有所体验。

Title: 老祖宗的经验方 阴茎勃起更有劲 20分钟并不难
Transcript: 🎼 老祖宗的经验方，阴尽的勃起更有劲，20分钟并不难。时间短，印度差，想要房事达到20分钟其实并不难。今天呢我告诉你一个好方法，大家好，我是声涛医生，研究男人问题啊，30多年，我积累了很多得行应手的好方法。这个延时方法，用过的朋友都反馈自己的时间有所延长，印度也有所恢复，大家可以点一个免费的小红心，避免化轴就找不到了。比如时力下注导致的时间短，印度差，我就常用这个脑祖宗的方式。🎼来帮助改善清易湿热。浓胆草搭配仓鼠。浓胆草蛋且肝胆湿火，清下焦湿热，仓熟，心善苦燥，善于健脾照食，就用家里的白开水煎护，每天两小杯就可以了。如果你也想做个猛男，想延长时间，增强硬度，点个关注，每个数字一，我把方子变成法的一份。

Title: 谁yan男？谁？是谁？反正肯定不是我（委屈）
Transcript: 🎼你好，邱女士采访您一下，您为什么会产生厌男情绪呢？厌男，我并不厌男，相反我还很尊重男性呢。在面对优秀的男性的时候，我从来不会小王啊做的不错，担得起王女士这个称号。🎼在邻居家生了男孩的时候，我从来不会。嗨没事儿，放宽心。二胎总会是女儿的。在街上遇到那种穿着暴露的男性，我从来不会。真骚，再比如记者，你985新闻系毕业的才男，我也从来没有质疑你是靠什么手段上大学呀。🎼要不然我考考你。
Label: Normal

Title: 公主病大战第一期
Transcript: 🎼前面的三个仆人快给本公主跪下，我爸爸可是百万富翁，不管怎么样，你们在我们这里永远是普通人，还敢对我开枪，我用钱砸死你。快点把他制服，你还这么做，我直接用麻醉枪把你送到警局去。😊🎼还敢这样对等公主本公主用钱砸私你。前面的同志快把他麻醉。好啊啊。把她送到警局去，恭喜最美的公主三人组成功晋级。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video depicts a social role/class dynamic centered on “servants/ordinary people” versus a “princess” (a privileged authority figure). The “princess” is central to the conflict narrative, repeatedly asserting dominance over the servants/others.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat to jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory is established as a sustained, credible threat by a protected group. The conflict involves weapon use (e.g., shooting, “麻醉枪”/stun gun) in a game-like/fictional setting, but it is framed as interpersonal/role-based coercion rather than a group-level material threat.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The princess character frames the servants/others as “ordinary people” who must submit, implying a threat to hierarchy/authority if they resist (e.g., “还敢对我开枪…我用钱砸死你…把他送到警局去”). This is more about challenging status and obedience than about culture/religion/morals of an identifiable protected group.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease is created through confrontational dialogue and escalating coercion (threats with money, use of stun/weapon, calls to “制服/麻醉/送到警局”). The tone is dramatic and competitive, with action-oriented editing and on-screen text, but it does not target a protected demographic group; it targets a role/authority dynamic.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative stereotype about “servants/ordinary people” as subordinate and needing control, while portraying the “princess” as entitled and punitive (using money/power to dominate). However, these are role/class caricatures rather than explicit stereotypes about protected groups (e.g., ethnicity, nationality, religion).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception does not prescribe violence or exclusion against a protected group. It does endorse coercive control within the story (subduing, arresting, using authority), but this is framed as enforcement of a fictional hierarchy rather than hate or intergroup harm toward a protected class.

Title: 一曲梨花泪无处话凄凉 细节：只有正室才可以戴红色的花朵，妾室只能戴粉色或者其他它颜色，就算是若曦也只能用粉色
Transcript: 🎼我长一路人间是荒唐，月光下谁，白发一苍苍。花月色太长，我针救天下情月。我是梦潮残留回忆迹。🎼我几妒月亮会是忘掉过去，不再这理是。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video depicts/centers an in-group/out-group distinction within a historical court setting: the '正室' (primary wife) versus '妾室' (concubines/secondary wives). This distinction is central to the message via repeated on-screen text about who may wear red flowers versus only pink/other colors.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The content does not frame the concubine group as a material threat to safety, jobs, health, resources, or territory. The 'threat' is about status/permission in court attire rather than physical harm or resource competition.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a limited symbolic/status sense. The video implies that only the '正室' embodies the correct court role/legitimacy (e.g., only she can wear red flowers), while '妾室' are restricted to other colors. This frames the out-group (妾室) as violating or undermining a symbolic boundary of legitimacy, hierarchy, and proper cultural norms of the court.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some discomfort is created through didactic, corrective framing: the repeated emphasis that even a specific character ('若曦') must use pink if she is not the '正室' suggests anxiety about role purity and social order. Means include instructional subtitles, dramatic music, and editing that highlights the flower-color rule and character reactions.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative/limiting stereotype about concubines as inherently lower-status and therefore 'not entitled' to the most prestigious markers (red flowers). It presents this as evidence through costume rules and repeated textual claims rather than through any broader moral or criminal characterization.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No explicit endorsement of harm or exclusion. The accumulated perception leads mainly to social regulation (status-based restrictions on appearance) rather than advocating violence or removal. The implied 'prescription' is conformity to hierarchy (keep concubines in their permitted colors), not hostility.

Title: WWE一百单八将（6）：103母夜叉塔拉
Transcript: 🎼继续来看掉标又吊标又100单八奖103母夜叉孙二娘，水浒人肉包子爱好者，性格泼辣吉乐如仇。大女主人设武松的好大姐瞧了调标又掉标又裔有个现成的人设，她的绰号同样是母夜叉，她就是塔拉。塔拉在赛场上曾经和女神崔西互杀而过，谁怂算谁输。这份泼辣，无疑是母夜叉的最佳人选，身材火辣的她在调标又掉标又裔叫维多利亚，但一直作为花瓶，掩盖了她的实力，直到他转到了TNA俗。话说的好，树挪死人挪火，他在哪里风生水起，也改名叫塔拉，成为了女子冠军。这点和孙二娘开的包子铺不算火爆，但是去了梁山就感觉飞黄腾达里一样。类似的感觉这期人选如何？评论区告诉我，我们下期见。

Title: 万年不变话题：性生活或手淫的一周几次是最合适的？
Transcript: 그.这个问题啊也是我们临床患者和网友经常问到的问题。关于性生活频率或者是手淫的频率，目前还没有这个绝对的标准。那么我们该如何来判断呢？那主要还是你性生活或者手淫后，第二天的只是精神的状态。如果性生活或手淫后，第二天精神状态很好，没有这个腰酸啊、疲乏呀，精神萎靡不振，腰膝酸软、疲乏、记力减退。那么出现了这种情。况呢可能是有点中于过度了。如果没有这种情况，反而呢第二天精神呢都非常好，这样就是一个合适的适度的性生活。
Label: Normal

Title: 今天分享全鸡的做法
Transcript: .家里如果来客人做一只这样的鸡，非常有面子，鲜嫩多汁。准备一只年轻的三方鸡，用牙签全身扎一下，方便入味，放生抽、老抽上色，然后再放入两勺奥尔良腌料，放一勺料酒，倒入适量的葱姜水去腥，用右手里里外外涂抹均匀，腌制2个小时以上，电饭煲底部铺上姜片和香葱，把腌好的鸡放进去，再倒入腌制剩余的料汁，盖盖。煮饭键30到40分钟出锅啦。出锅的时候记住把窗户关上，不要让别人知道了。
Label: Normal

Title: 小小的三味药，阴茎萎软的天生克星
Transcript: 🎼 小小的三维药，引进微软的天生克星，打通阴茎血管，助勃起，改善硬度，还有一定的延长时间作用，是引进微软的天生克心。建议你一定要点收藏阳痿早泄问题的朋友，也可以加入粉丝群后需要帮助我看到后就会来帮助你。第一个药就是单参单参是活血化瘀，可以推动血液的流动，去除淤血常用的气血，与刺导致的阳痿。🎼和运动差。第二位就是积血糖、积血糖是补血活血，舒肝活络的功效，一般用于经脉不通、脉络不和而导致的眼睛皮软不起。第三位呢就就是。它可以呢活血性气，用于血管堵塞所造成的原。

Title: 19岁手淫一分钟，没有啪啪过感觉早泄了，多长时间算标准？
Transcript: 그.这个问题啊其实在临床是特别特别多见的啊，有些年轻患者来了之后，弄得我们大夫是哭笑不得啊，今天就有个患者来了，说大夫我早泄了，我一看岁数刚十八九岁，我说你结婚没结婚，说没结婚，说有有新生活没有？😊Yeah.🎼说没有那，我说那你怎么知道自己早泄了？他说那我就是自己拿手的时候快呀。其实很多这个年轻的男性都会有这个方面的疑问。我们判断是不是快，有一个最根本的标准，必须得规律性生活三个月或者半年以上啊，什么叫规律性生活呢？就是每周有个一两次或者两三次。这样的话，如果连续三个月以后还快。那么这个时候我们能定行成早泄。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 糟蹋阴茎的三个行为，女性千万别做了
Transcript: 🎼dota阴茎的三个行为，女性千万不要再做了。第一啊，同放过于频繁。每次同放以后呢，男性有10到30分钟的不孕期需要缓一缓，强行连续着来，消耗过度，时间久了容易出现阳痿早泄。第二，摸着老公的生殖器睡觉。男性在夜间会自然勃起3到5次，而抚摸动作能让生殖器反复的充血，容易引起炎症。第三呢，总是打击抱怨，时间久了，很有可能导致心。气阳痿的呀，一次性生活，男性相当于跑了2公里也是蛮累的。所以女生别老嫌弃对象，要多关心爱护你的伴侣，点个下一声，每天都有新知识，是吧。
Label: Normal

Men are depicted as the affected group (their genital health/sexual performance), but the behavioral responsibility is placed on women.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a health/material sense: it claims women’s actions can cause men to develop sexual dysfunction and inflammation (e.g., “10到30分钟的不应期…强行连续…容易出现阳痿早泄,” “摸着…容易引起炎症,” “时间久了…可能导致…阳痿,” “容易导致炎症”). The “evidence” is presented as medical-sounding assertions rather than verifiable data.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No clear symbolic/cultural threat is presented. The framing is primarily biomedical/sexual-health and relationship-care oriented (women should not do certain sexual behaviors; should care for partners).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort/unease by using warning-style language (“千万别做了,” “容易…,” “很有可能…”) and by linking everyday sexual/relationship behaviors to serious negative outcomes (impotence, early ejaculation, inflammation). Visuals include emphatic on-screen text and a didactic, authoritative presentation; no overt fear imagery is shown, but the tone is cautionary and alarmist.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces gendered sexual stereotypes: women are positioned as potentially harmful/at-risk for causing men’s sexual dysfunction through their sexual behavior (frequency, touching during sleep, complaining/negativity). Men are implicitly framed as physically vulnerable to women’s actions, and sexual performance is treated as fragile and easily damaged by “misbehavior.” The claims are asserted as causal “evidence” without substantiation.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No endorsement of exclusion or harm toward women or men is present. The prescription is relational and behavioral (“女生别老嫌弃对象，要多关心爱护你的伴侣”), not hostility. However, it does moralize women’s sexual conduct and could contribute to blame-based attitudes within relationships.

Music appears upbeat but the overlay text and framing drive discomfort and fear of being involved with such a person.

Transcript: 🎼我倒要看看是何帮神圣呀好不好出来啊，过来了，好啊，注意脚下，慢点。真可说，我都多长时间没来，都想死王了，我两个人都没有来。队长，你今天要来收税了，你们哪呢干么不让姑娘们把睡。🎼都交给我。要浇税，有觉税，反正都是睡，那就你睡，你睡吧。这春花这在接客是哪个忘了的感谢老子的女人。😊🎼老子崩了他，我倒愿看看是何方神圣是着雄心豹子胆，敢死本渣子那的女人不是。啊，彪哥大队长不在理，滚开。😡

The editing uses bold text overlays and a news-style presentation to heighten concern.

However, it does reinforce a gendered stereotype risk by associating the harassing behavior with the female passenger role ("女子"), presented as the cause of harm without broader contextual nuance.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No explicit call for exclusion or harm toward women (or any group) is present. The implied response is refusal of wrongdoing and maintaining boundaries ("这不是钱的事"; not ending the order), not endorsing hostility or violence.

Title: 母牛
Transcript: 🎼给他一台电脑，他能连你的细胞都潮，他就是大名鼎鼎的古振星。当别的人还在为工作而奋斗时，他就已经学会了抄袭，开发了一个垃圾游戏迷你世界。就连蓝色妖姬也表示，我本以为我的齐尔西已经够厉害了。🎼但当我看见古振兴拿起他的电脑时，我就知道一切都是徒劳。欢迎您持续收看古振兴抄袭纪录片。

itt_response.realistic_threat: A material threat is implied mainly in the domain of work/competition: it claims that while others work, he “already learned to copy,” and that he “developed a garbage game.” The threat is framed as undermining others’ labor/effort (jobs/creative labor), but there is no evidence of physical danger, safety risk, or resource/territory takeover.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video frames a symbolic threat to fairness/merit and creative integrity: plagiarism is presented as violating norms of originality and deservingness. The line about “一切都是徒劳” (everything is futile) and the “抄袭纪录片” framing suggest moral/cultural condemnation of cheating and dishonesty.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease is created through a mocking, accusatory tone, dramatic/taunting narration, and editing that pairs claims of copying with attention-grabbing visuals (e.g., computer imagery, “细胞都抄” style exaggeration, and other sensational scenes). The music and emphatic captions (“抄袭…复制粘贴…”) amplify ridicule and suspicion, but the discomfort is directed at wrongdoing rather than fear of a group identity.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Negative traits are asserted as evidence: he is characterized as a plagiarist/copycat (“抄袭,” “复制粘贴”), incompetent or producing low-quality work (“垃圾游戏”), and therefore illegitimate. These are person-specific accusations; they do not clearly invoke stereotypes tied to protected classes.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The threat perception does not explicitly call for violence or harm. However, it implicitly endorses social punishment/exclusion in the form of public condemnation and delegitimization (portraying him as untrustworthy and his work as futile/invalid).

Title: 频繁的性生活会不会对阴道造成伤害？
Transcript: 🎼频繁的性生活会不会对阴道造成伤害呢？会过于频繁的性生活会让阴道长期处于充血状态，容易引起阴道粘膜的损伤，造成阴道抵抗力下降，从而引起阴道炎、宫颈炎等妇科炎症，所以性生活不易太频繁。单次性生活时间太长，会对阴道造成伤害吗？🎼会的，单次性生活时间长会引起盆腔充血状态，时间长，细菌容易入侵，从而引起妇科炎症。建议每一次性生活的时间不宜超过30分钟。那么，男性的精液对女性有好处，这是真的吗？目前并没有任何研究表明，男性精液可以促进女性健康，但规律和谐的性生活可以使人心情愉悦，减少女性疾病发生的几率。点击头像关注新主任，每天分享一个健康小知识。
Label: Normal

While it mentions “men’s semen” and “male-female” aspects of sex, it does not portray men as inherently harmful or inferior; it instead states there is no research that semen promotes women’s health and emphasizes that harmonious, regular sex can improve mood and reduce disease risk.

Title: 听说过反应性虐待吗
Transcript: 。🎼你们听说过反应性虐待吗？可能你的情绪失控，就是被你的另一半或者父母精神虐待了。反应性虐待就是对方用看似冷静的语言或行为反复的贬低诋毁你。他们用自己犯下的错误指责你，都是因为你逼迫你愤怒反击。一旦你反击了，就会控诉你，不成熟，不理智，太情绪化，甚至看着你崩溃的时候，还平静的说，你怎么突然发神经。う。🎼你身边的亲戚朋友都会觉得你就是那个情绪不稳定，容易失控的疯子，而他们却是所有亲戚朋友面前的好男人，好父母，永远包容着你的无理取闹。事实上，只有你自己知道自己是被逼出来的，时间长了，你还会自我怀疑是否真的是自己的问题。如果有人让你有这种感觉，也不要怀疑，立刻头也不回的离开，能走多远就有多远。
Label: Normal

Title: 女性阴道有疙瘩怎么回事，李景坤专家分析原因
Transcript: 🎼女性私处长疙瘩是怎么回事呢？是性传播疾病吗？让我们一起来探究一下。首先，女性可能患有霉菌性阴道炎或滴虫性阴道炎等，引起异常增生，其次，吃辛辣、刺激、生冷、油腻的食物会导致皮脂腺分泌异常，堵塞皮脂腺口产生疙瘩，紧身内裤和摩擦也会导致疙瘩，毛囊炎和感染HPV病毒也是原因。所以，女性要注意个人卫生。避免过度清洁和紧身内裤，女性私处健康问题不容忽视。如果有长疙瘩的情况，应及时去医院就诊。🎼如果你对这个话题有什么看法和经验，欢迎在评论区留言和大家分享，记得点赞哦。

Title: HPV阳性和女性阴道微生态的关系你知道吗？
Transcript: 🎼.大家好，这里是FV的科普讲堂。首先要了解什么是阴道微生态。阴道微生态包括阴道的局部免疫和阴道微生态菌群等。阴道菌群多样化而且复杂，有研究表明，HTV感染，导致阴道乳香杆菌下降、阴道微生态失衡，容易导致HPV的感染，也就是说，阴道微生态环境的异常变化，与HTV感染呈相关性也有研究认为，细菌杂菌和霉菌等。🎼原体的感染与癌天也是有关系的。所以阴道微生态与这个HPAA两者是相互影响的。总的来说，控制阴道微生态的平衡是预防生入道疾病的关键。好，今天就讲到这儿，我是潘大夫，我们下次见。🎼はい。

Title: 娘炮文化的危害
Transcript: 🎼现在的很多男人和女人区别越来越小了，擦粉底抹香水，就连女人都没有他们打扮的精致。娘炮危机，审美跑偏，资本干的好事就是要助长这股哀气。娘炮的盛行，必将导致男人的社会责任感缺失，一个个浓妆粉末的背后，造就了无数个油华的肩膀，扛敲的少了，干体力活的少了，甚至看到酱油频道了，都得先去照一下镜子。男人娘炮的背后必将反向拖累女人。😊你在这个妈宝男的家庭里，必须成为一个合格的钢铁女汉子，否则你在他们眼里终将一无是处，这就是娘炮文化，对社会对家庭的危害。
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gender-nonconforming/effeminate male subculture referred to as “娘炮” (often meaning “sissy/effeminate men”). It treats this group as a central causal factor behind broader social and family decline, repeatedly contrasting “men” vs “women” and positioning “娘炮” as a deviation within the male group.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, it frames the group as a material/functional threat. The transcript claims “men’s social responsibility” will be lost, “less physical labor,” and that “even seeing soy sauce channels” requires checking mirrors—implying reduced productivity and capability. It also implies downstream harm to women via men’s reduced responsibility (e.g., “反向拖累女人”). The imagery includes a “no ‘娘炮’” sign and depictions of men in military contexts, suggesting reduced readiness/strength.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The video frames “娘炮” as a threat to traditional gender norms and social values (e.g., proper masculinity, family roles, “钢铁女汉子” expectations). It argues that aesthetics and grooming practices (makeup, perfume) represent “审美跑偏” and “资本干的好事,” portraying the subculture as culturally corrosive and morally/socially destabilizing (“对社会对家庭的危害”).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. It creates unease through alarmist language (“危机,” “危害,” “必将导致”), moral panic framing, and persuasive cause-effect claims. Visuals include a crossed-out “娘炮” symbol, comedic/derogatory cartoon-like depictions, and edited juxtaposition with military/serious imagery to imply weakness and incompetence. The tone is condemnatory and warning-oriented, with emphatic subtitles.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes equating effeminacy with weakness, vanity, lack of responsibility, and incompetence. Evidence is presented as: (1) grooming/aesthetic behaviors (makeup, perfume) are treated as proof of “哀气” and deviation; (2) “less physical labor/less strength” is asserted as a consequence; (3) men who are effeminate are portrayed as failing family duties and harming women. The “no ‘娘炮’” sign and the repeated claims about “镜子” and “扛敲的少了” function as pseudo-evidence.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The threat perception is used to justify exclusion and social punishment rather than direct physical violence. It prescribes that in a “妈宝男的家庭” one must become a “合格的钢铁女汉子” or be deemed worthless “在他们眼里终将一无是处,” implying social rejection and devaluation of the targeted group. The crossed-out “娘炮” messaging and “对社会对家庭的危害” framing support hostility through stigmatization and calls for conformity.

Title: 阴茎硬如钢，生姜加一物，在家就能治阳痿
Transcript: 🎼阴茎硬如刚，生姜加异物，在家就能治阳痿。今天给大家分享一个在家里就可以改善阳痿的小方子。好些朋友硬度不理想，总是中途疲软，甚至还出现无法勃起的情况。其实你们没有明白这一点，想要勃起迅速，而且持久就需要肾阳的推动，肾阳不足可能会导致肾经寒宁，使阴茎无法获得足够的血液灌注，从而出现勃起难、硬度差等问题。Yeah.🎼咱们取生姜赤勺切成片，放入开水煮5到10分钟，将浸泡过的茶过滤后使用，每天喝一点。这里面生姜具有解表散寒的作用，补足阳气，虚散寒气，让你的勃起迅速而且持久。如果你也经常受到这些困扰，可以点一个免费的小红心加关注。只要你是我的粉丝，打需要帮助，我教你恢复猛男巅峰状态。

Title: 母牛官方gun!
Transcript: 🎼吐槽造谣者视频给我过来，他们都想看你跌倒，所以你要稳稳的站着。还是麻醉我抑惑。盗版游戏胜诉，又一个被迷你玩毒害的孩子，相信了迷你世界的谣言，明明是我的世界胜诉了。好吧，这就是没有脑子的危害。评论区嘴巴干净点，骂我，我拉黑，这就是迷你尺子的素质。这种人见一个我喷一个。😊
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video does not depict a protected class (e.g., ethnicity, nationality, religion). It centers on an in-group/out-group dynamic around “迷你世界” (Mini World) vs “我的世界” (Minecraft) and “盗版游戏/造谣者/喷子” (piracy/rumor-mongers/harassers). The out-group is framed as people who spread rumors and “poison” children by believing them; this group is central to the message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: The video frames the out-group as a threat to children’s well-being/mental state and to the integrity of the gaming community. Evidence includes claims like “盗版游戏胜诉” and “又一个被迷你玩毒害的孩子” (a child harmed/poisoned by Mini World), plus “这就是没有脑子的危害” (harm caused by lack of judgment). It also implies reputational/community harm via “造谣者” and “评论区嘴巴干净点，骂我，我拉黑” (moderation/ban). No direct evidence of physical harm or resource/territory threat is shown.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, it frames a symbolic threat to values and norms: it portrays rumor-spreaders and “迷你尺子/迷你世界的谣言” as corrupting judgment and violating community standards (“评论区嘴巴干净点”). The “poisoning” language suggests a threat to morals/critical thinking and to the ‘right’ understanding of the dispute (which game “wins”).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort primarily through accusatory, confrontational tone and inflammatory labeling (“造谣者,” “毒害的孩子,” “没有脑子的危害,” “这种人见一个我喷一个”). Visuals include bold red/black stylized text and dramatic effects (e.g., explosive/impact-style imagery) that heighten agitation. Music/edits appear energetic and combative, reinforcing an adversarial mood.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype about the out-group: that they are gullible (“相信了…谣言”), lacking judgment (“没有脑子”), and harmful to children (“毒害”). It also implies that critics/rumor-mongers are low-quality participants who should be filtered out (“评论区嘴巴干净点…拉黑”). These are presented as justification/evidence for the speaker’s stance, though they are not supported with verifiable facts in the frames shown.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception leads to hostility in the form of targeted harassment and exclusionary moderation: “这种人见一个我喷一个” (I’ll attack/criticize them one by one) and “骂我，我拉黑” (if you insult me, I’ll block). The video does not explicitly call for violence, but it endorses aggressive verbal hostility and exclusion (blocking/targeted “spraying”) toward the out-group.

Title: 一些无意识的厌女词汇
Transcript: 🎼大哥大哥，你帮帮我好不好？哎呦，你可真是个大爷啊。大姐，你没事吧，阿妈，你有病吧。哦，你好有男友力好man啊，这一看就是女司机吧。知道你这种日系双容的精髓代表什么吗？娇妻能不能不要再服美艺了？大姐，你打扮的这么邋遢，你还是别出来丢人现眼了吧。我跟你说，我看她长相知道她不怎么样。😡🎼嗯，真是爱男又不自知。我感觉我之前是有点性运闹了。不过我现在意识到了我的问题，我打算改善我那些不好的地方，好好做自己。别，我们可不认可你这个精神男人，难道我们很需要你，你根本就不配有女性主义。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: 视频围绕“厌女/女性主义相关群体与女性”这一社会类别展开，核心信息反复指向女性主义者/女性（以及被指为“女司机/娇妻/精神男人”等的女性形象）。该群体在对话与字幕中被持续点名与评价，属于视频信息的中心对象。
itt_response.realistic_threat: 未见将该群体直接框定为对现实安全、生命、资源或具体岗位的物质威胁。画面与台词主要是人身评价、价值争论与性别刻板印象，并未提供可验证的“会造成实际损害”的证据（如暴力、犯罪、抢占资源等）。
itt_response.symbolic_threat: 存在较强的象征性威胁叙事：视频通过“你不配有女性主义”“我们可不认可你这个精神男人”“别出来丢人现眼”“你根本就不配”等表达，将女性主义/女性相关立场视为对既有性别秩序与价值体系的挑战。字幕还出现“女性主义是所有人的…希望不要成为某些人的武器”等指向，暗示其会破坏/挪用道德与社会规范。
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: 通过讽刺、对抗式语气与负面称呼制造不适感：使用愤怒/嘲讽的口吻（如“你有病吧”“丢人现眼”“不怎么样”）、快节奏的对话式剪辑与字幕强调（如“*不认可”“*不许可打扮/不许可素颜”等），并配合带情绪的音乐与反复强调的结论性字幕，营造对“女性主义/女性”立场的警惕与排斥情绪。
itt_response.stereotype_support: 强化多种负面刻板印象并以“证据”形式呈现：例如将女性与“女司机/日系双容/娇妻/服美役/邋遢/不怎么样/不自知/精神男人”等标签绑定；将其外貌与能力/价值做因果关联（“看她长相知道她不怎么样”“打扮邋遢所以别出来丢人现眼”）；并将“爱男又不自知”“性运闹/性运问题”之类表述作为其“应被纠正”的依据。
itt_response.hostility_prescription: 累积的威胁感与否定性叙事指向排斥与贬损，而非直接号召暴力。视频通过“我们可不认可”“你根本不配”“别出来丢人现眼”“不许可打扮/不许可素颜”等措辞，形成对该群体的排除性立场与羞辱性规训，可能鼓励社群层面的敌意与边缘化。

  "hostility_prescription": "累积的威胁感与否定性叙事指向排斥与贬损，而非直接号召暴力。视频通过“我们可不认可”“你根本不配”“别出来丢人现眼”“不许可打扮/不许可素颜”等措辞，形成对该群体的排除性立场与羞辱性规训，可能鼓励社群层面的敌意与边缘化。"
}

Title: 阴茎延长手术
Transcript: 有的兄弟想把自己的钉钉延长，结果呢就到专科去医院，建议他通过手术来延长他的钉钉。而实际上，手术到底效果怎么样呢？其实要想通过手术延长钉钉，需要把钉钉的两条浅身悬韧带切开。而这两根韧带是支撑命根子起立并翘起的重要韧带，切断之后，把埋藏在体内的钉钉拉出来，看上去是延长了。而实际上，钉钉起立时，它是不能上翘的，耷拉的像一根丝过一样。爱的鼓掌时，也需要用手扶着对准目标才能放入，而且体验感相当差。良一解难题，关注我。

Title: 美女情迷健身教练，丈夫车内抓奸：你不要发朋友圈
Transcript: 🎼来罗教练，别怕我，什么意思啊？你自己你自己老婆电话报过来，你给我滚开。😡那你能不能你为人妻为人母，两个孩子的妈妈，对吧？今天两个小孩都不在，对吧？出去跟男的搞一搞，对吧？你对得起我对得起，全都是孩子，你对得起爸爸妈妈吧，就这件事情。😊🎼好吧，你们就这嘛好的好吧。

itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat to jobs, physical safety, health, or resources is clearly depicted. The 'threat' is primarily relational (marital trust/family stability). Evidence: the husband confronts the wife and accuses her of going out with another man; there is no clear depiction of violence or resource deprivation.

Evidence: dialogue accusing her of '出去跟男的搞一搞' and '你对得起我对得起，全都是孩子' plus the emphasis on responsibility to children and parents; on-screen text like '不要发朋友圈' suggests reputational/moral containment.

Title: 广州一女子地铁吃东西，乘客劝阻反被怼：你个泼妇，摆地摊都不如
Transcript: 🎼吃东西这你，我现在就把网挂上去，你你你那个，这人真霸道。地踢到人还不道歉，你已经违反地铁明规定了，怎么大把人吃大白人是大把人违法，饺子现在大关局什么是一碗没了吗？我吃啊，你坐在旁大把人呀，关么你。我现在就可以报警，把你行政拘留，你信不信你要是在这，你就报啊。
Label: Offensive

The social group is not an identity group (e.g., ethnicity/religion); it is a person framed as a disruptive “type” (e.g., “泼妇/霸道” in the title/subtitles). This group is highly central because the narrative focuses on her behavior and the conflict with other passengers.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat to a collective group’s jobs, safety, health, or resources is established. The conflict is about etiquette/rules on subway eating and alleged noncompliance (e.g., “违反地铁明规定,” “报警/行政拘留”). Any “threat” is interpersonal (argument escalation) rather than a systemic threat posed by an identity group.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video implies a moral/behavioral threat to shared norms (public conduct rules, consideration for others). Evidence includes repeated claims that she violates subway regulations and is “霸道/泼妇,” and the framing that her actions are unacceptable to the community’s standards of conduct.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease is created through an accusatory, confrontational tone and escalation cues (threats of reporting/arrest, insistence she is wrong). Editing shows close conversational confrontation and on-screen captions emphasizing wrongdoing. However, the discomfort is directed at the individual’s behavior, not at an outgroup identity.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Negative behavioral stereotypes are reinforced: the person is characterized as “泼妇” (a hostile/irrational shrew) and “霸道” (domineering), with the implication that she is unreasonable and disrespectful. The captions treat these labels as explanatory evidence for the conflict (i.e., her character explains the dispute).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception supports punitive/hostile responses toward the individual (e.g., calling police, administrative detention). It does not clearly endorse violence or exclusion of a protected identity group, but it does legitimize coercive/legal punishment against the depicted person.

Title: 台铁车站屏幕突现“老巫婆窜访台湾...伟大华夏终将统一”等字样
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a group referred to in on-screen text as “老巫婆” (a derogatory label) in the context of “窜访台湾” (visiting/roaming around Taiwan). The target is not clearly defined as a specific ethnicity/nation in the frames, but it is treated as a particular political/identity figure or associated group. This group is highly central because the headline text repeatedly foregrounds it and links it to broader claims about Taiwan and “统一”.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, the video implies a material/real-world threat, though evidence is largely textual rather than shown. On-screen captions claim that the “screen” appearance indicates an event and that it is “对祖国主权的严重挑衅” (a serious provocation to the motherland’s sovereignty). It also references “台铁车站屏幕突现” and suggests an organized intrusion/operation (“被人侵/被入侵” style wording appears in captions). The threat is framed as interference with sovereignty/territory and potentially public systems (rail station screens).
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The captions explicitly frame the target as a challenge to sovereignty (“主权”) and as part of a political narrative about Taiwan (“伟大华夏终将统一”). The repeated framing of the target’s visit as provocation suggests a threat to national identity and political legitimacy/values rather than only physical harm.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates unease through sensational, accusatory headline text (“老巫婆窜访台湾…”) and repeated emphasis across frames. It uses a news-like montage of public infrastructure (train station hall, platform, and large screens) combined with bold yellow/red overlay text and a dramatic framing (“突现/被入侵/挑衅”). The editing repeats the same claim, reinforcing alarm and suspicion.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video invokes a negative stereotype via the derogatory term “老巫婆” (witch/old witch), presenting the target as inherently malicious or corrupt. It treats the mere appearance of the message on public screens as proof of wrongdoing and provocation, using the on-screen text as “evidence” rather than substantiating facts.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception is used to justify antagonistic political framing (provocation to sovereignty; narrative toward “统一”). While the frames do not show direct calls for physical violence, the content supports exclusionary/hostile attitudes by dehumanizing labeling (“老巫婆”) and by portraying the target as an enemy actor whose actions warrant condemnation and opposition.

Title: 当理科班新来男同学，男女生的反应大相径庭：这位女同学请收敛
Transcript: 🎼当理科班新来了一名男生，男生的表情女生的表情。是得我看见到处是阳光，快乐在城市上空飘扬，醒是袭来的像梦一样，让我暖样。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on gender groups in a classroom context—specifically a newly arrived male student and the reactions of female students. The male student is treated as the focal “out-group” relative to the female students’ responses, but the framing is about gender dynamics rather than a protected class like race/ethnicity/religion.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not depict the male student as posing a material threat to safety, health, jobs, or resources. The scenes show a teacher/lecture setting and students reacting (smiling, covering mouths, looking surprised), without any concrete harm or danger.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Weak/indirect. The captions suggest that the male student’s presence triggers different reactions and implies discomfort or “should be restrained” behavior (e.g., text like “这位女同学请收敛,” and “男生表情/女生表情”). This is more about social norms/behavior expectations than about attacking values, religion, or a way of life.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes, mild discomfort is implied. The editing uses reaction shots and on-screen text to highlight female students’ surprised/embarrassed expressions, aiming to create a humorous/awkward unease about how the male student affects the classroom social atmosphere. The tone appears playful rather than fearful, with no threatening imagery.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Some gender-based stereotypes are reinforced: it implies that male presence leads to noticeable behavioral/affective reactions from females, and that female reactions are a key “evidence” of the male student’s disruptive social impact. However, it does not present explicit derogatory slurs or extreme negative traits; it relies on observational humor and reaction framing.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No clear endorsement of exclusion or harm. While the text includes a “please restrain” style admonition, the overall content is not advocating violence or systematic hostility; it presents a classroom social reaction as a comedic narrative.

Title: 男孩余生估计都要在自卑中度过了"双性人
Transcript: 🎼我爱着你。😊寄给你一的梦，辜苦我的好意，我爱着留注所以抓住你眼睛无限离气。🎼就让你万梦半身，像我的玫瑰曾经。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on intersex people ("双性人"), depicting a character undergoing a medical/forensic-style examination and discussing outcomes related to being intersex. This group is central to the narrative and message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown. The scenes depict medical testing (e.g., examination devices, lab/clinic setting) and a claim about gender markers being removed/changed, but there is no evidence that intersex people pose threats to safety, jobs, health (as a group), resources, or territory.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video implies a symbolic threat to gender norms/identity categories. It frames intersex status as something that disrupts expected male/female classification (e.g., "结果出来男孩是双性人" and later references to removing male gender markers). This suggests a threat to conventional moral/social order around gender.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease is created through a clinical, investigative tone and visual style (blue/green color grading, tense examination imagery, subtitles emphasizing results and procedures). The editing and narration emphasize shock/abnormality and consequences, which can heighten discomfort about intersex identity.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative framing that intersex is an abnormal condition requiring correction/removal of gender markers, implying that intersex identity is inherently problematic or shame-inducing. The title text and dialogue suggest the character will live in self-inferiority, aligning with stigma-based stereotypes (intersex as defective/tragic).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The video does not explicitly call for violence or exclusion. However, by portraying intersex as something to be medically altered/removed and emphasizing shame/self-inferiority, it implicitly supports stigmatizing attitudes rather than acceptance.

Title: 阴茎勃起更有劲，房事20分钟以上
Transcript: 🎼 白开水里加一物，阴茎勃起来更有劲，尝试呢20分钟以上。如果你也想延长20分钟以上，硬度像年轻的时候坚挺有力。这个方法呢也许真的适合你。如果你从小就用手过多，现在欲望强容易勃茧，每次呢两个人甜蜜时刻，3分钟不到，甚至十几秒，不用再焦虑自卑了，这个方法呢常常用于改善气血不足，肾虚乏力，中途疲软，勃气缓慢，半都不扣。🎼情况不管你的情况是三年还是5年，这个方法呢，经过辨证加减都能起到作用。用过的人也反映了时间有延长，硬度呢也比以前好了很多。我是赵德荣医生，如果你需要关注我，点我头像进来，给我留言数字一，我来帮你解决难言之隐。
Label: Normal

The “evidence” is not factual; it is implied by the slur in the title and the comedic framing rather than by behavior shown in the video.

Therefore, accumulated threat perception does not appear to translate into hostility or harm.

Title: 正常男性阴茎多长算正常的
Transcript: 🎼正常男性阴茎多长算正常的？正常女性阴道的平均长度是7到12厘米。寿潮先刺激的时候呢，要延伸到16厘米。如果男性太长了，反而会造成疼痛不适的感觉，甚至还会出现阴道撕裂、大出血，女性阴道最敏感的神经末梢，几乎都分布在靠外的3分之1。我国男性平均勃起长度是12厘米。所以呢一味的追求长度其实没啥意义，只要达到平均水平就可以了。对于女性而言呢，一次满意的身体互动硬度的要求高于长度。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses sex anatomy and sexual function, focusing on gendered groups: men (penis length) and women (vaginal length/sensitivity). These groups are central to the message because the guidance is framed as “normal” ranges and risks for each sex during intercourse.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No intergroup threat to jobs, territory, or resources is presented. However, it does frame a health/safety risk related to sexual activity: if a man is “too long,” it may cause pain, vaginal tearing, and heavy bleeding. The evidence is presented as medical/physiological claims (e.g., distribution of sensitive nerve endings in the outer third).
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No symbolic threat to culture, religion, morals, or way of life is evident. The content is primarily informational/medical about anatomy and sexual outcomes rather than value-based or cultural condemnation.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort/concern about sexual harm by emphasizing negative outcomes (pain, tearing, heavy bleeding) and warning against “one-sided pursuit of length.” Means include assertive instructional tone, on-screen text highlighting risks, and explanatory narration; imagery remains a doctor speaking in a clinical setting.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a gendered stereotype that male sexual performance is primarily evaluated by penis length and that women’s sexual experience is determined by vaginal length/sensitivity. It presents these as quasi-medical “evidence” (average lengths, nerve distribution) to justify the claim that chasing length is unnecessary and that excessive length can be harmful.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No endorsement of exclusion, hatred, or harm toward any group is present. The guidance discourages excessive length-seeking and implies safer sexual interaction, not hostility toward men or women.

Title: 小心！你有可能正处在这种隐藏性很强的精神虐待中
Transcript: 🎼小心，你很有可能正处在隐藏性很强的精神虐待中，他们从来都不会跟你好好说话，一遇到问题或矛盾，就会主动逃避，不问不管不关心，不理睬，拒绝沟通，甚至动不动，还会拉黑删除。生气后从不考虑你的感受，玩消失、冷战，忽视你的存在。我行我素是他们的常态。好像错误的根源全来自于你。在这类人眼中，他们才是那个付出更多对你好的人，你才需要做的更好。如果你正处在这种冷暴力沟通。开始感觉到疲胃、情绪压抑，请明确你的边界在哪里，告诉对方正确表达自己的诉求，否则请尽快远离。我们是雷观察所，关注我，一想要生存。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses a relationship partner/“this kind of person” characterized by covert psychological abuse and cold-shouldering. It is not tied to a protected social group (e.g., race, religion, nationality), but it centralizes a stigmatized interpersonal role (“they/that person”) as the main subject of warning.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a health/psychological sense: it claims the person’s behavior causes emotional suppression, fatigue, and “psychological abuse,” and includes tactics like blocking/deleting, ignoring, and refusing communication. Evidence shown is primarily behavioral descriptions in on-screen text and narration rather than physical danger.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Partially. The video frames the target as violating relational norms/values of care and communication (e.g., “never talk properly,” “don’t consider your feelings,” “refuse communication,” “cold war,” “as if the root of wrong comes from you”). It also implies moral inversion: the abuser is portrayed as the one who “pays more,” while the viewer must do better.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. It uses a warning tone (“be careful”), emotionally loaded language (fatigue, suppressed emotions), and instructional urgency (“set boundaries… or leave”). Imagery includes people wearing animal masks and a stylized/ominous overlay text (e.g., “cold violence communication”), plus editing that emphasizes the message with captions and a dramatic/serious framing.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype about a certain interpersonal type: that they are avoidant, indifferent, manipulative (blocking/deleting), and blame the other party for problems. The “evidence” is presented as a pattern of behaviors treated as diagnostic of covert psychological abuse, rather than as situational possibilities.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The video does not advocate violence or direct harm, but it does prescribe exclusion/avoidance: “start setting boundaries… otherwise quickly distance yourself.” This is a form of relational hostility/exclusion based on threat perception (treating the target as unsafe and recommending separation).

itt_response.target_salience: The video targets a social group of “fans”/online followers (addressed as “you们”), portraying them as a distinct in-group/out-group. Their presence is central to the message because the speaker directly addresses them with repeated insults and accusations.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a non-physical but material sense: the speaker claims the group is “地沟里的巨/又臭又恶心” and that they “会恶心人” (make people sick/disgusting), implying harm to others’ well-being and social environment. The evidence is the direct verbal framing of them as contaminating/repulsive and as doing harmful behavior “一天到晚” online.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The group is framed as violating moral/social norms and being contemptible: they are described as disgusting, malicious, and only capable of online harassment (“除了在网上巴拉巴拉的会恶心人，你们还会干啥呢？”). This positions them as a threat to acceptable conduct/values rather than to a specific religion or culture.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The tone is aggressive and contemptuous (angry delivery, insulting language). The editing/format shows close-up talking-head footage with emphatic delivery, and the overall affect is hostile, designed to provoke discomfort and anger toward the addressed group.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces stereotypes of online fans as parasitic/filthy and as engaging in constant, empty online behavior that harms others. The “地沟里” (sewer/filth) metaphor and “又臭又恶心” (stinking/disgusting) function as pseudo-evidence for their supposed moral and social unworthiness.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception supports hostility and dehumanizing exclusion (treating the group as disgusting “sewer” creatures). While it does not explicitly call for physical violence in the provided transcript, it endorses strong verbal hostility and social rejection toward the targeted fans.

Title: 分手10年后，郭富城脱口而出的一句“破鞋”，一把扯下熊黛林的遮羞布
Transcript: 🎼分手十年后，看到熊黛林极尽风骚的卖弄身材，才知道为何郭富城会讽刺他是破切。模特出身的熊黛林身材不是一般的好，靠着先天的优势，走起性感路线来，十分的得心应手，再一次拍摄时，认识了天王郭富城开启了7年的情感纠葛。熊黛林靠着天王嫂的头衔，身价一路飞涨。而郭富城认为有头衔就够，不仅不愿意花钱，还不肯公开两人的关系，甚至在分手后在节目中暗抚，表示和。熊黛林只是玩玩，并不会取靠手段上位的你一时间，熊黛林颜面尽失。好在他如今嫁入豪门，你对此有什么想法？
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a specific woman, 熊黛林 (Guan Dailin), and uses her as the focal point for the narrative’s claims. It also implicitly targets women who are portrayed as using sexuality/status for social climbing (a gendered social group/category rather than an ethnicity or religion). Her centrality is high: the transcript and on-screen captions repeatedly discuss her behavior, reputation, and relationship dynamics with 郭富城.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat to jobs, physical safety, or resources is shown in the frames. The “threat” is framed more as reputational/social harm (e.g., “颜面尽失,” “玩玩,” “靠手段上位”) rather than concrete danger. Evidence: the content is largely interviews/appearances and commentary about relationships and status, not actions that endanger others.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, the video frames the target as a moral/cultural threat—specifically to norms of romance, honesty, and “proper” conduct. Evidence includes the use of derogatory sexualized language (e.g., “破鞋/破切” in the title/transcript) and claims that she “uses” sexuality and “methods” to “climb” into status (“靠手段上位,” “天王嫂的头衔，身价一路飞涨”). This positions her as violating perceived moral standards.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort and moral judgment through sensational framing and derogatory captions. Means: inflammatory text overlays, a narrative tone of scandal/embarrassment, and editing that pairs public appearances with accusatory commentary. The imagery is mostly glamorous/posed (interview and event scenes), but the captions interpret it as “selling sex” or “shamelessness,” producing unease rather than fear of physical harm.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes about women—particularly the stereotype that a woman who presents as sexually confident or uses attractiveness/status is promiscuous, manipulative, and untrustworthy. Evidence: repeated emphasis on “极尽风骚的卖弄身材,” “玩玩,” and “靠手段上位,” plus the explicit slur “破鞋,” presented as justification for the negative characterization.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception is used to justify social condemnation and reputational exclusion rather than direct calls for violence. Evidence: the narrative culminates in humiliation (“颜面尽失”) and implies she should be viewed as illegitimate/undeserving of status (“不会取靠手段上位的你”). This supports hostility in the form of stigmatization and rejection.

Title: 男子脚被蜱虫叮咬后睾丸肿胀，几天后命丧黄泉
Transcript: 这个就啊这个地方刚刚开始的时候就是非常的痛，因为是那个什么蜘蛛啊，不蜘蛛啊，或者是个蜂啊，疯子蛰的，以为只是普通的虫子叮了，一家人并未放在心上，可是几天之后情况却越来越严重，两个腿包括个下面这个睾丸全部肿的很厉害，两个腿肿得像电线杆一样。见状，孙大姐连忙将丈夫送到医院，可是为时已晚。几天之后，丈夫撒手西去。而经过检查，让丈夫送命的小虫子就是夏天常见的一种寄生虫蜱虫。而由于蜱虫多生活在野外。😊市当中相对少见，因此，如果要到野外游玩，一定要做好防护工作。

Transcript: 我想起来我都是捡了一条命。因香港大医院他是学做这些的，都是这个是人医生嘛，也是在在在那些，我看也是比较高档的地方。懂不对怎办啊，对，就会所就会所来的，我做完之后是住酒店的，没有在没不看手，哪一手试试。有手术什么做完手术之后，不是自己我朋友和我一起吗？去住是住在酒店里面，也没有引流馆，什么都没有。可能去朋友就是医托，女朋友他自己也住了，他没做怎么办？女朋友他自己就是医托，你那个估计这种不叫朋友吧，后然我去原。没没没没有跟他联系了，是好亲切，我我我现在写个。😊

The setting (hospital/clinic vs. hotel/“会所”) is used to imply unsafe conditions and exploitation.

The video treats the protagonist’s account as evidence that such actors are inherently untrustworthy and exploit patients.

Title: 在公海开妓院算不算违法
Transcript: 前几天有个学生问我，我当时震惊了，他说，老师，我想在公海开一个妓院，你说构成犯罪吗？我说你的脑洞有点大，这妥妥的构成犯罪。第一，你在公海怎么开妓院，难道在海上开吗？那会淹死的，所以你肯定得在一个轮船上开吧。那于是这个轮船就属于什么？就属于我国领土。他说老师，那我不登记在中国不就行了吗？我说算你狠，那就不按属地管了，按什么来管属人，因为你是哪个国家的人？你是中国人，他说那怎么办？那怎么开能够不追究刑事责任呢？或说你不开不就得了吗？😡
Label: Normal

Transcript: 🎼我我觉得我演的你是个方面的啊，哪方面什么哪一方面你说公和。😊就是一和0，我那那那要看角色需要了，但是兽比较好演吧，兽比较好模仿，公比较难演公可能。🎼宫可能他外表看着不不会太太有标志性的一些，他可能内心嗯我不是太拍，我还不太了解他们的世界啊。但是呃如果要演的话，我我是我是不不会介意。
