Title: 傻逼家长
Transcript: 花百零十银行联嘅期间嘅金融机构成为基术投资者啦，包括中银香港花旗东方汇理汇丰同埋渣价总资产咧超过七万亿美元。将为新兴市场建立绿色平台，推动可持续经济发展所需嘅基建同商业解决方案嘅融资活动。银行呢经鼓励客户采用绿色策略推广绿色行等等，适放新嘅商机呈现绿色经费转型，欢迎睇翻啦，而家本港大陆海有控制机构咧都系中资企业啦，被问到，系加息周期之后会唔会影响时咧喺再话同埋利岸嘅债券市场啊，金管局嘅副总裁刘彦彬就话咧，而家香港嘅利岸市场咧正系稳定收咗。

Title: 体操兵操
Transcript: 🎼男儿立志起高，年纪不光强，高个弟烈手相招来做兵草尽管只挥。北风向众旗迎面飘飘，嘟嘟嘟咚，一走日日头，桃高身体好。向外大仗立功劳，男儿织旗高。🎼男儿立志祈高，年纪不方向，个个粒立手向党来做兵对抗，凭刻拿着智挥到生兵方向跑，总是一面飘。咚嘟嘟咚咚锵天上开草，日日好，曹操身体好，向来上上的红劳，男儿织旗高。😊

Title: 与男黑人夜店贴身热舞，私教混乱献身上位，黄毅清讽刺她就是个老鸨
Transcript: 🎼与男黑人夜店贴身肉，私教混乱，现身上位。黄奕清讽刺他就是个牢鸨。马苏的段位很高，他不靠潜规则，而是和有钱有势的男人恋爱，甚至还抢闺蜜的墙角。当时马苏没考进北影，闺蜜带男友看她。这一看完了把男友搭进去了。这位富二代就是范金涛，不仅家里有钱，还有人脉地位。马苏就起了心思，恰巧范金涛看上她了，两人添加了联系方式传情，范金涛让老爸将马苏安排进了北影，可马苏认识孔令辉后。就转头把男友甩了，与孔令辉交往后，马苏还是不安分玩剧组夫妻，与杜淳进酒店和吴奇隆牵手。黄奕清更是爆料，马苏就是个拉皮条的老鸨。对此大家觉得呢？
Label: Hateful

Title: 河北一38岁巨婴啃老族，在家啃了父母整整3年....
Transcript: 🎼河北一38岁巨婴啃老族，在家啃了父母整整3年，后来父母实在忍受不了他的百烂人生，一怒之下叫来了电视台的调解员来开导他。谁知大哥竟然说哥家吃喝拉发售，看的书瞧治电视吃喝享受我了，现在就吃喝得好了，还哪里不是？这觉悟真的人间清醒没错了，结果就在采访完没多久，大哥所在的村子竟然迎来了拆迁，最后赔了8000多万，这下好了，他可以更加名正言顺的躺平了。不是我说同样是MPC他。有特权，老天爷，你果然不是我的爷。😊

The narrative treats their behavior as evidence of broader character failure (“百烂人生,” “没错了,” “特权”).

Title: 博德之门3上线倒计时！观看twitch就能免费领取基佬紫外观！速来！
Transcript: ？各位小伙伴们好呀，为了庆祝博德之门3即将上线，官方在towitch开启了调堡活动，只需要在8月3日到17日在towitch观看足够的时间就能获取以上奖励。白嫖这种事怎么能少了我呢？今天就给大家分享一下账号的绑定方法和领取方法，绑定和观看tow都需要使用加速。这里我用的是爆喵加速器，搜索博德之门3并加速，然后点击towitch掉堡绑定入口，进入进入绑定页面后，点击steam登录。如。我是在gog购买游戏的玩家，点击goug登录，登录自己的steam账号进行授权，登录成功后会提示你创建一下游戏账号，也就是拉瑞安账号，创建成功后会提示成功绑定steam账号，点击twitch进行连接，登录自己的twitch账号，点击授权。😊绑定成功提示，8月3日前往towitch指定直播间进行观看，即可领取奖励。

Title: 18岁男孩约47岁失足妇女约会
Transcript: 🎼super idol的笑容都没你的甜，8月正午的阳光，都没你耀眼，热爱一把里无度的你滴滴青春的泉流水。你不知道你有多可爱，跌倒后会傻笑着再站起来。你从来都不轻言失败，对梦想的执着一直不曾感改。🎼很安心，当你对我说。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a romantic/sexual encounter narrative involving an 18-year-old male and a ~47-year-old woman (described as a “失足妇女,” i.e., a sex worker/“fallen woman”). This older woman is the primary social group being discussed/depicted, with her identity and alleged occupation presented as central to the story’s meaning.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, but indirectly and in a non-physical way. The captions and storyline emphasize alleged illegal/regulated conduct (e.g., “被警方处以10天的行政拘留,” “借口去吃宵夜却不再回来,” “两人约好在宾馆见面,” and payment/WeChat transaction screenshots). This frames the group as a threat to public order/legal compliance and potentially safety through criminal/regulated activity, though there is no clear evidence of direct violence or physical harm in the shown frames.

The framing uses moralized language (“失足妇女,” “被警方…行政拘留,” and the narrative of deception/arrangement in a hotel) to portray the group as violating social morals and norms. The implied threat is to conventional values (sexual propriety, legality, and trustworthiness) rather than to culture or religion.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort through sensational, accusatory captions, CCTV-style footage, and chat/payment overlays that suggest wrongdoing and deception. The editing style (multiple panels, bold yellow/red text, and emphasis on police action and money transfer) heightens suspicion and moral alarm. Music appears romantic/lyrical in the transcript, but the dominant effect is investigative/accusatory due to the overlays and law-enforcement references.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes that sex workers/“fallen women” are deceptive, transactional, and morally corrupt—e.g., the woman is depicted as arranging meetings in a hotel, using excuses, and being subject to police administrative detention. The “evidence” presented is primarily CCTV footage plus text overlays and payment/chat screenshots, which are used to substantiate the moral/legal claims.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The content does not explicitly call for violence, but it supports exclusionary/disciplinary attitudes by emphasizing police punishment and portraying the group as inherently problematic. The accumulated threat perception can reasonably lead to endorsing punitive treatment, social stigma, or removal from acceptable social spaces (e.g., viewing the group as deserving of legal/administrative crackdown).

Title: 《关于妈宝》
Transcript: 当我问妈妈，妈，你说同样都是妈宝，为什么妈宝女就是褒好意思，妈宝妈就是贬义词呢？妈宝女是我妈很好，所以我要对我妈好。妈宝男是我妈养我不容易，所以你要对我妈好，还有妈宝妈，她妈是怎么想的呢？哥儿媳妇吃醋，我儿子必须跟我最好。妈宝女她妈是希望你婿对自己女儿好，只要你对我姑娘好，那我对你比对我姑娘还好。😡
Label: Normal

itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not depict material threats such as violence, safety hazards, loss of jobs, or resource/territory conflict. The “threat” is framed socially (family roles, jealousy, favoritism) rather than as a concrete physical or economic danger.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a mild social-moral sense. It implies that different “妈宝” types are judged differently (one treated as positive, another as derogatory), and it contrasts expected moral/familial norms (who should prioritize whom, fairness between spouse and in-laws). The tension is about values of proper family conduct and relational boundaries.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some. The tone includes sarcasm/anger (e.g., an emoji/angry caption style and rhetorical questioning) and uses confrontational dialogue about jealousy and favoritism. However, the discomfort is more comedic/argumentative than fear-based; there is no imagery of danger.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces negative stereotypes about “妈宝” as a pattern of excessive dependence or biased attachment that disrupts healthy family/partner relationships. It suggests that “妈宝” behavior leads to unfairness (e.g., prioritizing one’s mother over spouse/partner, causing jealousy) and that different genders/roles are socially evaluated inconsistently.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No clear endorsement of exclusion or harm. The accumulated perception appears to function as social criticism and admonition about family dynamics (who should treat whom properly), not as a call to attack or exclude the group.

Title: 古代的妓女叫什么，你一定不知道
Transcript: 长点知识。🎼现在有很多的女生都喜欢叫自己为小仙女，甚至有小仙女是喝露水的仙女怎么可能会拉等娱乐的话语，但是你知道吗？在古代，尤其是在唐代，人们把妓女叫做仙，而把妓女生活的妓怨，叫做脱离尘世的仙境。如果你穿越到唐朝叫自己小仙女，一定会惹人唾弃，遭来异样的目光。嗯，又长了点知识。
Label: Normal

Title: 伶牙俐齿，言语刻薄，高傲的女相
Transcript: 女主眼尾上吊，媚眼角尖，缺乏女性温柔，不会照顾人，并且也是克夫的面相之一。这种眼相具有高傲不可一世的性格特点，并且强势和要强的性格特点也是不利感情运势的。且卧蚕泛黑，需注意休息。子女宫若长期泛黑，会影响身体健康跟子女缘分。好在鼻头有肉，财运不错。但嘴唇较薄，能说会道，伶牙俐齿，而且说话并不会让人感觉舒服，言语一般都比较刻薄，很容易伤人心。
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a woman (female subject) and attributes her personality/behavior and life outcomes (relationships, health, “children fate,” wealth) based on facial features. The “group” is not an ethnic/religious group; it is gendered/sex-based stereotyping about women, with the woman depicted as the primary subject of the message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat to safety, jobs, or territory is shown. However, it claims potential harm in interpersonal and health domains: it says her traits indicate she lacks “female warmth,” “won’t take care of people,” and that “speaking is not comfortable” and is “easy to hurt hearts,” plus claims health impacts (e.g., “need to rest,” “affects body health”). These are framed as personal/relational risks rather than concrete external threats.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: It frames the woman’s traits as a threat to interpersonal values/relational norms—e.g., warmth, care, and considerate communication. The transcript repeatedly characterizes her as “arrogant,” “strong,” “not caring,” and “speaking is harsh/mean,” implying she violates expected moral/social conduct in relationships.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The video uses a fortune-telling/physiognomy tone with negative predictions (e.g., “unfavorable relationship,” “hurts people’s hearts,” “needs rest,” “affects children fate”). Visual emphasis includes zoomed facial regions (eyes, under-eye area, mouth) with on-screen text like “刻薄” (sharp/mean), “不利感情运势,” and “影响身体健康,” creating discomfort and suspicion toward the depicted woman’s character.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces gendered negative stereotypes: women are portrayed as lacking warmth and care, being arrogant/overbearing, and using speech to be hurtful (“伶牙俐齿,” “刻薄,” “很容易伤人心”). It presents physiognomy as “evidence” by mapping facial features to personality and fate (e.g., “克夫,” “高傲不可一世,” “强势要强,” “言语刻薄”).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The content does not explicitly call for violence or exclusion. However, it implicitly endorses social distrust/avoidance by portraying the woman as harmful to relationships and emotional well-being (“easy to hurt hearts,” “not comfortable to listen to,” “unfavorable relationship”). This can function as a mild hostility/avoidance prescription toward the gendered subject as characterized.

Title: 女性的乳房是完全对称的吗?
Transcript: 女性的乳房是完全对称的吗？🎼女性的乳房就应该是完全对称的吗？答案是否定的，对于正常女性来说，80%的女性都会关注到自己的乳房有或多或少的差别。对于一些比较极端的案例来说，我们的乳房大小甚至可能插到一个罩杯。如果考虑到乳头乳晕的形状等等，有超过88%的女性均抱怨过自己的乳房是有明显差别的，所以这是一个正常现象，请妹子们不要太过焦虑。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses women’s bodies—specifically breast symmetry and perceived differences. Women (as a gender group) are central to the message, with the content framed as general information for “normal women” and “girls/women” (“请妹子们不要太过焦虑”).
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame women as a material threat to jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory. It presents breast asymmetry as a common, non-dangerous, normal phenomenon and does not suggest harm, danger, or competition.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. There is no framing of women (or any subgroup) as threatening cultural values, religion, morals, or a way of life. The message is corrective/educational: asymmetry is normal and should not cause excessive anxiety.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes, mild discomfort is induced, but it is self-directed rather than intergroup-directed. The video uses attention-grabbing text overlays about asymmetry (“女性的乳房就应该是完全对称的吗？”, “80%的女性…关注…差别”, “超过88%的女性均抱怨…明显差别”) and a reassuring tone (“所以这是一个正常现象，请妹子们不要太过焦虑”). Imagery is non-violent and clinical/educational (people in medical scrubs), with editing emphasizing statistics and the topic.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a common appearance-focused stereotype that women are expected to have “perfect” symmetry and that many women worry/complain about breast differences. However, it does not present women as inherently inferior or dangerous; it uses survey-like percentages as evidence that such concerns are widespread and normal.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. The accumulated threat perception does not lead to exclusion, hostility, or harm toward women. The explicit prescription is reassurance and reduced anxiety (“不要太过焦虑”), not targeting or attacking any group.

Title: 微博惊现逆天小仙女
Transcript: 🎼怎么演唱会穿婚纱也会有人破防啊，有许多粉丝穿着婚纱去看王源演唱会，这原本是一件很浪漫的事儿，却有很多人破防了。嫁给了自己的青春之后是不是算二婚，看他们以后还好意思要彩礼吗？那你们女生是不是算精神出轨，甚至上升到了人身攻击，冒充女生将婚纱挂在了二手网站上。王源演唱会穿过的婚纱哟。花叉L的400斤的小仙女可以穿哦，有没有种可能，那只是一件婚纱，不是一件球服，穿上婚纱是自由的选择，不该只是再交换一个女生的所有权。😊
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on “女生/小仙女/穿婚纱的粉丝” (women/female fans who wear wedding dresses to a concert). Their presence is central to the narrative, which focuses on why some people “破防” (get triggered) and how these women are judged.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown. The frames depict concert attendance and people wearing wedding dresses; there is no evidence of threats to safety, jobs, health, or physical resources. The only “evidence” offered is social backlash (e.g., accusations of “二婚/精神出轨/冒充女生挂二手”).
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, the video frames a symbolic threat to social norms and gender/moral expectations. It implies that women who wear wedding dresses are violating norms about marriage/sexual propriety and “ownership” of women (“交换一个女生的所有权”), and it discusses moral condemnation (e.g., “精神出轨,” “人身攻击,” “冒充女生”). The threat is about values/roles rather than physical harm.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort by highlighting online outrage and “破防” reactions, using a confrontational commentary style and overlay text about people being triggered and escalating to personal attacks. Imagery includes crowds at a concert and wedding-dress visuals, while the editing/overlays emphasize controversy rather than calm celebration.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It invokes gendered stereotypes and moralizing narratives: women/female fans are treated as potentially “二婚” or “精神出轨,” and are accused of deception (“冒充女生将婚纱挂在二手网站上”). These claims are presented as explanations for why others react, reinforcing a stereotype that women’s behavior is subject to sexual/marital moral scrutiny.

However, it does legitimize hostility through moral condemnation and social exclusion logic (e.g., questioning whether they “还好意思要彩礼,” implying they should be judged/denied legitimacy). The video also contains a counterpoint (“穿上婚纱是自由的选择…不该只是再交换一个女生的所有权”), which partially mitigates endorsement of hostility.

Title: 女孩乳房发育了，家长注意观察这3点
Transcript: 。女孩乳房发育了，家长注意这三点，家长如果发现女孩子的胸部凸起，记得要观察三件事情。第一件事情呢就是观察孩子发育的时间。如果在8岁之前呢，乳房就开始发育了，那么有可能是性早熟，要尽早带孩子到医院进行检查。第二件呢就是问问孩子有没有胸痛。因为有的孩子比较胖，看起来呢胸部是鼓舞的，可能是脂肪堆积的问题，不一定是真正的发育，第三件呢就是监测孩子的身高增。长速度以及来月经的时间。正常情况下，孩子乳房发育3年左右呢会来月经。如果乳房发育一年或者是两年就来月经了，那有可能是快速进展的一个青春期，很有可能呢会影响到孩子的最终身高，需要及时干预。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses girls/children undergoing early puberty and specifically breast development. This is not an intergroup (ethnic/national/religious) framing; the “group” is a developmental category (girls with early breast development) and parents/guardians as the audience. The group is central because the entire message is about monitoring this condition in girls.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video frames the issue as a health/medical concern (possible precocious puberty, rapid progression affecting final height) and recommends medical checks. It does not portray girls as threatening jobs, safety, resources, or territory; the “threat” is to the child’s health outcomes, not to others.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. There is no framing of cultural, religious, moral, or way-of-life threat. The content is clinical/educational (timing of development, chest pain, growth rate, menstruation timing).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some mild unease is created, but it is health-oriented rather than group-targeted hostility. Means include instructive warning language (e.g., if development occurs before 8 years old, it “may” be precocious puberty; if menstruation starts early, it “may” indicate rapid progression) and on-screen emphasis text. Imagery is a doctor in a clinical setting; no sensational or dehumanizing visuals.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Limited and not strongly negative. The video suggests that apparent breast “bulging” in some children who are “比较胖” may be due to fat accumulation rather than true development. This is a medical explanation that can implicitly associate higher body weight with misleading appearance, but it is not a strong derogatory stereotype and is presented as diagnostic guidance.

Title: 阴道炎能自愈吗
Transcript: 🎼 因为有些阴道炎呢是可以治愈的，呃，因为本身啊对于女性来说，阴道是有自禁作用的。呃，所以它是女性那个阴道啊保持弱酸性的环境。呃，如果得了阴道炎呢，这些细菌啊、病毒啊、微生物啊，呃，在阴道里面繁殖。如果女性的体质比较强的话，阴道的环境有可能会自己逐渐恢复到正常的环境。呃，所以这样会将这些细菌啊、病毒微生物啊有可能清除掉。对。呃，但是得了阴道炎了，还是希望患者朋友啊积极上医院进行检查，呃，诊断一下到底是属于哪种阴道炎，并且进行积极的治疗。，因为这个长期的阴道炎如果不治愈啊，有可能导致这个上行感染，引起盆腔的炎症，呃，有可能这个严重的呀，甚至会危及生命健康。

Title: 现在老师厌女媚男很严重啊
Transcript: 🎼爽文来了，以网友分享，初中时，班主任以影响学习为由，要求女生全部剪齐儿短发。他妈妈觉得梳辫子比起头容易，从主任找到校长，最后找到教育局，才保留了她的长发。没想到从此成了班主任的眼中丁肉中刺，有事没事，就说她臭美得心思根本不在学习上。有一天，他妈妈出差了，就把她托付给了他姨妈。她姨妈给她梳了两个牛角辫，还带了蝴蝶结。班主任终于忍不了了，当着全班的美一边扯头发，一边辱骂，还让她找家长，她瑟瑟发抖的哭着给姨妈打电话，姨妈问清楚事情的原委后，确定了班主任有课的时间，在全班同学众目睽睽之下，把他们班主任。从讲台打进了医院，暴躁老爸在线油炸妈，你睡了吗？讲重点，我想吃炸鸡，炸你妈炸你妈是不是？😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on gender/sex as a social group, specifically portraying “women/girls” (and by extension “females”) as the main subject of mistreatment by a male teacher. The message is largely organized around gendered conflict and the teacher’s alleged anti-female behavior, making gender highly central to the narrative.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a limited, interpersonal sense. The teacher is depicted as actively harming a girl’s well-being and school experience (e.g., forcing a haircut, insulting her, and physically assaulting her—“从讲台打进了医院”). This is framed as a threat to safety/health and to the girl’s educational opportunity, though it is not presented as a broad societal or resource-territory threat.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The narrative frames the teacher’s behavior as “厌女媚男” (anti-women, flattering men), implying a threat to gender equality and fairness in school norms/values. The teacher’s actions are portrayed as violating moral expectations of respect and proper education, and the girl’s appearance (long hair, bows) is treated as a trigger for gendered contempt.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The video uses a sensational, accusatory tone and dramatic editing (comic/emoji overlays, “看完我都震惊了” style captions) alongside scenes of crying, public humiliation, and implied violence. The music and pacing amplify outrage and fear/discomfort about what could happen to girls in school settings.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative gendered stereotypes in both directions: (1) a stereotype that a male teacher who dislikes girls will target them for appearance and “beauty” and is hostile toward femininity; (2) it also implies a broader pattern of gender bias (“厌女媚男很严重”). The evidence is presented as anecdotal and dramatized (single case narrative), but it is used to generalize about the teacher’s motives and gender dynamics.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception is used to justify strong retaliation and harm against the teacher (depicted as being beaten/“打进了医院”). While the video is framed as outrage and retribution, it effectively endorses violence rather than de-escalation or institutional resolution.

Title: 罗翔：在公海开一个妓院，你说构成犯罪吗
Transcript: 🎼前几天有个学生问我，我当时震惊了，他说老师，我想在公海开一个妓院，你说构成犯罪吗？我说你的脑洞有点大，这妥妥的构成犯罪。第一，你在公海怎么开妓院，难道在海上开吗？那会淹死的，所以你肯定得在一个轮船上开吧。那于是个轮船就属于什么？🎼就属于我国领土，他说老师，那我不登记在中国不就行了吗？我说算你狠，那就不按属地管，按什么来管属人，因为你是哪个国家的人？你是中国人，他说那怎么办？那怎么开能够不追究刑事责任呢？我说你不开不就得了吗？😡

Title: 欲望非常强，但插入即泄 阳w 阴茎易举
Transcript: 🎼 欲望非常强，但是插入机械。年轻的时候啊，手淫过度，婚后房事又不节制，硬度下降，还有腰期酸软，浑身乏力，五心烦热、心烦失眠、口干舌燥、健忘耳鸣，这个是香火旺动，导致了欲望强，虚火扰动了精石，就是导致早泄的原因。我们可以用黄连黄芩各6克，芍药6克，阿胶9克，蛋黄两枚，用水煎服，可以泻肾火滋肾水、交通心肾，所以心肾不焦引起的早泄。有非常好的效果。😡

Title: 我说的vs我妈听到的
Transcript: 当我想去网吧时，我说的妈，这不是周末了吗？晚上我约了几个好朋友去网吧玩会游戏。不过您放心，我们都成年了，我们不会玩的太晚，大概八九点钟就能回来了。我妈听到的，嘿老太婆，老子现在翅膀硬了，老子晚上约了几个狐朋狗友去网吧，抽烟喝酒打群架，大概七八点钟，老子就被判了。😊
Label: Normal

The only “group” implied is a loose in-group/out-group of the son’s friends/peer group (e.g., “狐朋狗友”), but it is not tied to a protected class or a stable social identity.

The mother’s imagined response mentions risky behavior (smoking, drinking, fighting) as part of a hypothetical scenario, but it is not presented as a threat posed by a distinct social group to others.

The “threat” is about conduct and authority, not about a group’s values or identity.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some discomfort is created through comedic but aggressive language and insults, plus the framing of delinquent activities. However, the tone appears satirical/roleplay-like (son vs. mother), and there is no sustained fear or menace imagery beyond the verbal content.

This is a general moral judgment about delinquent youth/peers, not a protected-class stereotype, and it is presented as part of a humorous misunderstanding.

Title: 公交车上叫嚣是“正黄旗”辱骂乘客的大妈 被行政拘留
Transcript: 不外外地人没素质，老老人病排上来不给家，我我瞧不起老着病排，你年轻人有残疾人上来你就应该乘坐，懂吗？懂吗？你没这素质，这我一得上上上北京要饭来了，狂看谁呀，北北京人怎么了？我爱我我上来，你们小小年轻的站在这老老人病残坐，你还那什么赖谁呀？既然我知力残疾这座就应该是我坐的。因为我二环一领，我就到北京，我还真是正房疾人。😡？🎼平子让开了，掉下来之后，他就开始不停的骂马捏咧的。他主要觉得是他上来之后，人家应该不用他说，就直接主动给他让。但是当时说实话，他一上去立刻就喊了，就根本没有这。😊
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a perceived out-group of “outsiders/outsiders from elsewhere” versus “Beijing locals,” with the speaker repeatedly contrasting “外地人/外地人没素质” against “北京人/北京.” The out-group is central to the conflict narrative and is used to justify why others should yield seats.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a limited, situational sense: the out-group is framed as causing harm to resources/space (priority seating on a bus for elderly/disabled), with claims that they “don’t have quality” and therefore should not occupy seats. Evidence includes repeated assertions that the speaker is entitled to the seat due to disability and that others (implied outsiders) are obstructing/violating norms around who should sit.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The video frames the out-group as a threat to social morals and “quality/civility” norms (“没素质,” “我瞧不起老着病残,” “你没这素质”). It also uses identity-based labeling (e.g., “北京人怎么了？…我爱我…上来,” and the title’s “正黄旗” framing) to imply cultural/identity disrespect and moral illegitimacy rather than only a physical safety issue.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort and anger through aggressive, confrontational speech and escalating insults. Means include hostile tone (shouting/insulting), confrontational interaction on a public bus, and edited emphasis via on-screen captions describing the incident as abusive/harassing. The editing and framing (news/police report context) amplify perceived social danger and wrongdoing.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes linking “outsiders” with lack of civility/low quality and entitlement behavior (“外地人没素质,” “你没这素质,” “你们…站在这老老人病残坐”). It also invokes a stereotype of identity-based illegitimacy by using labels like “正黄旗” in the title/transcript context to suggest the target is not properly entitled or is culturally/morally inferior.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception is used to justify exclusionary entitlement and social condemnation (e.g., implying outsiders should not be allowed to occupy priority seats and should be made to move/stop). While the video does not explicitly advocate physical violence, it does endorse hostility through dehumanizing/insulting language and calls for removal/denial of rights in the shared space.

Transcript: 🎼干啥了？啥心乐这啥雷了，啥急了，我让顾你啊，啊，来了哎对，。我头发这首我我不是谁这是我头发这首这。🎼。😊

This group is central because the message is explicitly about the alleged danger of this type of woman.

It presents this as a quasi-historical/cultural truth (“自古…”) rather than as an individual case, using the stereotype as explanatory evidence.

Title: 每天喝两口，阴茎坚硬且持久
Transcript: 🎼 自己在家就能做。如果你想房事时间延长到30分钟，硬度像18岁的时候那样坚挺有力。今天我就分享这个秘方给大家，祝你天天顶帐篷。做30分钟满分男人，从此远离阳痿早泄，不管你是肾虚，时间短，硬度差、前列腺炎、阴囊潮湿等症状，也不管你的问题有多少年都不用担心。我是中医赵登荣，有40多年的临床经验，帮助了。😊🎼很多男性朋友重回巅峰，如果你也有类似的困扰，点亮小红心，点我头像进来，给我发个数字。8，我来帮你辨证分析，给你制定适合你的岩时增影方，请你注意查收。

Title: 从大尾羊到奶山羊，羊与羊之间的差别还是很大的。
Transcript: 🎼其实羊与羊之间的差别还是很大的，一些羊的屁股特别大，比如阿勒泰大尾羊，他们的屁股啊又翘又圆，走起路来一晃一晃的，跟两个大水球似的。一些羊的体型非常小，比如尼日利亚矮山羊，它们长大后的体型啊跟柴犬差不多，而且长得毛茸茸的，所以经常被当做宠物伴侣饲养。甚至啊你可以用手把它们托起来玩。🎼还有萨能奶山羊、关中奶山羊之类的奶羊，他们每年的产奶量啊高达1200公斤，可供一个成年人啊喝7年。一些羊的羊角特别大，比如盘羊和猿羊，猿羊的羊角最常能够长到一.5米。虽然羊角很长，但是原羊的行动敏捷，上墙爬屋啊，样样在行。说到行动敏捷呀，雪羊常年生活在悬崖峭壁上，他们甚至可以在陡峭的山坡上奔跑。接下来就是大家比较熟悉的绵羊，除了能够提供温暖的羊毛之外，绵羊的性格也是。非常的温顺。另外啊懒羊羊其实也是一只可爱的小绵羊。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 佩特森学院男同学bjd开箱，好可爱的盲盒！【盲盒开箱】
Transcript: 🎼大家好，这是乔乔，不务正业一下开一个盲盒。这个是从预售的时候我就订了，我还挺喜欢这几个的，我都喜欢。我觉得抽到哪一个我都很开心。然后里面是BGD的，我一起来看一下我的是哪一个呢？懒得拿支架了，单手有点麻烦哦。好了，他是美术委员，这边有他的身份牌和换装的小贴纸，呃，这个是直接帮忙拉好金的，除了本体以外呢，还送一个空白的脸，一套手组，还有猫猫手好可爱，以及他的衣服和鞋子。他这个小。帽子是磁吸的，然后前面的刘海可以摘下来，后面的头发也可以摘下来，脸也可以摘下来都可以换的。有一点突然，那给他家穿个衣服吧，穿好之后就是这个样子的，他送的小衣服还比较精致的，也可以正常站立，不需要支架。哎呀，真是好可爱啊。大小的话是比OB11要大一圈的，头也会稍微大一点，以及这个灯光照立威好死亡啊。😊.

Title: 晚清旧影：1886年，一位青楼头牌站在妓院门口，裹着小脚表情凝重
Transcript: .🎼这是1886年拍摄的一张珍贵照片，记录了这样一个瞬间，一名偷牌妓女站在妓院的门口，她的眼神或许透露着复杂的情感。照片中的妓院门口贴着一副对联，尚书魁凤小班暗示了这个场所在当时的特殊地位。在那个时代，妓院被分为不同的等级，而魁凤小班，这样的对联往往只出现在偷牌妓院标志着这里的女子都。都是颜值巅峰，琴棋书画更是无所不经。这张照片穿越百年，宛若一扇时光之窗，让我们得以窥见那个年代青楼女子的生活状态。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video depicts and discusses women working in Qing-dynasty brothels ("青楼"), specifically a "头牌" and other women implied by the setting. This group is central to the message because the narration and on-screen imagery focus on their status, appearance, and the brothel entrance signage.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown. The frames depict a woman standing at a doorway with another person behind/near her; there is no evidence of violence, coercion, or direct harm to viewers’ jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory. The narration is descriptive/historical rather than threat-based.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The narration emphasizes hierarchy and aesthetics ("等级" and "颜值巅峰"), and references the brothel as a special-status place. However, it does not explicitly frame these women as threats to values, religion, morals, or a way of life; the tone is more documentary/romanticized than moral panic.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video does not strongly generate fear or anxiety about the group. The woman’s serious/solemn expression and the aged/archival visual style can create a mild sense of unease or melancholy, but the editing and narration primarily present historical curiosity and spectacle ("时光之窗") rather than alarm.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a sexualized and objectifying stereotype by centering "颜值" and "头牌" status as defining traits, and by treating the women’s worth as tied to appearance and performance ("琴棋书画" claims). It also implicitly categorizes women by brothel hierarchy, which can support stigmatizing views of sex work as a fixed social role.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: There is no explicit call for exclusion, hostility, or harm. The content does not advocate punitive actions; it presents the scene as a historical artifact and focuses on the brothel’s signage and the woman’s expression/status.

Title: 四大娘炮续集来了
Transcript: 🎼人家是小姐姐。很多朋友在我底下评论说我是个娘炮。今天我给大家解释下，我是个猛男，我是个猛男搭回去。😊🎼呀喷香水呢死娘炮说什么谁死娘炮呢，你死娘炮呢。😡你们看这海浪那有没有我了？😊
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gender-nonconforming/effeminate male stereotype referred to as “娘炮” (pejorative for “effeminate guy”). This group is central to the message via repeated on-screen text and dialogue that labels the speaker/others as “娘炮.”
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown. The clips depict people talking/arguing and comedic reactions (e.g., pointing, laughing, phone/room scenes). There is no evidence of violence, safety harm, or resource/territory loss tied to the group.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video implies symbolic threat through moral/identity policing: it frames “娘炮” as something to be insulted and corrected (“我不是娘炮/我是猛男”), and uses derogatory language (“死娘炮”) suggesting the group violates norms of masculinity. However, it does not explicitly target religion or culture beyond gender norms.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes, it creates discomfort primarily through hostile/taunting tone and derogatory labeling. Means include aggressive insults in dialogue, confrontational captions, and comedic editing effects (e.g., starburst/impact visuals) that heighten ridicule rather than fear.

Transcript: 🎼换个曲，你想听什么曲子？陈夫的爱钢琴群里没有这个陈夫的爱是什么就是曲他们非什么不能谈，你说的钢琴曲里没有这，你说你一个臭小姐，那就会嘚瑟什么二0百会不会五0百会不会，我他妈全给你会不会，不合你哎，你不管教，我他妈得给你管教，你个男现场板签不得，那不得的话。你怎么也瞎啊，你怎么怎不听死你说话吴大骂，生明迷我他，我就说了，我怎妈就说了，怎么的？😡🎼你二人打架了吧？嘿这好多让人给揍打都打掉，也不知道下手那帮人是么，死是真黑。😊

Title: 悟道“生与活”（我也是养牛得，我最希望下小母牛，虽然小公牛值钱，但是卖了就死了，还是小母牛好可以一直养着）#和谐共生 #有情有义 #智慧人生
Transcript: 🎼前段时间经过屠宰场的时候，看到这个小牛犊一直站在卖肉的货架前，问了下旁边的人什么情况，说是母牛小牛都被卖到了这个屠宰场。母牛呢已经被宰杀挂到货架上卖肉。小牛好像知道这个货架上挂的是自己的妈妈，一直站在旁边啊，不肯离去。看的让我十分的心疼。经过这件事以后，我都不想再做这一行了。万物皆有灵，杀生不虐声，母子连心，不仅仅。存在于人类，希望大家都能好好对待自己的父母家。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a non-human animal group—specifically calves and their mother cows—depicted as being separated and sold for slaughter. This group is highly central to the message because the narrative and on-screen captions focus on the mother-calf bond and the calf’s distress at the meat display.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame the animal group as a material threat to human jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory. Instead, it portrays humans (the slaughter/market process) as causing harm to the animals.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. The video frames the situation as a moral/emotional wrong (killing, separation, cruelty) rather than as a threat to human values or culture posed by the animals. The animals are used to evoke compassion and ethical reflection.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes, but directed toward the viewer’s moral discomfort rather than fear of the animals. Unease is created through graphic imagery of slaughtered carcasses on display, the calf standing near the meat as if recognizing its mother, and emotionally charged narration (“心疼,” “不想再做这一行”). The editing emphasizes the calf’s persistence and the mother-calf connection; music and captions reinforce sadness and empathy.
itt_response.stereotype_support: No negative intergroup stereotypes about a human social group are invoked. The video uses the animals’ behavior (attachment to the mother) as evidence of sentience and emotional bonds (“母子连心,” “万物皆有灵”), which is pro-animal/empathetic rather than dehumanizing.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. The accumulated perception does not prescribe hostility or harm toward the animal group. The implied prescription is the opposite: stop participating in slaughter, treat animals (and one’s parents) with care, and promote humane treatment.

Title: 阴茎达不到20厘米如何才能二次发育
Transcript: ？🎼阴茎达不到20厘米，如何才能二次发育？为什么电影里的钉钉都那么长？有什么办法可以二次发育吗？一般来说，男人在16岁左右就发育完全了，到24岁之后呢，基本上就不会再有变化了。但是刘主任告诉你，阴茎不再长够用就好。至于电影里面的男主角，那都是特意跳出来了，比不过很正常。只要男性阴茎疲软状态下，长度大于5厘米，就可以行使正常的性功能。因为女性地点也位于一道口。5厘米，所以呢与其关心尺寸，不如练练技术，开个运动可以了解一下。如果有宣传或吃什么喝什么都能延长增粗的产品两个字儿，假的。

Title: 睾丸真的有味觉吗？
Transcript: 🎼正经的知识，睾丸上其实有味觉感受器，在2013年的分子人类生殖学上，有一篇叫味觉感知，从舌头到睾丸的论文，上面研究发现，睾丸上的确有两种可以接受鲜味和甜味的味觉受体。但是这个味觉受体是内在的。所以即使泡在糖水里也没有用，并且已经有很多人试过，并不会真的尝出味道。嗯，正经的知识又增加了。

Title: 妈宝男，到底有多可怕？
Transcript: 🎼早上起来我们第一件事情不都是洗漱嘛，对吗？他起来第一件事摸手机给他妈打电话，妈我起床了，然后中午也得他妈打三四个电话，晚上睡觉之前还得给妈说晚安，妈妈我睡了，比如七八个电话挺正常的吧，跟朋友一起出门聚个会啊，逛个街什么的，他也得给他妈打个电话汇报一下，出去吃个饭，拍照片给他妈发过去，让他妈看我们今天吃什么，去逛个街买个衣服什么的，不得先问他妈他妈说哪家好看，就买哪家。前段时间我自己发的工资，我买个包，他他妈就说什么呃，这女孩子什么花钱。😊大手大脚啊，不节约，不勤俭持家。你说我花我自己的钱，关他妈什么事啊，我花我自己的钱，我自己劳动挣的钱，我我有错吗？对呀，你也知道我们还在谈恋爱，我们还没结婚呢，你妈就管那么宽，那迟早的事吗？谁要跟你过呀，你跟你妈过去吧，你这。😡
Label: Offensive

The “threat” is framed as relational and economic: the mother’s control allegedly affects the partner’s autonomy and spending decisions (e.g., frequent calls, reporting outings, buying based on mother’s approval, criticism of the partner’s spending). Evidence is conversational narration and examples of control over money and daily activities.

Evidence includes claims that the man’s mother “管那么宽” (controls too much), that the partner should not have to be managed before marriage, and that the man’s behavior implies the partner is not truly the primary relationship.

Title: 泡温泉后得了念珠菌性阴道炎，是温泉水太脏了吗？#关爱女性健康 #医学科普
Transcript: 🎼还有宝子留言说，他泡完温泉过后得了念珠菌性的阴道炎，其实我想说这个概率是比较低的啊，因为念珠菌它在我们人体是一个常驻菌群，口腔、歪道、直肠皮肤上都会有，它不是通过性生活传播的，它主要是跟免疫力下降有关系。第二点呢，我们Y道是闭合的，正常是有个阴道的扩约剂在的那温泉水不会进入歪道内，所以泡了温泉为啥会得念珠菌性的阴道炎呢？刚才讲到。其实还是因为旅游过后的免疫力下降，你玩的太累了，不用太紧张。因为念珠菌性运道炎治疗是非常简单，用一些抗真菌的阴道栓剂，比如说克霉唑小吉米康唑一般7天左右就会好了。
Label: Normal

Transcript: 。谁敢向我巫婆挑战呀，我我敢如果挑战成功了，你以后就不许干坏事了，跟着我一起做好事。好好好，没问题，奥你也不会赢过我。我们两个只要谁能通过这个意智迷宫挑战，谁就会赢的，我先来，我一定要赢手机前面的朋友们一定要支持我，支持我的，就给我发送666。哎呀，怎么输了，该我了，手机前面的朋友们一定要支持我，因为我呀是做好事的，这个巫婆呀，特别特别的坏。经常。欺负小朋友，这次啊我一定要让他改邪归正，跟我一起做好事。手机前面的朋友们，红色能量不要停不要停哼。谁呀？这个白雪竟然想要成功，现在我就把红色能量定住，谁也点点不了。唉，怎么了？我怎么通过不了了？手机前面的朋友们快发送红色能量呀，我马上就要成功了。哇，我要能动弹了了，谢谢你们，什么我不想做好事啊，谁敢。😊

Title: 手淫多年，身体空空，六味地黄丸能救吗？
Transcript: 有人手淫很多年，无法自拔，身体越来越差。来咨询能不能吃六味地黄丸补回来。这个呢，手淫伤肾和防热过度一样，可引起肾阴虚、肾阳虚。如果是肾阴虚，有面色潮红，消瘦，容易兴奋，容易勃起，也容易早泄。这种呢吃一段时间六味地黄丸会比较有帮助。但如果肾阳虚有脸色苍白，手脚冰凉，精神萎靡，不易勃起。这种呢就不能吃六味地黄丸了，可能还会越吃越严重。

Title: 男性阴茎多长才算正常呢？
Transcript: 🎼男性的阴茎长度每个人都是不一样的。那么男性阴茎多长才算正常的。有的男性朋友感觉自己阴茎非常短小，有时候甚至会出现自卑的心理。Yeah.🎼在爱人和同性面前抬不起头来。最简单的测量方法，在站着的时候，测量阴茎硬起来的长度，从根部到龟头部的长度，如果超过了8到10厘米，那么就算正常。虽然爱有的男性会稍微长一点，但是只要自己是正常的长度，就没必要觉得自卑或者过于担心。记得点赞评论加关注哦。

Title: 妈宝男……
Transcript: 硬多硬重的男生容易形成妈宝，正因为他们小时候得到了母亲过多的溺爱。从而产生依赖性，缺乏独立性。女生找自己的另一半是应避免找妈宝型的男生。因为在婚后的生活里。有一面你永远无法逾越的高墙。伯伯大人。
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gendered sub-group of men described as “妈宝男” (a “mama’s boy”/overly mother-dependent man). This group is central to the message: the speaker explains how such men form and advises women to avoid them when choosing a partner.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material/physical threat is presented. The only “evidence” offered is relational/behavioral: these men are said to be dependent and lack independence, which allegedly creates difficulties in married life (e.g., “a wall you can’t cross”). This is framed as a personal relationship risk rather than a threat to jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video frames a threat to values/way of life within marriage—specifically expectations of independence and marital autonomy. The “high wall” metaphor implies a moral/relational boundary that undermines the partner’s ability to integrate into the relationship on equal terms.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The speaker uses cautionary, warning-like language (“should avoid,” “a wall you can’t cross”) and a didactic tone. The discomfort is produced through direct advice and metaphorical framing of inevitable conflict in marriage, rather than through visual imagery or music (the frames show a person speaking with subtitles).
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative stereotype: “mama’s boys” are portrayed as overly dependent, lacking independence, and formed due to excessive maternal indulgence in childhood. It treats these traits as explanatory and predictive of future marital dynamics, presenting them as justification for avoidance.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception leads to exclusionary/avoidance guidance (women should not choose this type of man). It does not explicitly endorse violence or direct harm, but it does prescribe social distancing/selection bias against the targeted group.

Title: 爸爸差一点得到一个绿帽子  虽然结局万万没想到，但是却也是一个美丽却悲伤的故事!（来源@小丑龙）#万万没想到 #大学生  #娱你安利

This group is highly central because the narration and on-screen text repeatedly frame the plot as “找小三还是给他妈找闺蜜,” using the “小三” identity as the main explanatory target for the conflict.

However, the video implies a relational/resource threat: the “小三” is portrayed as taking away the man’s attention/affection and disrupting the household (“男人还是喜欢去外面试试…这是小三姐”). The evidence is narrative framing and dialogue about men going outside rather than concrete harm.

On-screen labels like “渣男” and “小三姐,” along with lines such as “这是原配…这是渣男…这是小三姐,” position the group as embodying betrayal and wrongdoing, undermining norms of marriage/loyalty.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video uses an accusatory, sensational tone (“辣眼睛,” “更辣眼睛的…草莓香…”) and repeated labeling to create discomfort and moral outrage. Editing includes bold, repeated captions (“导 演太懂男人了,” “老三,” etc.) and comedic/irritating framing that heightens irritation toward the “小三” role. Imagery shows confrontational/critical reactions (e.g., the woman’s angry expressions) to elicit unease.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes about “小三” as inherently deceptive, disruptive, and responsible for relationship breakdowns. The “evidence” is presented as causal storytelling: men “go outside,” therefore the “小三” is the key culprit. The repeated association of “小三” with “渣男” and with the man’s external behavior functions as implied proof.

Transcript: 你见过带容量20发的左轮手枪吗？这个20响盒子炮就是法国乐辐射左轮手枪，在19世纪50年代设计制造的该枪发射7.65毫米口径定装弹药，这是一种早期手枪定装子弹，通过七打弹壳尾部侧面的铜针发火，口径小鱼常见的左轮手枪弹药，射击时需要向后扳动机锤，然后再扣动扳机发射扳机游可拆解的护圈，扳机杠杆可以向前折叠，其产量不高。效批量生产，普通手枪表面进行了镀镍处理，看起来很有金属光泽。人们对它的火力持续能力很满意。不过，这款枪操作起来不如当时其他转轮手枪方便，重量和尺寸都偏大。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. There is no framing of any group as a threat to values, culture, religion, morals, or way of life. The narrative is technical/historical about a firearm.

No music/tone/editing cues indicate group-based threat or panic.

Title: 阴茎勃起硬如铁，男人每天猛如虎，老婆开心你也赞
Transcript: 阴茎勃起，硬如铁，男人每天猛如虎，老婆开心，你也在，你想不想时间达到20分钟，想不想勃起持久有力，这个小方法就能帮到你。如果你以前有经常用手的习惯，一直持续到现在，夫妻生活经常不到3分钟，硬得快，软的也快，硬度不怎么喜人，甚至勃起中断停止。有这种问题不用太担心，肾气充足，男人的控制能力得到加强，时间就能由自己充分掌握，想要多持久，你说了算，如果你愿意。你教我这个医生朋友可以点一个免费的小红心，只要你是我的粉丝，在评论区回个6，我就会单独把方法发给你。😡
Label: Normal

It is not about an intergroup category like ethnicity or religion; however, it does treat “men” as a distinct group whose sexual capability is the core message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat to jobs, safety, resources, or territory is presented. The only “threat” is health/sexual-function decline framed as a personal medical/physiological problem (e.g., erectile hardness, duration, premature loss of erection). Evidence includes claims like “夫妻生活经常不到3分钟…硬得快，软的也快…甚至勃起中断停止” and “有这种问题不用太担心…肾气充足…控制能力得到加强.”
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No symbolic threat to values, culture, religion, or morals is explicitly framed. The messaging is about sexual performance and marital satisfaction rather than attacking a group’s way of life or moral standing.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort/urgency about sexual inadequacy using sensational, directive language and attention-grabbing on-screen text (e.g., “硬如铁”“男人每天猛如虎”“想不想时间达到20分钟”“勃起中断停止”). It uses medical/biological imagery (penis/erection-related visuals and internal-body graphics) and a confrontational call-to-action tone (e.g., “你想不想…这小方法就能帮到你”).
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a gendered stereotype that men’s worth and marital/sexual success depend on erectile hardness, duration, and “control ability.” It implies that men who cannot maintain erections are deficient and that improvement is necessary for the wife’s happiness and the couple’s satisfaction. Evidence: repeated emphasis on “硬度不怎么喜人,” “控制能力得到加强,” and “老婆开心你也赞.”
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No endorsement of exclusion, hostility, or harm toward men is present. The content is instructional/marketing for sexual performance improvement, not advocating aggression or dehumanization.

Title: 父亲吃醋女儿相机拍的都是男同学
Transcript: 🎼不是弄男同学，我看你一直刚在拍那个男同学是怎么回事吗？啊，喜欢什么喜欢他一下，你喜欢他是不是嗯，还是我好朋友啊？他是你好同学，你拍一下他对不对？在幼儿园还是跟我玩的哦，为什么男同学照片比我的照片多，哪里呀，哪里没有，没有吗？🎼陈同写两个，你也两个哦，他两个我也两个，就说明我跟他一样重要，对不对？不是我没有他重要，对不对？不是哦，我想起来了，你是三个，他他就是几个，他几个。😊他两个而月哦，那我就比他多一个宿谢。

Imagery is a child outdoors with subtitles; editing appears to be straightforward with no overt fear-inducing visuals.

Title: 如何变泼妇

Title: 女子隆胸12年后，乳房“石化”硬如石头，医生取出不定时“炸弹”
Transcript: ？🎼近日，浙江杭州黄女士化名她的胸部高耸突兀，而且形状怪异，触诊时更是感觉乳房僵硬的，仿佛是2块硬邦邦的石头。12年前，为了追求美丽，狠下心来做了隆胸手术，在双侧乳房注射了奥美定一开始的胸型效果还算不错。可谁料近几年乳房开始发硬石化，沉甸甸的压在胸口，压得晚上觉都睡不安稳，还感觉胸闷喘不上气。医生判断这是典型的奥美定并发症，建议尽早手术。医生提醒。😊注射过奥美定的人群，最好尽早就医检查，通过手术最大限度的取出这不定时炸弹，清除病变组织，减少有害物质的残留量。术中，医生先对乳腺内的包膜异物进行了剥离，尽可能的保留了大部分的乳腺腺体与肌肉减少损伤，随即将乳房中游离的奥美定吸出，清除出大量的黄色米糊样异物，终于将难缠的奥美啶取出，术后胸部变软，呈现出自然状态。。
Label: Normal

Title: 原来我这么“厌男”啊？天啊！我可太厉害了吧！
Transcript: 。天哪，有人说我艳男哇上了这个扣这么大帽子，不点受不了怎么办？如果说我要是真的艳男的话，就不应该只是现在这样说的这么温和的话，我应该像部分男人对女人那样，看到一盘车厘子，就在意议人家是不是做拉皮条生意的。看到一个女博士呢张口就是哎那我来考考你，不许百度哦。看到一个生活比较富足的女生就要开始意淫人家是不是在做一些不正当的勾当呢？但是呢其实我没有这样哦。我不仅可以欣赏男作者的书，也可以去欣赏男画家的话。甚至呢。一些男性博主讲的比较有道理的一些语言，我也是可以接受的。曲奇精华学习糟粕嘛。相反，由于我生活中受到了不少男性的善意，所以我愿意相信，即便男性和女性拥有差异，还是有一些男生可以尽可能的去了解女生的困境，就算无法做到感同身受，最但也不至于冷眼旁观，不要总是以己夺人哦，小东西。😊
Label: Normal

Title: "露阴癖"大爷用皮包遮挡下体到处蹭，被小姐姐录下视频报警
Transcript: 🎼刚好我就一抬头就看到了他的心。喜欢直接露在外面，就是他只是把他的那个裤子拉链拉了一点出来，他露人露了一截出来，然后用他的包包刚好是个蛮大的包包，然后挡住。然后又是走到了就是一个小姐姐的面前，然后靠别人很近，就故意好像故意蹭过去的那种感觉。😊🎼
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video depicts and discusses an individual described as a “露阴癖” (exposure/indecent exposure offender). This category is central to the message because the narration and visuals focus on the person’s behavior and the act of exposing/pressing against others.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes. The video frames the person’s behavior as a direct safety/health threat to nearby passengers (e.g., intentionally moving close and “蹭过去”/rubbing near a woman while exposing). Evidence includes the on-screen description of exposure and the narration emphasizing proximity and deliberate contact, plus the claim that the video is used to report to authorities.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Partially. While the core is physical safety, the narration also frames the behavior as a violation of public morals and acceptable conduct (e.g., “喜欢直接露在外面,” deliberate behavior). This implies a threat to social norms/values of public decency rather than to culture or religion.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The video creates unease through the explicit sexual exposure context, close-quarters setting (public transit), and the accusatory narration. Editing/visual emphasis (multiple frames showing the man’s actions and the woman recording) and the sensational framing (“露阴癖…到处蹭…报警”) increase discomfort and perceived danger.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative stereotype that this type of offender is predatory, intentionally targets women, and behaves deliberately in public spaces. It presents the offender’s actions as “evidence” of malicious intent (e.g., “故意…靠别人很近…故意蹭过去”).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The video does not explicitly call for violence, but it does imply exclusionary/containment action by encouraging reporting to authorities (“报警”). The accumulated threat perception supports punitive/legal intervention rather than harm, with hostility directed toward the offender category’s behavior.

Title: 不是吧！用粘土做柚子鸡居然这么可爱！

Title: 使命魔怔哥进击母牛
Transcript: 🎼挑战每天模仿一个角色，今天要模仿的是。魔怔哥母牛版本顾名思义就是在母牛中的魔怔哥。到目前为止，母牛版本的魔证哥是最强的一个，他们会在一个你们都知道的游戏里面打架，他们会在联机大厅里寻找目标，寻找到合适的目标就会直接进去。当他们打掉一个敌人时，那必须把子弹打地上，和别的游戏不同的他们打在地上的子弹，都是100发起步，然后再配上一手硬汉音乐，下面直接看成品，打了就是被打了，不要跟我说什么魔怔不魔怔的，好吧，我这最枪子弹多，我就是喜欢往地上打你能吗我怎么着，哎，我就是打。🎼打他们可能还会这样。呃，今天呢我心情好，放个烟花，没什么问题吧。兄弟们可以看到呢，这个烟花也是非常的漂亮，好吧，有的时候他们还会无聊到练手速，就像这个样子。呃，今天呢也是闲来无聊的练练手速，好吧，不是我说就我这手速，你们敢紧吗？哎，我去，不好意思，不好意思，练手速练过头了，先把花发打掉了，不好意思不好意思呃，不对，不用感谢我不用感谢我啊。😊

Title: 巨婴爱情观
Transcript: 🎼女孩子，如果说你20多岁，你要找一个男孩子，你如果又像人家又有钱，又有事业，又有上进心，还要对你好，那你真的有点作，这叫公主病。凭什么80后也好，90后、95后也好，我们都是独生子女。所以有一个词儿啊叫巨婴，那就是都是心态不成熟的女孩子找对象想找个爸，总想让对方来质疑你，爱你和包容你，这都是不正确的爱情观啊，你只有到了这个年龄，这到了40岁了，你才会去感悟哦。原来我们需要自己变得更好。我们才。还配拥有爱情。如果你自己不够好，或者你每天都是希望对方给你能量，给你信心，给你爱。那这种感情一定是很糟糕的感情，一定是你自己足够好记得出来给别人。
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses a gendered subgroup of women/“girls” (especially young women) characterized as having “princess syndrome”/“巨婴” (immature, seeking a partner like a father figure). This group is central: the entire message is an admonition about how this type of woman supposedly approaches dating and love.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not present this group as a material threat to jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory. It frames the issue as personal relationship dynamics and emotional maturity rather than concrete harm to society.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, indirectly. It frames the subgroup as a threat to “correct” relationship values and norms (healthy love, self-improvement, mutual responsibility). Evidence: claims that such women have “incorrect love views,” “immature mindset,” and “should become better to deserve love,” implying a moral/behavioral deviation from accepted standards of dating and adulthood.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Moderate. The tone is admonishing and judgmental, using labels (“作/公主病/巨婴”) and a cautionary narrative that such attitudes lead to “very bad” relationships. The discomfort is produced through assertive commentary and on-screen emphasis text (e.g., “婚姻和爱情,” “这是两码事,” “这叫公主病,” “这都是不正确的爱情观”), rather than fear-inducing imagery or music.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Yes. It reinforces a negative stereotype that certain young women are inherently immature and emotionally dependent—seeking a partner who will “act like a dad,” provide validation/energy, and tolerate them. It treats these traits as a defining, evidence-like explanation for relationship failure (“一定是很糟糕的感情”).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No explicit endorsement of exclusion or harm. However, it does prescribe a dismissive stance and moral correction: the women with this mindset are portrayed as “wrong” and should change (become better, stop expecting the partner to provide love/energy). The prescription is corrective/judgmental rather than violent or exclusionary.

Title: 为什么自己的老婆是泼妇？
Transcript: 。🎼为什么自己的老婆像个泼妇，而别人的老婆却那么温柔可爱呢？这个问题其实困扰了很多男人，他们会觉得自己的运气不好，没有找到一个好老婆，或者个人觉得老婆变了。婚前的小鸟一人温柔可爱，都是女人抓出来的吗？现在的他原形毕露了吗？其实眼前的这一切啊都是女人婚后遭到不公的待遇，是女人的一种自我保护，自我反击的一种手段。面对男人的冷漠无情，随意践踏女人尊严的行为，女人别无选择，只有通过唠叨、发脾气来表达自己的。😡不满。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on women (specifically wives) as the key social group. It contrasts “my wife” being portrayed as a shrew/“泼妇” with “other people’s wife” being gentle, and then attributes the behavior to women’s post-marriage experiences and responses. Women are central to the message throughout.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material/physical threat is depicted to jobs, safety, health, or resources. The “threat” is framed more as interpersonal conflict within marriage (men experiencing dissatisfaction; women expressing anger). Evidence: the transcript discusses marital dynamics (coldness, disrespect, unfair treatment) rather than concrete harm like violence or resource loss.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video does not frame women as a threat to religion or culture. However, it does frame a moral/relational threat to “dignity” and fairness in marriage: men’s “践踏女人尊严” (trampling women’s dignity) is presented as the problematic value violation, and women’s “self-protection/self-reply” is offered as a response. Evidence: emphasis on unfair treatment and disrespect as the driver of women’s behavior.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort primarily through a provocative premise (“Why is my wife like a shrew?”) and the repeated labeling of the wife as “泼妇”/“shrew,” plus emotionally charged framing (anger, dissatisfaction). Means: assertive narration, captions, and a contrastive structure (gentle vs. shrew-like wives). Music/visuals appear like a talk-show segment with emphatic delivery; no overt fear imagery is shown.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a gendered stereotype that women’s behavior can be characterized as nagging/temperamental (“泼妇,” “shrew,” “发脾气,” “唠叨”) and that women’s “true form” is revealed after marriage (“原形毕露”). While it provides a mitigating explanation (unfair treatment leading to self-protection), it still uses negative behavioral labels as the core evidence for the claim.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception does not prescribe exclusion or direct harm toward women. Instead, it rationalizes women’s anger as a reaction to mistreatment. However, it implicitly positions women (wives) as the source of marital problems from the men’s perspective, which could support interpersonal hostility (e.g., blaming wives for conflict), though the transcript’s stated stance is more explanatory/justificatory than advocating harm.

Title: 绝经后阴道干涩怎么办
Transcript: 🎼绝经后阴道干涩是什么原因呢？一招帮你恢复，那就是在排除禁忌症的情况下，可以局部使用雌激素软膏。正常人绝经以后，由于雌激素的迅速下降，可以导致阴道的萎缩。黏膜变薄分泌物减少，弹性下降。这时候阴道是会比较干涩的，尤其是在同房的时候没有分泌物的情况下会出现疼痛，在这个期间也容易患上一些老年性阴道炎或者是尿路感染，如果你发生了一些炎症以后，建议你首先对症治疗，局部上药，但。炎症消退以后，可以局部涂一些雌激素软膏，它可以增加局部的激素水平，使阴道粘膜增厚，分泌物增加，提高局部的抵抗力，避免出现一些阴道干涩或者阴道炎的发生。我是朱哥，关注我，帮你解决妇科问题。
Label: Normal

Title: 【TikTok】停止荡妇羞辱女性！
Transcript: 。To all of you, boys, not men, boys who like to joke about rape and call it dark humor. And, oh, she was asking for it. Did you see what she was wearing, Keep that same fucking energy when it happens to your mom or your sister or your girlfriend or your daughter, Keep that same energy when your daughter comes into your room crying because a man just raped her.😡Go ahead and tell her. It's because of what she was wearing. Go ahead and tell her it's not that big of a deal and that she was asking for it. Go ahead.Keep that same fucking energy bud, because just because it happened to some girl you don't know does not make it O to joke about. Keep that energy.😡
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on women/girls as the subject of sexualized insults and moral judgment, and it also addresses “boys, not men” who are framed as perpetrators/harassers. Women/girls are highly central to the message because the captions and narration focus on shaming and blaming victims (e.g., “slut,” “asking for it”).
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear framing of women/girls as a material threat to jobs, safety, health, or territory. Instead, the realistic threat is implicitly about sexual violence perpetrated by men/boys; however, the video’s blame is directed toward the victim’s clothing/behavior rather than portraying women as a threat group.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video uses moral-symbolic framing: it treats sexual violence “jokes” and victim-blaming as a violation of values (respect, consent, empathy). It also invokes a moral narrative that women/girls are judged by sexuality/presentation (“what she was wearing,” “slut”), reinforcing a culture of sexual stigma rather than a threat to a group’s way of life.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. It creates discomfort and anger through an accusatory, confrontational tone (caps/onscreen text, emphatic language) and by referencing rape and victim distress. The editing/captions emphasize derogatory labels and blame, which heightens emotional arousal and unease.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces the stereotype that women/girls can be blamed for sexual violence based on appearance or clothing (“she was asking for it,” “because of what she was wearing”). It also uses the stereotype of “boys” as immature/irresponsible perpetrators who justify rape as “dark humor,” though the core victim-blaming stereotype is directed at women/girls.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The video does not advocate violence against women/girls; it condemns rape-joking and victim-blaming. However, it does prescribe hostility toward the behavior/attitudes of “boys” (and implicitly toward those who shame victims). Because it repeatedly uses derogatory sexual slurs toward women/girls, it risks normalizing hostility/stigma even while claiming to defend victims.

While direct physical harm is not shown, the framing endorses punitive social treatment toward the woman.

Title: 公主病玩丛林土鳖
Transcript: 🎼原神小哥这个鹿头玩的真是太棒了。啥玩意露头啊，不懂不要乱说，这是河马。🎼龙这是龙，中国龙，不是龙哈哈，是鹿头，是河马，这是龙，明明是鹿头。不对，是河马，两个傻子，这是龙啊河马。你们这两个丛林土鳖。
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on an in-game character/role being labeled with shifting animal identities (鹿头/河马/龙) and then explicitly calls other players/a group of people “丛林土鳖” (roughly “jungle bumpkins/uncultured”). This “丛林土鳖” functions as the salient social group: people characterized as uncultured/low-status. The group is central because the transcript repeatedly targets them with direct insults while debating identity labels.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat is shown. The frames depict gameplay with weapons/characters and no evidence of harm to safety, jobs, health, resources, or territory. The “threat” is rhetorical/insult-based rather than grounded in concrete consequences.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a symbolic sense: the transcript frames the targeted group as lacking knowledge and culture (“不懂不要乱说”, “丛林土鳖”) and disputes their legitimacy/understanding of what the character is. This implies a threat to norms of competence/knowledge and to cultural/linguistic correctness (who is allowed to identify/interpret correctly).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort primarily through mocking and escalating verbal hostility (repeated correction/insults). The tone is confrontational and dismissive, but there is no visual terror or fear-inducing imagery; the unease comes from the aggressive commentary and labeling rather than from danger visuals.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype of “uncultured/ignorant people” (土鳖) who “don’t understand” and therefore speak incorrectly. The transcript treats the stereotype as self-evident proof (“不懂不要乱说”, “两个傻子”, “你们这两个丛林土鳖”) rather than demonstrating objective behavior.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception does not show explicit calls for violence, but it does prescribe social hostility via demeaning and exclusionary attitudes (insults, delegitimization, treating them as ‘not knowing’ and ‘stupid’). The likely behavioral implication is to dismiss, mock, and exclude the group from respectful discourse.

Title: 对待公主病就得以牙还牙
Transcript: 🎼一句话反杀公主病哟上班穿黑丝勾引谁呀？勾引你爹你这有妈。我家停水了，你给我洗干净，这脑子有水自己洗。🎼我的牙说用你的东西是你的福气，别不知好歹，给你搓澡是你的福气，别不是抬举。😊
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a character archetype labeled in the title/transcript as “公主病” (princess syndrome)—a behavioral/attitudinal group rather than a protected class. This archetype is central to the message: the narration and on-screen text repeatedly frame the “princess syndrome” person as the one being confronted and corrected.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material, physical, or resource/territory threat to a real-world group is depicted. The conflict is comedic/disciplinary (e.g., “停水了，你给我洗干净…自己洗,” “给你搓澡是你的福气”), with no evidence of danger to safety, jobs, or health beyond slapstick/household inconvenience.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video frames “公主病” as a moral/behavioral threat—portrayed as entitled, manipulative, and disrespectful (e.g., “勾引谁呀？勾引你爹你这有妈,” “别不知好歹,” “脑子有水自己洗”). The threat is to social norms of gratitude, respect, and reciprocity rather than to culture or religion.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The tone is mocking and corrective, using confrontational dialogue, exaggerated facial expressions, and comedic punishment/servicing scenes (washing/scrubbing). Music and editing appear upbeat/chant-like, but the repeated taunting and humiliation imagery can create discomfort by positioning the target as deserving of ridicule and forced correction.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes about “公主病” as: (1) entitled and demanding others’ labor, (2) attention-seeking/manipulative (“勾引谁呀”), and (3) ungrateful or unreasonable (“别不知好歹”). These are presented as justification for the corrective treatment.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception leads to endorsing hostility in the form of verbal aggression and humiliating “payback”/discipline (e.g., forced washing, “以牙还牙,” taunting). While it is not depicted as organized violence, it does prescribe antagonistic treatment toward the “公主病” archetype.

Title: 《漂亮国警察入侵评论区》小红书，微博上的小仙女看到要气坏了

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on U.S. police officers as a social group, depicted as the primary actors in the incident and as the focus of the surrounding commentary (e.g., “police在我家门口干嘛/入侵评论区”). Their presence is central to the message because the narrative and viewer reactions revolve around their actions and legitimacy.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes. The video/commentary frames U.S. police as a material threat to personal safety and home/territory boundaries. Evidence includes imagery of police outside/at a residence (officers near windows/yard) and captions implying intrusion (“入侵评论区,” “在我家门口干嘛”). The comments also emphasize protection and concern for safety of the family/child, implying risk of harm or escalation.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Partially. While the dominant framing is safety/intrusion, the comment thread includes moral/legitimacy judgments about whether the police are acting appropriately (“先不要把心打扮了/我们在执行任务,” “抱歉…请放心…保护你们的安全”). This suggests a symbolic threat to trust in authority and perceived fairness/appropriateness of law enforcement behavior, though it is not strongly tied to religion or culture.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The video uses suspenseful/incident framing (police presence at a home, child close-up, outdoor surveillance-like shots) and social-media reaction context (heated comment section). The tone implied by the title and captions (“气坏了,” “入侵”) plus the editing that alternates between police outside and a child indoors creates unease and concern about what the police are doing.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video and especially the comment framing can reinforce a negative stereotype of police as intrusive, threatening, or overreaching—presented as ‘evidence’ through the visual of officers at a residence and the interpretive captions that treat their presence as suspicious or harmful. However, the screenshots also include some counter-comments emphasizing reassurance and proper procedure, which partially mitigates one-sided stereotyping.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No clear endorsement of direct violence is shown in the provided frames. The accumulated threat perception appears to lead more toward suspicion, anger, and calls for reassurance/protection rather than explicit harm. The dominant ‘prescription’ is defensive—seeking to protect the family/child and questioning police actions—rather than advocating exclusion or physical attack.

Title: 这可是你说的，卖身契拿出来吧
Transcript: 🎼 盼星星盼月亮，盼着深山出太阳，终于把您给盼了了。奇感奇感。您是我是人力资源中心员工关系与企业研化部的副组长马杰啊，以后您就是我的下属的。哎呀，领导，先跟您进行一次薪资谈谈。您现在的职位是专员，职级是K7，按照集团的标准，您给的职位的年薪是数有24万。不是。😊🎼每年15薪加上奖金，各种补助补贴，一年到手大概36万左右。请稍等，我报留给一下兴趣，这只是集团的普通标准。对于您这样重要的人才，我觉得年薪应该上调到最高标准的40万。这还是你说的耐心去麻出。爸，您是指聘用合同对，找卖踏实。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 公交车暴躁帅哥和服务员帅哥
Transcript: 🎼相信最近各位都被这两部番刷平了吧。第一步是公交车的暴躁帅哥，男主在公交车上偶遇了一个体育生帅哥，看着帅哥的18块腹肌，他幻想着自己有一天也能锻炼的这么厉害。然而，他羡慕的眼光，被帅哥不小心看到，还以为男主想偷他东西随后，男主就被丢下了公交车，第二步是服务员，服务员替两个客人端上了拿手好菜。然而，两个顾客吃都没吃，就说菜难吃，看到故意找茬的两人服务员并没有生气，而是使用自己的拿手。😡替两个客人重新加工了菜，善良的服务员也迎来了两个客人的一致好评。
Label: Normal

Transcript: 怎么了？宝宝。😊

The groups are central to the narrative, but they are not framed as ethnic, religious, or national groups—rather as relational roles among women.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown toward a group’s jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory in a generalized way. However, the tone appears more like a dramatized argument/retaliation than a fear-inducing depiction of an out-group.

The evidence is the portrayal of one woman attacking another and another intervening, but it is not supported with broader claims or systematic generalization beyond the scenario.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception does not clearly prescribe exclusion or generalized harm toward a protected group. It depicts retaliation/physical confrontation as part of the storyline ("出气", "找死"), which can be read as endorsing interpersonal hostility within the depicted relational roles, but not as a call for broader group-based violence or dehumanization.

Title: 《伊索寓言》：狼与母山羊
Transcript: 母山羊在陡峭的山崖上吃草，狼无法捉到它，便劝说他赶快下来，免得一不小心掉进山谷里，还说在自己身边的草地多好呀。青草茂盛鲜嫩，还有许多花。母山羊回答说，你不是真心喊我去吃草，而是让我去填饱你的肚子，这是说尽管坏人老奸巨猾，但在聪明人面前，他们的诡计仍是枉费心机。😡
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video depicts a fable character labeled as “狼” (wolf) interacting with “母山羊” (mother goat). The central “group” in threat-perception terms is not a human ethnicity/religion, but the wolf as a predatory antagonist and the goat as the vulnerable party. The wolf’s role is central to the moral message about deception and danger.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a narrative sense: the wolf tries to lure the mother goat down from a steep cliff, warning she could fall into a valley. This is framed as a tactic to enable capture/harm (“填饱你的肚子” / to fill the wolf’s belly). Evidence: the wolf’s persuasion to change the goat’s location and the explicit intent to eat her.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The threat is primarily moral/behavioral rather than cultural or religious. The wolf is framed as “老奸巨猾” (cunning, scheming) whose deception fails in front of “聪明人” (a wise person). Evidence: the goat’s rebuttal that the wolf’s words are not genuine care but manipulation for consumption.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates unease through the moral framing of deception and predation. Means: a cautionary tone (warning about falling), an adversarial framing of the wolf’s persuasion, and the emotional emphasis in the transcript (including an angry/condemning reaction marker). Imagery is static (book/illustration style), but the editing/text presentation highlights the warning and the moral condemnation.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype of the wolf as inherently deceitful and predatory—using “good-sounding” advice to achieve harmful ends. The transcript treats this as evidence of the wolf’s character: the wolf’s ‘concern’ is interpreted as a cover for eating the goat.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No direct endorsement of harm or exclusion toward a real-world group. The fable’s conclusion is a moral lesson: recognize deception and resist manipulation (“在聪明人面前…枉费心机”). The threat perception does not prescribe violence; it prescribes skepticism and prudence.

Title: 丁丁变大，1年半不反弹，全球最新阴茎增大技术上线！
Transcript: 🎼阴茎微小，对大小不满意。与报道呢，国外现在有的研究机构研制了一种新型的填充剂powerfi。通过注入呢人体较深的这个真皮层或者皮下组织，可以自然很好的产生阴茎增大增粗，甚至啊有一些臀部矫正的一些效果，而且呢可以维持一年半以上的这个填充效果。不过呢目前国内还没有注射使用。如果在国内上市，你会选择使用吗？
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: No intergroup social group is meaningfully targeted. The video discusses a medical/cosmetic procedure for penis enlargement (a health/sexual-content topic) and mentions '国外' (foreign) vs '国内' (domestic) availability. 'Foreigners' are not depicted as a social group with central relevance; the central subject is the product/procedure.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame any group as a material threat to jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory. It presents a procedure as potentially effective and long-lasting, and notes domestic availability is lacking.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. There is no framing of any group as threatening values, culture, religion, morals, or a way of life. The '国外/国内' distinction is logistical (where the research/usage exists), not cultural or moral threat.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Minimal. The tone appears informational/advertorial with a question to viewers ('你会选择使用吗？'). While sexual insecurity could be implied by the opening ('阴茎微小，对大小不满意'), the video does not use fear-based imagery or editing to create threat-related unease toward a group.
itt_response.stereotype_support: None. The content does not invoke negative stereotypes about any demographic or social group. It references research institutions and a product name, without attributing negative traits to a group.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. There is no call for exclusion, hostility, or harm toward any group. The only implied decision is whether to use the procedure if it becomes available domestically.

Title: 小仙女用荧光液泼劳斯莱斯，事后直接定损70万，车主：我不认识她
Transcript: 🎼这下小仙女彻底完大了，拿桶荧光液就敢往劳斯莱斯里坡，给前排大牢车主都看懵了。哎，妹妹玩的真变态呀，妹妹。😊咱们直接进入到事后环节。小仙女这一波，这辆劳斯莱斯直接定损近70万。根据车主提供的报价单，深度清洗3000，左侧门音响75000，车门电机加传感器60万，合计678000，并且大牢车主重点声明自己跟这个女的不熟，维修费一分都不能少。据说小仙女酒醒后跪地哭着求原谅。至于车主最后有没有让她赔，咱就不知道了，只能说登变台。😡
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a woman referred to as “小仙女” (a young woman/“princess-like” stereotype). She is the main subject of the narrative and is central to the message, but the content does not clearly target a protected social group (e.g., ethnicity, nationality, religion).
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video depicts property damage (spraying fluorescent liquid on a Rolls-Royce) and subsequent repair costs. This is framed as an individual’s wrongdoing rather than a material threat posed by a social group to jobs, safety, health, or territory.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Some. The narration uses moralized language (“变态,” “完大了,” “酒醒后跪地哭着求原谅”) and frames the person as violating norms of behavior and responsibility. However, it is not tied to cultural/religious values of an intergroup category; it is primarily a moral judgment about conduct.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes, mild-to-moderate discomfort is created. Means include sensational, accusatory narration, dramatic framing of the damage and large repair bill, and editing that emphasizes the act and close-ups of the car/fluorescent liquid. The tone is mocking/condemning, which can heighten unease about similar “reckless” behavior.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video reinforces a negative stereotype about a “princess/pretty girl” persona being irresponsible, deviant, and causing costly trouble (“小仙女” behaving “变态,” needing to pay/being punished). The evidence is presented as the single incident and the repair quote, not as broader empirical claims.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No explicit endorsement of harm or exclusion. While it implies punishment/financial responsibility (“维修费一分都不能少”) and uses contemptuous language, it does not advocate violence or systematic exclusion toward a group.

Transcript: 妈宝男妈，你听见了吗？人侮辱我，我天天自己吃，自己喝，自己能上桌，每天自行睡觉8小时，独立拉屎，还不用拿纸跟谁俩。😡

Editing appears to use reaction/contrast shots and emphatic subtitles, reinforcing negative affect rather than fear of physical danger.

Title: 汉子婊，女兄弟？恶心
Transcript: 🎼この.那你怎么回事？我刚刚让你帮我的奶茶，你不拿，你现在帮他背包，奶茶包真的好重啊，我们在认识半年了，比不过他，你。😡
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a romantic/relational dynamic and labels a woman as a derogatory term (title: “汉子婊，女兄弟？恶心”), implying she is a “traitor/cheater” type within a friendship/relationship context. The targeted social group is not an ethnicity or religion, but a gendered/relational in-group/out-group category defined by perceived disloyalty (a woman framed as “bitch/恶心”).
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat to safety, jobs, health, or territory is shown. The only “evidence” is interpersonal conflict: someone is not helping with carrying/tea, and the speaker claims the relationship/friendship is being undermined (“我们在认识半年了，比不过他”).
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a moral/relational sense. The derogatory framing (“婊”“恶心”) and the narrative that the person “switches” to help someone else (“你现在帮他背包…我们在认识半年了，比不过他”) constructs a threat to values like loyalty, friendship boundaries, and trust.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video uses anger/accusation tone (subtitle/emotion markers like 😡), confrontational dialogue, and comedic/edited emphasis (split-screen/overlay captions) to create discomfort and suspicion toward the labeled person. The music/editing appears to support a dramatic, confrontational mood rather than fear of physical harm.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype of a woman as deceitful/immoral and disloyal (gendered insult “婊/恶心”), presented as justified by the interpersonal behavior shown (choosing to help another person instead of the speaker). The “evidence” is behavioral and interpreted through a moralizing lens rather than factual substantiation.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception does not clearly call for violence or formal exclusion, but it does endorse hostility through dehumanizing/insulting language and implied social rejection (accusation, contempt, and framing the person as disgusting/undesirable).

Title: 手淫频繁，会导致脱发、掉发吗？
Transcript: 🎼脱发的原因好多了，和肾有关系，就是肾虚可以是脱发。因为肾呢属于早谁的，出发的，所以这个脱发肾虚有关系，可以脱发。另外一个脱发，还有一个皮肤病，皮脂炎局部头部是吧？有些疮，有些壁子分泌过度也可以脱发，但这和肾没啥关系了，这这是个皮肤面的，和肾有关系，还是有个就是肾虚有关系。

Title: 外阴骚痒，就是阴道炎吗？
Transcript: 그.你因为外阴瘙痒就是阴道炎嘛，那就太片面了。今天一起来学习一下。第一个最常见的导致瘙痒的疾病呢就是霉菌性的阴道炎分泌物呢就是成典型的豆腐渣样。这种痒呢是非常难忍耐的。我们一般呢要遵循医嘱，使用克霉唑类的或者米康唑类的等等一些药物去对症治疗。还有呢第二个就是瘙痒呢，还有可能是外阴白斑，有一些女性呢我们会发现她这个外阴呢是有一些白斑或者白斑前的一个指征。所以这个。一定要及时的去就诊。那还有一个呢就是外阴的湿疹，也是临床比较常见的。很多女性来了以后，由于她的描述不清楚，按照阴道炎治了很长时间，发现并没有治好。，那我们仔细检查完了以后，发现它不是阴道的炎症，而是外阴的一个湿疹。那么对症治疗以后呢，发现就痊愈了。所以当你出现外阴瘙痒的时候，一定要跟大夫做一个充分的沟通，对症治疗。
Label: Normal

Title: 女性阴道有多长？
Transcript: 🎼阴道作为女性的性交气管，也是排出月经和免珠胎儿的管道，它是由粘膜、基层和外膜组成，不有弹性。女性阴道的长度并没有标准的所致，一般是在9到11公分左右，宽度和容纳两个手指头，阴道壁有许多横温周臂有较大的伸缩性和弹性，兴奋时，阴道深度增加3分之1，宽度也会增加。女性分娩。只径可达到10个公分，胎儿的头也能顺利通过阴道，这些都能使我们想象到女性阴道有多大的容纳性。
Label: Normal

Title: 【每日谈男题】男人阴茎多长算正常？
Transcript: 🎼.大家好，欢迎来到每一谈难题。很多朋友很在乎自己弟弟的大小，发私信问我这个问题，那么多长算正常呢？在医学上疲软状态下算3到5厘米，隔起后一般要乘以2，也就是6到10厘米以上算是正常的，是标准的。阴茎大小一般和个人的体质遗传等因素都有关系。这里是每一谈难题，我们下期再见吧，拜拜。

Title: 《小仙女之保护哈基米》希望火速立法
Transcript: 🎼可能袁通山想不通，为什么我们会那么愤怒，我来告诉你吧，你以为我们只是在单单看小猫吗？不是的，很多女性在透过这个现象看到了另一个几乎一模一样的现象，那就是。小猫是困在了一座猴山里面，他逃无法逃出去，而被拐入大山的女性，同样如此，他们困在一座大山，他们也同样逃不出去。小猫换了一批又一批，女性被拐了一批又一批，让我们感到愤怒的是小猫无能为力反抗的，要反抗的样子，是小猫任意被挤的。另一只猴子，只要心情不开心就可以拖着打他的样子，是任意一只猴子，在他身上发现自己的欲望的时候，我们看到了大山里面的另一个影子。同样的，他也逃不出那座大山。其实我挺喜欢云南的，我很喜欢。😊🎼的大理，我几乎每年都会去一次去玩一玩，但是我不会再去远头山动物园去看，不会再去。我支持反虐待动物法逆法。如果我们对一只猫的死亡漫不经心，我们也会同样漫不经心的蔑视人的痛苦和生命。

Title: 乳腺有增生结节 手部3个“乳房反射区”结节自己消
Transcript: 🎼 第一个呢是内关穴，内关穴就在我们手臂的内侧中间，在外关节横纹上三横指的宽处啊，拇指按揉1到3分钟，以酸胀为宜。第二个呢是颌骨穴，颌骨穴在我们的手背第一二掌骨间。那么第二掌骨的中点指处也是拇指去按揉。第三个呢是点掐我们的会阴点，手部的会阴穴啊位于小指的中关节上寻找穴位的时候啊，可以将我们的小指弯曲成钩状，然后用。用指甲按揉小指中关节的内侧，经常按以上三个穴位，对乳腺增生和乳房的肿块有辅助治疗的作用。

Title: 吸烟会不会导致阴茎变短吗
Transcript: 🎼吸烟会不会导致阴茎变短呢？严格来说呢，应该是不会。但是烟草里面呢含有一些尼固丁对阴茎排名体血管，它有一个明显的一个损伤，而且是不可逆的。它可以导致生殖性在勃血的过程中呢充血可能会变差一些。这样呢就显得阴茎可能会短一些，甚至呢会导致阳痿早泄，所以吸烟是严重危害男性功能的一种不良的行为。建议各位男性朋友呢还是戒烟。
Label: Normal

Title: 小郑锐评厌男症
Transcript: 评价一下两个怪物啊，我恐难症越来越厉害了，靠近成年男性TM害怕距离在1米之内，手都是抖的，建议不要使用任何和男性有关的APP只要开发人员有男性，我建议你不要使用。最后你们给我来一句艳男不等于不使用，跟男性有关的东西。糖妞不等式，直接秒了。我给兄弟们读个评论哦。请问有男生靠近就会恶心想吐，呼吸。急促是恐难的表现吗？对此，我只能评价臭烂裤裆，自己下边塞了几根，咱说白了你能不清楚吗？还搁这装艳艳男呢，有时候看见这些逆天评论，我真想狠狠的给他。.
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on adult men/males as the primary subject of fear and avoidance. It repeatedly frames “male-related” things (e.g., apps with male developers) as something the speaker should not engage with, making men a central element of the message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, in a health/physical-comfort sense: the speaker claims that when adult men get close (within 1 meter) they experience shaking hands, nausea, vomiting-like disgust, and breathing/respiratory distress, presenting men as a direct trigger for bodily harm or impairment. The “evidence” is the speaker’s personal reactions and the quoted comment describing nausea/vomiting and rapid breathing as symptoms.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video implies a moral/identity threat through derogatory framing of men and male-attributed content as “disgusting,” “evil,” and something to be rejected. It also uses dehumanizing/insulting language (e.g., “怪物,” “臭烂裤裆”) and suggests that male-related content/comments represent a harmful social phenomenon (“逆天评论”).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Strong unease is created through first-person fear language (“恐难症越来越厉害,” “TM害怕,” “手都是抖的”), urgency (“建议不要使用任何和男性有关的APP”), and hostile disgust reactions (nausea, vomiting, breathing issues). The editing uses bold yellow captions emphasizing fear/avoidance and includes a graphic cartoon image, reinforcing discomfort and aversion.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Negative stereotypes are invoked: men are treated as inherently threatening/contaminating to the speaker’s body and emotions; male presence is equated with disgust and sickness; and male-related platforms are framed as unsafe by default. The quoted comment reinforces the stereotype that seeing men causes immediate nausea and that such reactions are a “condition” triggered by men.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: Yes. The accumulated threat perception leads to exclusionary guidance: “建议不要使用任何和男性有关的APP” and “只要开发人员有男性，我建议你不要使用.” It also escalates to violent/hostile intent in phrasing (“真想狠狠的给他”), indicating endorsement of hostility rather than neutral avoidance.

Title: 一味好药，让阴茎勃起更有力
Transcript: Yeah.🎼一味好药让阴茎勃血更有利，有的男性朋友啊欲性欲比较旺盛，平时总有很多想法，但是硬度差、症合疲软，还有药膝酸染、四肢怕冷、饮尿频毒等症状。夏春告诉你呢，这个情况是肾阳不足所致，可以用中成药、复方苁溶胶囊素调理，它有温补肾阳的功效，它是由肉苁茸、营养护等传统的分养组成，可以把阳痿早泄、药息酸染等症状调理好，但是呢要在医生的冰症甲用药，先不可以盲目服用，药不地症会延误病情。我是中阴下谷春关注我。且更多的蓝科知识。

Title: 《睾丸扭转》
Transcript: 。🎼睾丸扭转是指睾丸和精索，在阴囊内发生扭转，导致睾丸血供减少，从而发生睾丸缺血性坏死，具体表现为阴囊局部剧烈疼痛、肿胀，可向大腿根放射，腹部放射。青少年患者发生上述症状时，应该尽快到医院泌尿科男科就诊。因为发病6小时以内。为治疗的最佳时间，随着时间延长就会出现不可逆的睾丸损伤，甚至需要切除睾丸了。

Title: 霉菌阴道炎易反复发作，豆腐渣样白带，外阴痒，灼热感，治疗其实也很简单
Transcript: 🎼你总觉得下身特别痒，总是想烧抓，还有火辣辣灼热的感觉，白带的量也特别多，豆腐渣一样的那有可能就是霉菌性阴道炎了。这种阴道炎它典型的症状就是这样的。严重了呢，排尿的时候以及性生活的时候都会有疼痛和瘙痒感。中医认为呢是带下病、阴养病，主要是由脾虚湿困导致，加上气候潮湿等外来因素的失血入侵引起内湿和外。相互作用，因为湿性粘滞，所以病程长，霉菌性阴道炎呢容易反复发作，中医调理体质，调整生活和饮食上的不良习惯就会得到明显的改善。

Title: 继金彩源后aespa Karina被指控整容乳房手术！较大的腋下疤痕让网友怀疑植入相当大！
Transcript: 🎼近日，苏长上传了一段名为艾斯帕卡维娜，这不是很自然吗？终于手术痕迹被揭露的视频。在youtu视频中，苏长指责埃斯帕卡维娜接受了乳房手术，自首次亮相以来，卡瑞娜因其身材丰满而备受关注，然而人们指出她看起来不自然，以知孝为天生的身材为例子，为了处理胸部的重量，制造的T形肌肉发达，手臂上有一些脂肪，卡瑞娜没有发育出T形肌肉手臂非常苗条。尽管如此，她的胸部仍然很大。然而，过去的照片显示，她从一开始就有一些体积。罗的金彩员被指控接受整容胸部手术，在她胸部附近的腋窝上看到了一道伤疤，这是表明开骨刀的遗痕迹。很快，一张卡瑞娜伤疤的照片在网上浮出水面，伤疤出现在他的腋下，也靠近他的腋窝。据说这是乳房手术留下的手术疤痕。由于这是一个很大的伤疤。网友们认为是用的植入物一定相当大。一些安派的粉丝们不相信这一点。对此，大家有什么看法吗？艾特韩舍梅尔姐说，最新韩语怀内赞和订阅哦。

Title: 装什么无辜白莲花。
Transcript: 🎼果剑仙君请坐坐就不必了。阿静，当初在大泽山，我并非有意欺骗，要不是情况危急，我也不会像你。古禁曾恋慕殿下，但并非愚蠢。有些话说一次便够再说便是过了，你这是何意。即便当初你输鹰王之手，对于白鸟岛并无半分危害，不是吗？若是我输了，那仙界各门都会以为我白鸟岛软弱可欺。所以你便将我的相助之心踩在脚底，故意炼化了遮天伞了。我没有故意恋化，遮天伞乃是我师尊的半神器。在于你与鹰王短暂。离稀半刻交战时间中想要炼化他，根本不可能。既然你全都知道为何不直接揭穿我的谎言。你一见女君，撑起着偌大的白鸟打尸蜀，我没有强行收回遮天伞，是因为至少这句话你没有骗我。殿下相识一场，当初的维护知恩古尽，铭记于心，不禁只愿与殿下再无交集。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on interpersonal conflict between characters associated with a faction/territory called “白鸟岛” (White Bird Island) and related figures (e.g., “鹰王,” “仙界各门”). No protected social group (race, ethnicity, nationality, religion, etc.) is clearly targeted; the salient “group” is a fictional political/territorial faction.
itt_response.realistic_threat: The narrative implies a strategic/territorial threat: the character is accused of deliberately “炼化了遮天伞” (forging/using a powerful artifact) and of potentially causing harm to the island’s standing if she were to lose. Evidence shown in subtitles: “对于白鸟岛并无半分危害，不是吗？” and discussion that if she lost, “仙界各门都会以为我白鸟岛软弱.” This is about power/advantage rather than safety/health/resource deprivation in a real-world sense.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: There is symbolic threat framing around trust, loyalty, and honor within the factional moral order. The accused character is portrayed as deceitful (“谎言,” “欺骗,” “故意炼化”), and the conflict is about betrayal of values (maintaining alliances, gratitude, and integrity). Evidence: repeated emphasis on deception and intent (“并非有意欺骗,” “故意炼化,” “你这是何意,” “你一见女君…”).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease is created through accusatory dialogue, tense confrontational tone, and dramatic court/imperial setting visuals (palace architecture, formal costumes). Editing uses close-ups and reaction shots with emphatic subtitles (e.g., “直接打断,” “不是吗,” “故意炼化了…”). No imagery suggests fear of an out-group in a generalized social sense; discomfort is directed at the alleged traitor/deceiver.
itt_response.stereotype_support: No clear real-world negative stereotypes about a protected class are invoked. Within the fictional context, a negative stereotype of a “deceiver/traitor” is reinforced: the character is framed as manipulative and dishonest, using a powerful artifact to undermine others. Evidence: “故意炼化,” “谎言,” “欺骗,” and the framing of her actions as intentional betrayal.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception leads to interpersonal/factional condemnation rather than explicit calls for violence or exclusion of a protected group. The dialogue culminates in distancing (“不禁只愿与殿下再无交集”) and moral judgment. There is no explicit endorsement of harming an out-group; hostility is directed toward the specific character’s alleged betrayal within the story.

Title: 开原艳后，讲述变性人的心酸
Transcript: 🎼经常会有些网友呢质疑我们这种第山性别者在公共场所应该去哪里去方便呢？是去男厕还是女厕呢？因为所有的CD人妖啊都是男人变的，不管是去哪里，都必须去男厕，绝对不可以去女厕。🎼除了变性人，因为通过手术呢改造了自己的身体结构，可以和女人一样拥有女人的身份和特征，包括洗澡啊、去浴池啊，都必须去南浴。除了变性人可以去淋，其他都不可以。经常。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on transgender people (specifically trans women/“变性人/人妖/第山性别者” as referenced in the transcript). The group is central to the message because the narration focuses on where they should be allowed to go in public facilities (toilets/bathhouses) and repeatedly frames their presence as a special case requiring rules.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, it implies a material/safety or public-facility threat by asserting that transgender people are inherently male and therefore must use male restrooms, and that they are not allowed in female restrooms. The “evidence” presented is categorical claims about anatomy/identity (“所有的…都是男人变的…必须去男厕，绝对不可以去女厕”) and about post-surgery body structure (“通过手术…可以和女人一样拥有女人的身份和特征…都必须去南浴/女浴池” with conflicting facility claims). This is used to justify exclusion from shared spaces.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. It frames transgender people as threatening social norms and gender boundaries in public life—i.e., the “values/way of life” of sex-segregated spaces and the moral-cultural expectation that women’s spaces remain for “women.” The transcript’s repeated insistence on strict restroom/bathhouse segregation (“除了变性人…绝对不可以…其他都不可以”) positions the group as undermining the cultural order of gendered facilities.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates unease by using a confrontational, policing tone (posed as “网友质疑…应该去哪里去方便呢？”) and by emphasizing “must”/“absolutely not” restrictions. Editing/visuals show a person speaking with on-screen text like “开源艳后…讲述变性人的心酸,” while the audio/text focuses on bathroom access dilemmas, which functions to heighten discomfort and suspicion about transgender presence in women’s spaces.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative and essentialist stereotypes: (1) transgender people are equated with men (“都是男人变的”), (2) their gender identity is treated as illegitimate or deceptive, and (3) their presence in women’s facilities is treated as inherently problematic. It also implies that transgender people’s bodies/intentions are the basis for exclusion, using surgery/anatomy as a justification while still denying their right to access gendered spaces consistent with identity.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception leads to exclusionary prescriptions. The transcript explicitly advocates denying transgender people access to certain facilities (“绝对不可以去女厕,” “其他都不可以”), which is an endorsement of discriminatory restriction rather than harm, but it does prescribe hostile/exclusionary treatment toward the group.
