Title: 看见男人就烦，你有可能是厌男症！
Transcript: 🎼你是否有过这样一种感受，你看每一个男性都觉得不像是好人，对于接近自己的男性有种说不出的厌恶感，并认为所有的陌生男性都不怀好意，那你有可能得了厌男症，这会让你对男性群体带有极端的仇恨和强烈的偏见，厌男症的出现，可能与成长经历有关。小时候父亲的画榜样，或者在学生或恋爱时期，受到过男性的攻击、背叛，从而对男性形成了强烈的排斥感。女性攻情力本就高于男性在看到由男。引起的恶性事件时，非常容易联想到自己，进而强化了对男性的极端负面看法。但无论你有厌女症还是厌男症，都要客观的看待身边异性，客服概括化的思维方式，才能化解负面情绪。😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on the social group “men” (男性群体) as the primary subject of the message. It repeatedly frames the viewer’s reactions toward men as a condition (“厌男症”) and discusses how this can produce extreme hatred and bias toward the male group.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown (e.g., no direct evidence of men threatening jobs, safety, health, or resources). The transcript references “恶性事件” and personal experiences of “攻击、背叛,” but these are presented as psychological triggers for the viewer’s perception rather than as concrete, ongoing dangers posed by men as a group in the video.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The video frames men as a threat to trust and moral safety—portraying male presence as associated with “不怀好意,” “极端负面看法,” and “强烈的偏见.” It also implies that male-perpetrated “恶性事件” can be mentally generalized into a broader worldview that men are inherently harmful.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video is designed to evoke discomfort and suspicion toward men. It uses direct address (“你是否有过这样一种感受”), emotionally loaded language (厌恶、说不出的厌恶感、极端的仇恨和强烈的偏见), and editing that pairs scenes of women reacting/feeling disgust with captions about male hostility. The tone is cautionary but still foregrounds fear/disgust as the viewer’s likely experience.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype that men (as a group) are untrustworthy or harmful—e.g., “所有的陌生男性都不怀好意,” and that men can “攻击、背叛” and cause “恶性事件.” It treats these as plausible bases for generalized suspicion, even while attributing the condition to individual growth experiences.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The transcript explicitly warns against extreme hatred and urges objectivity (“客服概括化的思维方式，才能化解负面情绪”). However, it also describes the threat perception as potentially leading to “极端的仇恨和强烈的偏见.” It does not prescribe violence or direct harm, but it acknowledges a pathway toward hostility/exclusionary attitudes.

It uses direct address (“你是否有过这样一种感受”), emotionally loaded language (厌恶、说不出的厌恶感、极端的仇恨和强烈的偏见), and editing that pairs scenes of women reacting/feeling disgust with captions about male hostility. The tone is cautionary but still foregrounds fear/disgust as the viewer’s likely experience.",
  "stereotype_support": "It reinforces a negative stereotype that men (as a group) are untrustworthy or harmful—e.g., “所有的陌生男性都不怀好意,” and that men can “攻击、背叛” and cause “恶性事件.” It treats these as plausible bases for generalized suspicion, even while attributing the condition to individual growth experiences.",
  "hostility_prescription": "The transcript explicitly warns against extreme hatred and urges objectivity (“客服概括化的思维方式，才能化解负面情绪”). However, it also describes the threat perception as potentially leading to “极端的仇恨和强烈的偏见.” It does not prescribe violence or direct harm, but it acknowledges a pathway toward hostility/exclusionary attitudes."
}

Title: 感染HPV后，什么情况下需要做阴道镜？
Transcript: 그.🎼在什么情况下需要做阴道镜检查呢？我们正规的宫颈癌筛查是三阶梯筛查。第一阶梯呢就是TCT和HPV的筛查。第二阶梯才是阴道镜。第三阶梯呢就是活检。什么样的情况下，我们建议病人去做阴道镜呢？啊？这有几种情况。第一个就是发现了HPV16跟18阳性。因为这两个病毒是跟宫颈癌关系非常的密切。一旦发现161八性阳性。不管TCT的结果是怎样的，都建议您去做阴道。的检查。第二个呢就是发现宫颈的病变了。比如说TCT报了一个低级别病变或者是高级级别病病变这种不管HPV结果如何，我们会建议您做阴道镜检查。第三种就是TCTHPV全都是有问题的那这种是一定要做阴道镜的检查的。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses patients’ health status related to HPV infection and cervical cancer screening pathways (e.g., HPV16/18 positive, abnormal TCT results). No social group defined by protected characteristics (race, ethnicity, nationality, religion, etc.) is depicted; the “target” is medical risk status rather than an intergroup social group.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The content frames HPV-related findings as a health/medical risk requiring follow-up (colposcopy), not as a threat to jobs, safety, resources, or territory. Evidence: guidance such as “发现HPV16跟18阳性…都建议…做阴道镜检查,” and “TCT报了…病变…建议…阴道镜检查.”
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. There is no framing of HPV-infected individuals as threatening cultural values, morals, religion, or a way of life. The messaging is clinical/diagnostic (screening tiers and indications).
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some mild health-related concern is induced through medical urgency (e.g., “一定要做阴道镜检查,” “不管…结果如何都建议”). However, it is delivered in a professional, informational tone with no fear-mongering imagery or hostile cues. Evidence: doctor on camera, explanatory captions about screening steps and indications.
itt_response.stereotype_support: None. The video does not invoke negative stereotypes about any social group. It uses biomedical categories (HPV types, TCT results) as the basis for recommendations.

Title: 流氓不可怕，就怕流氓有文化！
Transcript: 🎼婚姻这个东西对于他们来讲是结局，对于我们不是啊，对于我们也许只是一个开始，就好像说是吃饭。婚姻之后就是一辈子要吃这一顿饭一起吃饭。你想知道米的味道，那先得把米煮成熟，你愿意跟我一起把米煮成熟法。亲爱的说，你真是个空虚的男我很实在，不是你摸摸的你摸糊。😡 🎼还很无耻，但不是最无趣的，无趣自觉，有趣，下流自闭上流人路，这就是一种修养啊，你太糟糕了，糟糕，但是总能过得去吧。咱们俩是一样的，别胡说八道，你的左手就是我的有势，你猥琐，你一直在玩这，你又没有执着呀，何自己干什么？亲爱的人。😡点赞必脱单。😊
Label: Normal

Thus, the “group” is behavior-based (a type of person) and is moderately central to the framing via repeated emphasis in the title/subtitles.

Title: 站着发生关系，竟然不算强奸！涨知识了
Transcript: .站着发生关系，竟然不算强奸。张女士因为网络认识了一男子，随后就奔现了。喝完酒后，男子为了表示绅士风度，就送张女士回家，结果到了家中，情男子已，俩人就在客厅站着发生了关系。不巧这时，张女士的同居室友回来了，正好看到这一幕，张女士看到回来的室友大喊，快报警，他强奸我，随后室友便报警了。那么该男子构成强奸罪吗？法院认为站。😊发生关系本身有一定难度，如果女方不同意男方很难实行，所以判定男子无罪。那您认为这个判决合理吗？
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on gender/sex-related dynamics in a sexual assault legal case, specifically involving a woman (张女士) and a man accused of rape. The “group” most salient to the message is not an ethnic/religious group but rather men as a category in the context of sexual consent/violence, with women as the affected party.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video discusses a specific criminal case and its legal outcome (court decision of not constituting rape). It does not depict men as broadly causing ongoing material harm to society, nor does it provide evidence of a generalized threat to jobs/safety/resources/territory.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No clear. The framing is about legal interpretation of consent and what constitutes rape (“站着发生关系…不算强奸”), not about threatening cultural values or a way of life. While it touches on morals/consent norms, it does so in a legal/educational context rather than as a claim that a group undermines society.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some. The narrative includes a sexual assault allegation (“他强奸我”) and the tension of consent/legality, which can create discomfort. However, the tone appears explanatory/interview-like (host speaking on camera) rather than sensational; no extreme imagery or dehumanizing visuals are shown.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Limited/indirect. The video implies that physical circumstances (standing sex, difficulty of force if the woman does not consent) affect legal culpability. This can be interpreted as reinforcing a stereotype that women’s non-consent makes rape “hard to carry out,” but it is presented as a court-reasoning/legal argument rather than an explicit blanket claim about men’s nature.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. The video does not advocate harm, exclusion, or hostility toward any group. It poses a question about whether the verdict is reasonable, but does not prescribe retaliatory or discriminatory actions.

Title: 欲望强，阴茎易举，但是也容易软下去，怎么办
Transcript: 🎼欲望强，阴茎易举，但是也容易软下去，怎么办？平时欲望也不小，受到刺激就能勃起，但是呢难以持久，不到3分钟就射精了，严重的可能还没射精，阴茎就软下去了，平时可能会伴有阴囊潮湿，口口口臭，身皮乏力，身体沉重，大便还经常不成型，舌苔比较黄腻，病期在于湿热过重，留住于阴茎或者湿热上征，引动下火，造成欲望非常强，湿热扰动金观，导致早泄，在调理上以清理下胶湿热为主，湿热一除，自然能够强劲持久。
Label: Normal

Title: 今年真是高产如母猪的一年

Title: 两味药用好了，打开阴茎血管，让勃起更坚挺
Transcript: Yeah.。两味药用好了，打开阴茎血脉，让勃起更坚强。开了30多年阳痿早泄的方子啊，有两味中药是我经常用到的，它疗效呢也非常好。第一味药就是丹参。丹参这个药啊既能够活血化瘀，也能够补血。对于呢气质血液型的阳痿导致的硬度菜啊，有很不错的疗效，还有一味药可以和丹参强强联手，它就。是传胸，穿芎这个药啊是活血行气，使这个虾胶的血液更加通畅。你别看这两个药很普通，但是运用好了呢，帮你恢复硬度，治疗这个阳痿啊不再是难题了。
Label: Normal

Title: 一双破鞋穿不烂，张三扔了李四穿
Transcript: 🎼一双破鞋穿不烂，张三扔了李四穿，不是破鞋的款式好，而是谁穿谁合脚。别怪我没提醒你，记得穿袜子得了脚气可不好治。这话确实挺难听的，相信也有很多人会对号入座，他们会喷火。但是现实生活当中又有多少人不是这样的呢？所以说你别觉得他能跟你睡，就沾沾自喜，他能跟你睡，就能跟别人睡。大家说说是不是这个领呢评论区留言。
Label: Hateful

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a stigmatized sexual/relationship category implied by the term “破鞋” (a derogatory label for a woman perceived as sexually promiscuous). It is not tied to a protected class (e.g., race/religion), but it is a social group defined by perceived sexual behavior/sexual reputation, made central through the title and repeated on-screen captions.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat is presented to jobs, physical safety, territory, or resources. The only health-related element is a general claim about “脚气” (athlete’s foot) being “not good to treat,” used metaphorically alongside the derogatory label; it does not establish a concrete, evidence-based health risk to others.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a moral-symbolic sense: the derogatory framing implies a threat to sexual/moral norms and trustworthiness in relationships (“谁穿谁合脚,” “别怪我没提醒你,” “他能跟你睡，就能跟别人睡”). The message positions the labeled person as violating expected sexual morality and as untrustworthy.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video creates discomfort and moral suspicion through a harsh, judgmental tone (“这话确实挺难听的…对号入座…喷火”), direct insults in the title/wording, and conversational framing that encourages viewers to “对号入座” and judge others. Imagery shows a presenter outdoors with captions reinforcing the derogatory narrative; no threatening visuals are shown, but the rhetoric is accusatory.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a stereotype that women labeled as “破鞋” are promiscuous/unfaithful and that their presence in a relationship implies they will also sleep with others. It uses the “shoe” metaphor as purported evidence (“不是破鞋的款式好，而是谁穿谁合脚…他能跟你睡，就能跟别人睡”), presenting stigma as a logical conclusion rather than a personal or contextual claim.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception is used to justify social hostility/judgment rather than direct physical harm. It implicitly endorses exclusion or contempt (e.g., warning others, encouraging viewers to “喷火,” and treating the labeled person as untrustworthy). There is no explicit call for violence, but it promotes antagonistic attitudes toward the stigmatized group.

Title: 阴道镜检查的最佳时间，你一定要知道
Transcript: 🎼그.阴道镜检查的最佳时间呢，这个视频呢讲清楚。大家好，我是妇科薛医生。昨天晚上观看本丝私信的时候，看见有人问阴道镜检查呢，什么时间是最好。针对这个问题呢，就给大家出一期视频，建议收藏或者转发给需要的人。其实阴道镜检查也好，活检也好，尤其是想决定做活检的时候，我们一般都是建议月经刚干净以后做检查比较合适。因为这个时候呢做阴道镜活检会有创面。这个时候的话取完活检，这个创面呢就不太容易。🎼出血月经前呢，因为充血的原因呢，所以活解完以后，这个创面有可能会出血呀或者出血时间比较长。所以呢在月经刚刚结束以后是最佳的。做阴道镜活检的时间。一般情况下，医生预约阴道镜活检的话，也会给你一个建议的，大家清楚了吗？有问题留言，我来帮你解答。
Label: Normal

Title: 女子患“体内掉肉”怪病，子宫阴道等掉出体外，医生手术缓解尴尬
Transcript: 🎼11月2日，广东东莞张女士漏尿、便秘，排便困难，甚至下半身还总掉出一坨肉，掉肉是减肥成功吗？并不是这坨肉是从阴道里掉出，曾经两次手术都没治好，让她多年来有苦难言。她患上的是中老年女性中高发的盆腔器官脱垂，简单说就是子宫、阴道、膀胱等盆腔内器官，反而沿着阴道向外滑脱。经过进一步检查，医生发现，张女士是子宫切除术后出现的重度阴道后壁脱垂半直肠膨触。😡医生决定使用网片厚露修补会因体重建术，给盆底加了一张网片做的吊床，使盆腔脏器得到良好支撑，不再脱垂，缓解不是症状。术后，张女士排便不再费力，那坨肉也不再掉出。
Label: Normal

Title: 阴茎外洗法，丁丁变大变持久
Transcript: 🎼 让丁丁变坚挺，能有20分钟，在家就能做满分男人。这个好方法你可不能错过。前段时间，一个复诊的患者说，经过两周的调理，时间延长到20分钟，硬度也像黄瓜一样，每次发射能有一米多远。今天教大家变强的技巧，一般10天左右，你会看到变化。上面那位患者就是用的这个方法，然后再结合补肾填津的汤药，不到一个月时间，时间就延长到了20分钟，邦邦印。根据之前外洗降。一敏感度的方法，同时结合每个患者的体质辩证论治，已经帮助很多患者找回自信。如果你也需要的话，点个小红心加关注，在评论区留个6，我尽全力帮助你。

Title: 男生如果应对白莲花
Transcript: 🎼假如我是一朵高段位白莲花，我绝对不会告诉你最高级的套路就是没有套路。我可是要了半颗真心做赌注的。毕竟越高端的人群，那一套圆滑心机懂得都懂，我能让你感受到我这一份真诚，进而对我打开信任，对人心理解透彻的女生，他不会寄希望于一个男人的良心，而是懂得去引诱男人的私心，虽然万物不为我所有，但是万物一定皆为我所用。比方说我先观察你，识别你的自尊。心在哪里，进一步去满足你勾取你自恋的特质，这叫欲取之先与之。我多动嘴，少干事，大事小事都砍自己身上，这样的女人就太傻了。
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gendered social role/identity labeled “白莲花” (a manipulative/insincere woman archetype). It is highly central: the transcript and on-screen captions repeatedly describe how such a woman behaves and how she “wins” by exploiting others’ psychology.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No direct material threat is shown (no violence, no explicit claims about physical harm, safety, or resource/territory loss). The “threat” is framed more as interpersonal manipulation that could affect trust and relationships rather than jobs or public safety.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. It frames the “白莲花” archetype as a moral/values threat—specifically to sincerity, trust, and “good intentions.” Evidence includes claims that high-level people use “套路,” that the woman uses “真诚” as a tactic, and that she understands how to “引诱男人的私心,” undermining trust and genuine character.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video likely induces unease by presenting a calculated, strategic manipulation playbook. Means: confident instructional tone (“套路/没有套路/最高级的套路”), direct second-person guidance, and persuasive framing that the target can be “identified” and exploited. Imagery is a calm talking-head with dramatic night setting and emphatic subtitles, reinforcing a warning/alert feeling.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces a negative stereotype of women as potentially deceptive and manipulative when labeled “白莲花.” It presents “圆滑心机”“识别自尊”“满足自恋特质”“欲取之先与之”“多动嘴，少干事”等 as evidence that this archetype is inherently strategic, insincere, and self-serving.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The transcript does not explicitly call for violence or harm, but it implicitly endorses suspicion and defensive attitudes toward the “白莲花” archetype (i.e., treating them as untrustworthy and manipulators). This can function as a hostility/avoidance prescription (exclusion from trust/relationships) rather than direct aggression.

Title: 新婚之夜这样，这也太离谱了吧！#奇葩 #离谱 #妈宝男 #新婚之夜 #万万没想到
Transcript: 🎼这也太离谱了吧。网友说，新婚之夜，公婆在婚房待到晚上11点，要走的时候，她老公突然跪在地上，抱着她妈的腿痛哭流涕，她妈也蹲下来哭，两人抱头痛哭，难舍难分。她妈走了后，老公又独自一人哭到半夜两点，还和网友讲了一晚上和他妈小时候的故事。😊
Label: Normal

Title: 给妾室的名分还要傅音感恩戴德？

Title: 阴道镜检查全过程，到底有多疼
Transcript: 🎼阴道镜检查是一种常见的妇科检查，用于检查宫颈外阴或阴道区域的任何异常，包括炎症损伤或癌细胞增长。阴道镜检查期间，患者会被要求躺下，检查者将使用窥镜，打开阴道查看宫颈检查人员将拍摄宫颈被生理盐水清洗前的清晰图像涂抹溶液之前用少量生理盐水擦拭宫颈并拍摄图像，还需要使用醋酸。😊溶液浸染后再次拍摄图像，然后用炉哥点液对宫颈进行染色，并拍摄图像检查完成后，由医生对症状做出判断，整个时间大概在5到10分钟。
Label: Normal

Title: 原来花痴真的遗传…

Title: 绿茶，白莲花…
Transcript: 🎼你知道什么是绿茶吗？你知道模谁？你知道什么是绿茶吗？

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a social/identity-coded label rather than a protected class: “绿茶” (a derogatory term for a manipulative/insincere woman) and “白莲花” (a derogatory term for a hypocritical/saint-like woman). These labels are the core of the message and are repeatedly prompted by on-screen questions (“你知道什么是绿茶吗/白莲花吗”).
itt_response.realistic_threat: No concrete, material threat is shown (no evidence of violence, physical danger, or direct harm to jobs/safety/resources/territory). The content is explanatory/definitional and uses metaphorical descriptions (e.g., “不妖的君子,” “追求自由的象征,” “鲤”为志趣高远等), not factual claims of real-world harm.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a moral/social sense: the labels are framed as threats to interpersonal trust and perceived moral character. The video describes “绿茶” as someone who appears pure/innocent while being manipulative (“渗清莲而不染…不妖的君子” style framing), and “白莲花” similarly as a deceptive, hypocritical persona. This constitutes a threat to values/morals (authenticity, sincerity, trustworthiness) rather than to culture or religion broadly.

Means include: repeated rhetorical questions, instructional/definitional text overlays on solid backgrounds, and a confrontational/teasing tone implied by the title (“绿茶，白莲花…”) and the labeling language. No graphic imagery is present in the provided frames.

The video presents these stereotypes as explanatory “definitions,” implying they are reliable evidence of character.

However, the accumulated threat perception (deception/moral danger) implicitly supports social hostility (e.g., suspicion, contempt, or rejection of people fitting these labels) by treating them as inherently untrustworthy.

Title: 发现一个傻逼二次元
Transcript: 嗯，地下怎么会有个卡套，我操，这人怕不是一个傻逼二次元吧，卡套还整个卡通人物，二次元差不多得了，走了走了，得赶紧把他给扔了。😊嗯，我操这不卡ty娜吗？哦，原来是我。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a derogatory label aimed at a perceived “2D/anime otaku” social group (“二次元/卡通人物/傻逼二次元”). This group is central to the message via explicit insults and dismissal of the person/object associated with it.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat is shown. The frames depict keychain/card sleeves with an anime character and a person’s hands holding them; there is no evidence of danger to safety, health, jobs, resources, or territory. The only “threat” is the speaker’s impulse to throw the item away.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a symbolic/moral sense. The transcript frames the “2D/anime” person as morally inferior and culturally inappropriate (“二次元差不多得了,” “傻逼二次元”), implying a threat to acceptable norms/values rather than physical harm. The act of wanting to discard the item suggests rejection of the group’s presence in shared space.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Unease/discomfort is created through a hostile, irritated tone (“嗯，地下怎么会有个…我操…怕不是…傻逼二次元…得赶紧把他给扔了”). The editing/visuals are mostly mundane (showing the keychain), but the emotional framing comes from the aggressive language and urgency to remove/dispose of it.
itt_response.stereotype_support: The video invokes and reinforces a negative stereotype that anime/otaku people are “stupid/idiotic” and socially unacceptable (“傻逼二次元”). It treats the presence of an anime-themed item as evidence of the person’s character (“卡套还整个卡通人物…怕不是…”), using the object as a proxy for the group’s supposed traits.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated perception leads to exclusionary behavior: the speaker endorses discarding/throwing away the item associated with the group (“得赶紧把他给扔了”). While no direct physical violence is shown, the intent to remove the group’s presence from the environment is hostile/exclusionary.

Title: 这完全就是女同…
Transcript: 🎼好好钻的会得双女主吓晕，百喝完有自己的白洁，女主觉得自己包养的小萌妹最近变得有点性冷淡。为了那种原因，女主隐匿的购入了一瓶合欢水。晚上，女主换上黑色和高跟，将合欢水倒进水杯里时，门铃响了，门外不是门卫，而是隔壁的美人邻居来借浴室。邻居姐姐叫白洁是一名空姐，一段不可描述后，白姐姐洗完澡，顺手拿过拆到料的水杯仰头引进。女主眼睛都瞪大了，直接不知所措。白姐姐喝完脸色绯红，一把将女主拽进了厨房。女主被抱着坐在料理台上，因为饭后无法招架啊，厨厨房我的老天奶，这会不会有点太刺激啦？😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on women and specifically depicts/frames lesbian content (“女同…”, “双女主”, “女主/白洁” as female characters). The group is central to the narrative as the main romantic/sexual plot driver.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown to jobs, safety, health, resources, or territory in a realistic sense. However, the plot uses a fictional substance (“合欢水”) and implies sexual coercion/overstepping boundaries, which is a form of interpersonal harm rather than a societal resource/territory threat.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video does not clearly frame lesbians as a threat to religion/culture/values in an explicit ideological way. Instead, it uses moralized framing around sexual behavior (e.g., “性冷淡”, “不可描述”, “刺激”, “包养的小萌妹最近变得…”, and the neighbor taking the cup) that implicitly treats the group’s sexuality as disruptive or transgressive.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. Unease is created through sensational sexual framing and escalating events: a secret/hidden purchase of a drug-like substance, nighttime stealthy scenario, surprise arrival, and explicit/erotic imagery (close-ups, suggestive actions). The editing and captions emphasize shock (“吓晕”, “直接不知所措”, “太刺激啦”).
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative/derogatory sexual stereotypes by portraying lesbian/queer women as inherently linked to hypersexuality, manipulation, and boundary violations (e.g., using/consuming a hidden substance, “顺手拿过…仰头引进”, “一段不可描述后”, and the framing of the younger partner as becoming “性冷淡” due to an implied cause). The narrative treats these as explanatory evidence for the characters’ behavior.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception does not explicitly call for violence or exclusion. However, it implicitly legitimizes suspicion and moral condemnation by portraying lesbian women as dangerous to others’ autonomy via sexual transgression and by presenting the scenario as something that “happens” because of the group’s sexuality.

Title: 混沌剑神--第16集
Transcript: 跟肃目一比，简直就是人渣。导师吴夫不是一招品行端正之人吗？这个苏一龙如此蛮横霸道，还打伤人，怎么可以人都到齐了吧。🎼考核开始，你们黄一云当众大佬的面子，看看待会儿怎么收拾第一关考核比拼实力，凡有人能将此中移动分好，视为第一关考核通过。😡考核开始。😊🎼小贱，迟早有一天把你们姐妹都给帮了，你在干什么干什么耶你这么，你敢动他，我要你的命。😡

Visuals show conflict and dramatic action effects, but the discomfort is directed at specific antagonistic characters rather than an identity-based group.

Title: 女大学生玩仙人跳，结果被强奸。
Transcript: 🎼跟你玩一个游戏，你放开男人刚打开门就看到地板上的小广告，无聊的他捡起来一看，顿时喜笑颜开，正好晚上没事做余事拨通了电话。现在。😊很快，女学生就来敲门了，男人赶紧藏好等下要用的道具，打开门就看见肤白貌美的美女心急的她一把就把美女丢在了床上。美女赶紧说自己爱干净，叫男人去洗澡间，看着男人走远美女，赶紧在水里加点药，想油。🎼可他万万没想到，男人早已看过他的小动作，根本不接他道数，于是就发生了接下来的一幕。😡怎么干嘛？还挺像个女大学生的吗？哦是太精彩喜欢的朋友，赶紧点击下展试看吧。😊

This frames the group identity (young female student) as undermining trust and social norms around innocence/cleanliness/academic respectability.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The evidence is presented as causal plot logic: the character’s student identity is treated as a cover for criminal sexual exploitation.

Title: 「央视」正面抨击“巨婴行为”“豌豆公主”们醒醒吧！
Transcript: 🎼有句话说得好，疫情是一面照妖镜，照出各种精致的利己主义者。前有李某吃着退烧药千里回国，后有拒绝隔离，还上街跑步的豪横女子。入境确诊病例连续多天成为新增确诊来源，疫情输入风险增加，病毒固然可怕，但比病毒更可怕的是少数入境人士的自私和傲慢。🎼这些任性之举给疫情防控带来了巨大的挑战。我们拒绝这样的拒婴行为，但同时也不能误伤遵纪守法的同胞们。非常时期，我们只想奉劝跑步女和豌豆公主们，回国不是度假，更不是勇闯天涯。既然回来祖国这个避风港，就少一些兴风作浪，改掉从前的任性模样，坚决不让病毒张狂，管好自己是人心所向，做好防控，是为了祖国富强。
Label: Offensive

itt_response.target_salience: The video centrally discusses a stigmatized in-group/out-group labeled as “巨婴” (immature/selfish people) and “豌豆公主” (entitled people), exemplified by specific behaviors (e.g., refusing isolation, taking medication and returning, going out to run). It frames these individuals as a small “minority” but makes them the core moral target of the message.
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes. It frames the group as a material public-health threat by claiming their actions increase “疫情输入风险” (importation risk) and that “入境确诊病例连续多天成为新增确诊来源,” implying these people’s noncompliance contributes to transmission and burdens on epidemic control. Evidence is presented via narrative examples (refusing isolation, going out) and causal language linking behavior to increased case sources.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. It frames the group as a threat to social responsibility and national/community values—portraying their behavior as “自私和傲慢” (selfishness and arrogance) and “任性之举” undermining collective norms of prevention. It also uses moralized framing (“管好自己是人心所向”“做好防控，是为了祖国富强”) suggesting a threat to civic duty and the ‘right way’ to behave during a crisis.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. The video uses a stern, admonishing news-presenter tone, emphatic wording (“疫情是一面照妖镜,” “比病毒更可怕的是少数入境人士的自私和傲慢,” “回国不是度假…坚决不让病毒张狂”), and urgency/seriousness implied by the broadcast style. Editing includes on-screen emphasis (red warning icons/markers) and repeated rhetorical questions (“祖国爱你？你爱祖国吗？”) that heighten pressure and discomfort toward the targeted group.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces stereotypes of “entitled/immature” people as selfish, arrogant, law-ignoring, and dangerous during emergencies. The “evidence” is largely anecdotal and behavioral (refusing isolation, going out, ‘豪横女子’), presented as representative of the group’s character (“精致的利己主义者,” “巨婴行为,” “豌豆公主们醒醒吧”).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The accumulated threat perception supports punitive/disciplinary attitudes rather than direct physical harm: it endorses social condemnation and behavioral control (“拒绝这样的拒婴行为,” “回国…少一些兴风作浪，改掉…任性模样,” “管好自己是人心所向,” “坚决不让病毒张狂”). This can function as a basis for exclusionary or coercive treatment (e.g., treating them as illegitimate/undeserving of leniency), though the video’s prescription is primarily moral shaming and compliance enforcement.

Title: 这3种乳房痛要早点治！
Transcript: 。乳房的疼痛以下三种情况就需要处理，一定要认真看完。乳腺炎引起的疼痛，乳房出现的持续性的疼痛，皮肤表面发红、发热、肿胀等情况，而且有明显的触痛，甚至还有全身的发烧，那么就可能出现了急性乳腺炎，尤其是在哺乳期的妈妈就更要注意了。第二个，颈椎病引起的乳痛、颈椎病，除了引起颈肩的疼痛、上肢的麻木等症状以外，还会引起女性的乳房的。🎼胀篷。第三，伴有乳腺肿块的疼痛，其实乳腺肿块一般是无痛性的，只有少数部分患有疼痛。但是一旦发现了肿块，无法分辨良恶性，记得一定要及时就诊。

Transcript: 🎼hello,大家好吧，我们来继续分享啊。那么常见的这个植偶方面呢，还有一种是谓妈宝这种妈宝呢它呢一般情况它有个什么特征呢？它就是一性特别旺。😊然后呢，他自己呢本身又是全是靠这个印来生他的身，这个组合呢很容易出什么什茫的啊，因为它依赖性非常非常强啊，但是有个条件哈也是印非常旺的情况，一信不旺的话也是那这个人就。🎼完全不是妈宝，那就非常的自己登上了啊。一旺的时候呢，就稍微的有一点无机。那这种呢哎容易出妈宝。

Title: 流氓不可怕，就怕流氓有文化
Transcript: 🎼美女，流氓流氓，男人不流氓，生理不正常，女人不流氓，人类要灭亡，男女都流氓，明天才辉煌。你喝醉了男人就是不喝醉是女人。🎼没小对，女人要是顾喝醉，男人没机会。你说男女要是都不对的话，宾馆谁去睡呀？女生坏，哎，男人不坏，女人不爱吗？😊
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on gendered social groups—men and women—using the repeated label “流氓” (ruffian/“bad guy”) as a framing device. The message is explicitly about how men/women behave sexually/romantically, making these groups central to the lyrics and on-screen dialogue.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No clear material threat is shown. The scenes depict adults drinking and flirting in a nightlife setting; there is no evidence of violence, coercion, or direct harm to safety, jobs, or resources. Any “threat” is rhetorical/behavioral rather than a concrete danger.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes, in a moral/values sense. The lyrics claim that “流氓” is tied to human fate and social order (e.g., “人类要灭亡,” “男女都流氓,” “男人不流氓，生理不正常,” “女人不流氓，人类要灭亡”), implying that deviating from the “ruffian”/sexualized norm is abnormal or leads to societal decline. This frames gendered behavior as a cultural/moral issue.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: The video uses a playful, suggestive tone (music, flirtatious imagery, captions) rather than fear. However, it can still create discomfort by normalizing sexual misconduct-coded language (“流氓”) and implying gendered inevitability around drinking/sex. Editing is straightforward; the main mechanism is the catchy, repetitive lyrics and suggestive close-ups.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative/derogatory stereotypes about both genders: men are portrayed as needing to be “bad/ruffian” to be sexually/biologically normal and desirable; women are portrayed as needing to be “bad/ruffian” to be sexually/romantically involved or to avoid being “not loving.” The lyrics also imply gendered opportunism tied to intoxication (e.g., men/women roles when someone is drunk).
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No explicit call for exclusion or harm is present. The content does not advocate violence or segregation; it mainly promotes a provocative, gendered norm through humor/sexual innuendo. Thus, hostility is not prescribed, though the rhetoric could be interpreted as endorsing disrespectful attitudes toward gendered behavior.

Title: 睾丸在什么情况下才能保持健康
Transcript: 。朋友们，大家好，我是丁燕。中医经络学位调理师，中医健康管理师中医男性调理师。那上个视频呢为大家分享了我们的这个睾丸是特别重要的，而且也需要时长的去滋养，去保养它。那么首先呢我们要知道我们的睾丸到底是在什么情况下才能是健康的那为大家分享一下睾丸呢喜欢这个温度要比我们人体的这个体温要低1到2度。也就是说在35。5度左右的样子。这样的情况之下呢，睾丸才能分泌出更多的这个雄性激素和产生健康的这个小蝌蚪。所以说啊我们要尽量不要去泡温泉呀，不要去穿一些紧身的牛仔裤，要低温一些，当然温度太低了也不行。今天内容就到这里，我们下期再见。
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video discusses male reproductive health (testicles) and implicitly addresses men as the relevant group. This group is central to the message because the host provides health guidance specifically about maintaining healthy testicular function and related hormones.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The video does not frame men or any social group as a material threat to jobs, safety, resources, or territory. It frames biological/health factors (temperature, clothing, hot baths) as causes of health outcomes for the viewer’s body.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: No. There is no framing of men as a threat to values, culture, religion, morals, or a way of life. The content is medical/health advice focused on physiology.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Some mild health-related concern is created, but not intergroup fear. The host uses instructional/educational tone and emphasizes that certain conditions (e.g., hot baths, tight jeans, incorrect temperatures) can harm testicular health, which may prompt worry about personal health. No threatening imagery or hostile editing is present.
itt_response.stereotype_support: No negative social stereotypes about a protected group are invoked. The video uses general biological/medical claims (testicular temperature affects hormone production and sperm quality) rather than attributing negative traits to men as a social category.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No. The video does not endorse exclusion, hostility, or harm toward any group. It prescribes self-care behaviors (avoid hot springs, avoid tight jeans, maintain appropriate temperature) to improve health.

Title: 怀疑他上辈子是妈宝男，所以这辈子才记得这么清楚
Transcript: 站好，我问你，我送你去幼儿园三大事，还记得吗？记得，吃好完好睡好吃好了吗？吃好了，鸡腿都没吃过，我咋说你就不听呢？妈，你知道香水妈妈难吗？来，你说给我听听。就啥都听妈妈的，他妈说死就得先生，他就信，那你是妈宝男吗？我才不带妈宝男，为啥？一点处息没有，你是不是要我处不到行不？哎呦我去。😡
Label: Normal

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on a gendered/behavioral label: a child described as a “妈宝男” (a “mama’s boy,” i.e., overly dependent on his mother). This is the primary social/identity category being discussed and judged, with the character’s behavior used as the basis for the label.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No. The depiction does not present the “妈宝男” as a material threat to safety, jobs, health, or resources. The conflict is interpersonal/disciplinary (child not listening, food/behavior at home), not about harm to others or tangible danger.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Somewhat, but limited. The video frames the “妈宝男” trait as a moral/behavioral problem—someone who “everything listens to mom,” follows mom’s instructions, and lacks independence (“一点出息没有”). This is a threat to values like autonomy/obedience to the current caregiver/authority figure, rather than to culture or religion.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Moderate. The tone is comedic but includes frustration and anger (the mother character looks upset; the child is scolded). The editing is simple and cartoon-like; there is no imagery of danger. Discomfort comes from the implied social judgment and the character’s perceived lack of independence.
itt_response.stereotype_support: Yes. It reinforces a negative stereotype that “mama’s boys” are dependent, lack competence (“没出息”), and are untrustworthy in decision-making (“妈说死就得先生，他就信”). The stereotype is treated as explanatory evidence for the child’s behavior.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: No explicit endorsement of harm or exclusion. The response is corrective/disciplinary (scolding, questioning, asserting boundaries like “我才不带妈宝男”), not violence or dehumanization. However, it does prescribe rejection/avoidance of the labeled person in a relational sense (not wanting to “bring/accept” a mama’s boy).

Title: 生姜加一物让阴茎勃起，硬如铁，在家就能治阳痿
Transcript: 生姜加衣物让阴茎勃起硬如铁。在家就能治疗阳痿。今天分享一个小妙方，让你自己在家就能改善阳痿勃起硬度差啊，总是时好时坏，中途疲软甚至无法勃起的情况。肾阳的推动对于迅速切持久的勃起至关重要，但肾阳不足，阴茎得不到足够的血液啊供应，就容易引起勃起困难和硬度差。准备一些生姜和赤勺切成片，放入开水中，浸泡5至10分钟，过滤后使用。生姜具有解表散寒的作用，能够补充阳气，驱散寒气，赤勺活去化瘀，使你的勃给迅速而持久。

Title: 哇，傻逼公主
Transcript: 🎼陈色呦呦呦呦呦呦，这不是小日本的初音未来吗？看我不揍死你。呦呦呦，这不是小日本的初音未来吗？😊

itt_response.target_salience: The video centers on Japanese people (referred to as “小日本/日本” and “小日本的初音未来”), using the character Hatsune Miku as a proxy for the Japanese group. The group is highly central because the captions and commentary repeatedly link the character to “Japan/Japanese.”
itt_response.realistic_threat: Yes, it implies a material/physical threat: the transcript includes “看我不揍死你” (“I’ll beat you to death”), and the on-screen framing suggests aggression toward the Japanese-associated character. However, it is not evidence of real-world harm; it is presented as threatening/violent intent in the dialogue.
itt_response.symbolic_threat: Yes. The video frames the Japanese group as a threat to culture/identity: it repeatedly asserts “不是小日本的初音未来吗” and includes “暴打日本…拒绝文化入侵” (roughly: “beat Japan… refuse cultural invasion”). This constructs “Japanese culture” as something that invades or must be resisted.
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes. Unease/discomfort is created through a hostile, taunting tone (aggressive lines like “揍死你”), repeated insistence on the group’s identity (“小日本”), and edited/overlay text that escalates the confrontation. The music/chanting style and the repeated callouts reinforce a confrontational mood.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It invokes negative stereotypes by associating Japanese identity with aggression/need to be beaten and with “cultural invasion.” The character is treated as proof of group identity (“this is Japanese Miku”), and the group is implicitly treated as deserving punishment.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: Yes. The accumulated threat perception is used to justify hostility: the repeated “暴打日本/拒绝文化入侵” and “看我不揍死你” function as a prescription for violence/harassment and exclusionary resistance toward the Japanese group.

Title: 女性产后有漏尿的现象，噗噗声，可能是阴道松弛症状！
Transcript: Okay.很多女性怀孕分娩之后呢，觉断性生后的质量不如产前了，会出现干涩、漏尿，甚至还会有气体，就像是放屁的那种感觉。那么这种情况很可能有阴道松弛症，阴道不能很好的正常的关闭，阴道口在大部分时间都是打开的，所以呢会有空气进入，如果松弛非常严重的话，必要的时候我们是可以通过手术来。治疗呢以防止大家一直受到这种困扰，让生活质量下降。
Label: Normal

Title: 为了粉丝们今年不再遇到渣男，有一些忠告要给你们
Transcript: 。准备开始新的一年了，为了粉丝们今年不再遇到渣男，所以我还是有一些忠告要给你们没有什么方法能够让你们快速遇到好男人，但是你足够优秀，好男人会自己找上门。那总想在各种什么社交软件找男朋友的酒吧里面找真爱的。我劝你们就不要在垃圾堆里面找男朋友了。只有男生才知道玩社交软件和去酒吧的男生里脑子里想的是什么东西，还有只有平等的爱情才能走得更加的长远。像舔狗一样一味的付出。在男生眼里是最不值钱的。所以谈恋爱的时候，不要一上来就一股脑的对他好，好像没有。我男的一样，不然你就很容约换来一句，对不起，你对我太好了，我怕辜负你分手吧。这本来就是一种很自卑的表现啊。你们希望可以用你的好把它留在你的身边。这样的男生不害怕你的离开，反而想着什么时候利用完你就离开，所以你们要做的就是变得更优秀一点，让男的害怕你离开，知道吗？千言万语说这么多话，我就希望你们新的一年可以变得更优秀一点，等着别爱你，还不如先努力爱自己，加油。
Label: Normal

Men are discussed as a broad dating pool rather than a protected group; the message is centered on gendered dating dynamics and how women should select partners.
itt_response.realistic_threat: No material threat to jobs, safety, health, or territory is explicitly claimed. The closest “realistic” harm is relational/resource loss (wasting time, being manipulated, getting hurt emotionally, ending in breakup). Evidence: repeated advice to avoid “垃圾堆/酒吧/社交软件” and claims that certain men will “利用完你就离开” and that women may be “很容易换来一句…分手吧.”
itt_response.symbolic_threat: The video frames a moral/relational threat: “渣男” are portrayed as violating values of sincerity and “平等的爱情,” undermining trust and long-term relationship stability. Evidence: emphasis on “忠告,” “没有什么方法能够让你们快速遇到好男人，但是你足够优秀，好男人会自己找上门,” and the claim that “只有平等的爱情才能走得更加的长远,” contrasted with “舔狗式一味付出” being “最不值钱.”
itt_response.anxiety_discomfort: Yes—anxiety is created about being deceived and ending up with the wrong partner. Means: admonishing tone (“我劝你们就不要…,” “这样的男生不害怕你的离开…利用完你就离开”), persuasive certainty, and repeated warnings about where to look (social apps/bars) and how to behave (not over-giving). Imagery is a talking-head with subtitles; no threatening visuals or music cues are evident from the frames provided.
itt_response.stereotype_support: It reinforces negative stereotypes about certain men in specific dating contexts: men who use social apps/go to bars are implied to have “脑子里想的是什么东西,” and “渣男” are characterized as manipulative, exploitative, and dismissive of women’s efforts. It also stereotypes women’s behavior as potentially “自卑” if they over-give (“一股脑的对他好…很自卑的表现”). These are presented as causal evidence for why women should avoid those environments and adopt a more guarded strategy.
itt_response.hostility_prescription: The video does not prescribe violence or direct harm. However, it does endorse exclusionary/avoidance behavior toward a category of men (“不要在垃圾堆里面找男朋友,” “不要…酒吧/社交软件找男朋友”) and promotes adversarial dating strategy (“让男的害怕你离开”). This is a form of hostility/antagonism in the interpersonal selection sense, not physical harm.
